---
title: "Paired Sampling of SWA and Veg Across AOI"
subtitle: "Aug-Sep; 2019, 2021, 2023"
author: "Matt Webster"
date: '...'
output:
  html_document: default
  pdf_document: default
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---



    The purposes of this script are as follows:
    
    COMPLETE THE FOLLOWING FOR ALL TARGET WATERSHEDS (n=6) in 2019, 2021, 2023:
    
      1) Import and organize data from various sources/source scripts:
        a) Surface water area (m2) per riparian polygon
        a) Vegegtation data (area m2 & mean(NDVI))
        b) Riparian polygon geometries, and riparian polygon area (m2)
        c) Topographic Openness (no unit) per riparian polygon
        d) dynOcc data: grid cells, p, f, UDA
        e) Dam count per riparian polygon
          - beaver dams ('certain' and 'all' detections)
          - anthropogenic dams/channel spanning structures (e.g., road crossings, check dams, etc.)
      2) Implement density based cluster analysis of dammed stream reaches
        a) Max distance to be considered same cluster (Eps) = 250(m)
        b) Minimum dams for one cluster (minPoints) = 1 dam
      3) Implement paired sampling of dammed and undammed reaches
        a) Dammed/undammed not within 500m of 'anthro'
        a2) Single dam = dam + 250m stream length (25 TP_ID)
        b) Undammed pair = same stream length as dammed
        c) Undammed not within 250m of 'dammed'
        d) Undammed not within 250m of 'undammed'
          - (force no overlap via spatial thinning, post pairing. 
            This winnows your sample size)
      4) Compare surface water area (SWA) at dammed vs paired undammed reaches
      5) Visualize diff(SW) b/t dammed and undammed as heat map
        a) x axis is relative flow (2wk average for time t)
        b) y axis is ponding capacity (RIPA*(TO/90))
      
      5) Data needs:
        a. Surface Water Area [sum(SWA)] (m2) for cluster[i]
        b. Topographic Openness [mean(TO)] for cluster[i]
        c. Riparian Area [sum(RIPA)] (m2) for cluster[i]
        d. damIntensity/damDensity (Nhat) for cluster[i]
        e. Upstream drainage area [max(UDA)] (km2) for cluster[i] (a.k.a. contributing catchment are)
    
    
    
    
**NOTE:** The main purpose of this iteration is to incorporate vegArea and mean(NDVI) for each dammed/undammed sample window. Do this AFTER the sample data frame has been created with all the other variables -- BEFORE you convert the data frame to long format for export. Join the veg data by TP_ID [this should filter veg data and only include TP_IDs of sample windows]. Double check NA prevalence -- if it's an issue, consider computing nullArea and accounting for that.

Relative Flow Condition Across Study Period:
----

Visualize USGS flow data from Guston Coulee Gage on Beaver Ck, near Saco, MT.

Eventually, you'll connect riparian inundation back to this for a post hoc heat map

Flow was z-standardized across [06/01-10/01] 2019, 2021, & 2023.

----

```{r,echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# LOWER BEAVER CK
# Gage near Guston Coulee
usgsGage_06166000 <- readNWISdv(
  siteNumbers = "06166000",
  parameterCd = "00060",
  startDate = "2019-06-01",
  endDate   = "2023-10-01"
)

###########################################

# Clean USGS
usgs_df <- usgsGage_06166000 %>%
  mutate(
    source = "USGS",
    date   = as.Date(Date),
    flow   = X_00060_00003
    ) %>%
  filter(
    (date >= as.Date("2019-06-01") & date <= as.Date("2019-10-01")) |
    (date >= as.Date("2021-06-01") & date <= as.Date("2021-10-01")) |
    (date >= as.Date("2023-06-01") & date <= as.Date("2023-10-01")) ) %>% 
  mutate(
    zFlow = scale(flow)
  ) %>% 
  select(source,
         date,
         zFlow) %>% 
  mutate(surveyPeriod = case_when(between(date, as.Date("2019-06-01"), as.Date("2019-06-14")) ~ 191,
                                between(date, as.Date("2019-06-15"), as.Date("2019-06-30")) ~ 192,
                                between(date, as.Date("2019-07-01"), as.Date("2019-07-14")) ~ 193,
                                between(date, as.Date("2019-07-15"), as.Date("2019-07-31")) ~ 194,
                                between(date, as.Date("2019-08-01"), as.Date("2019-08-14")) ~ 195,
                                between(date, as.Date("2019-08-15"), as.Date("2019-08-31")) ~ 196,
                                between(date, as.Date("2019-09-01"), as.Date("2019-09-14")) ~ 197,
                                between(date, as.Date("2019-09-15"), as.Date("2019-09-30")) ~ 198,
                                between(date, as.Date("2021-06-01"), as.Date("2021-06-14")) ~ 211,
                                between(date, as.Date("2021-06-15"), as.Date("2021-06-30")) ~ 212,
                                between(date, as.Date("2021-07-01"), as.Date("2021-07-14")) ~ 213,
                                between(date, as.Date("2021-07-15"), as.Date("2021-07-31")) ~ 214,
                                between(date, as.Date("2021-08-01"), as.Date("2021-08-14")) ~ 215,
                                between(date, as.Date("2021-08-15"), as.Date("2021-08-31")) ~ 216,
                                between(date, as.Date("2021-09-01"), as.Date("2021-09-14")) ~ 217,
                                between(date, as.Date("2021-09-15"), as.Date("2021-09-30")) ~ 218,
                                between(date, as.Date("2023-06-01"), as.Date("2023-06-14")) ~ 231,
                                between(date, as.Date("2023-06-15"), as.Date("2023-06-30")) ~ 232,
                                between(date, as.Date("2023-07-01"), as.Date("2023-07-14")) ~ 233,
                                between(date, as.Date("2023-07-15"), as.Date("2023-07-31")) ~ 234,
                                between(date, as.Date("2023-08-01"), as.Date("2023-08-14")) ~ 235,
                                between(date, as.Date("2023-08-15"), as.Date("2023-08-31")) ~ 236,
                                between(date, as.Date("2023-09-01"), as.Date("2023-09-14")) ~ 237,
                                between(date, as.Date("2023-09-15"), as.Date("2023-09-30")) ~ 238,
                                TRUE ~ NA_real_)) %>% 
  filter(surveyPeriod > 0)

usgs_df$surveyPeriod <- as.factor(usgs_df$surveyPeriod)


mean_flow_per_survey_period <- usgs_df %>% 
  group_by(surveyPeriod) %>%
  summarise(zFlow_mean = mean(zFlow),
            .groups = "drop")


lateSummerFlow <- usgs_df %>% 
  filter(surveyPeriod != 191,
         surveyPeriod != 192,
         surveyPeriod != 193,
         surveyPeriod != 194,
         surveyPeriod != 211,
         surveyPeriod != 212,
         surveyPeriod != 213,
         surveyPeriod != 214,
         surveyPeriod != 231,
         surveyPeriod != 232,
         surveyPeriod != 233,
         surveyPeriod != 234,
         )

```

Late Summer Flow Conditions
----

2019:
----

Moderate August with peak in September 

```{r,echo=FALSE}

flow19 <- lateSummerFlow %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date(date)) %>%
  filter(
    (date >= as.Date("2019-06-01") & date <= as.Date("2019-10-01"))
  )


####

ggplot(flow19, aes(x = date, 
                       y = zFlow,
                       group = lubridate::year(date))) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8, alpha = 0.8) +
  labs(
    x = "Date",
    y = "Discharge (cfs)",
    title = "Summer '19 Stream Discharge; USGS 06166000; Lower Beaver",
    subtitle = "z-scaled June through September, 2019, 2021, 2023"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14)

```

----
  
2021:
----

Low flow conditions throughout the summer season. Part of 3 year sustained drought conditions (2020, 2021, 2022).


Gage recorded no flow during August & September



```{r,echo=FALSE}

flow21 <- lateSummerFlow %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date(date)) %>%
  filter(
    (date >= as.Date("2021-06-01") & date <= as.Date("2021-10-01"))
  )


####

ggplot(flow21, aes(x = date, 
                       y = zFlow,
                       group = lubridate::year(date))) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8, alpha = 0.8) +
  labs(
    x = "Date",
    y = "Discharge (cfs)",
    title = "Summer '21 Stream Discharge; USGS 06166000; Lower Beaver",
    subtitle = "z-scaled June through September, 2019, 2021, 2023"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14)

```  
  
----

2023:
----

Moderate to low August & September flows; after early season extreme flooding. 



```{r,echo=FALSE}
flow23 <- lateSummerFlow %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date(date)) %>%
  filter(
    (date >= as.Date("2023-06-01") & date <= as.Date("2023-10-01"))
  )


####

ggplot(flow23, aes(x = date, 
                       y = zFlow,
                       group = lubridate::year(date))) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8, alpha = 0.8) +
  labs(
    x = "Date",
    y = "Discharge (cfs)",
    title = "Summer '23 Stream Discharge; USGS 06166000; Lower Beaver",
    subtitle = "z-scaled June through September, 2019, 2021, 2023"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14)

```

```{r,echo=FALSE}

# Riparian Sampling Geometries:

#############################################
##############################################


# Willow:
wcRiparianGeometries <- suppressMessages(st_read("WC_RIP_GEOMS.shp",quiet=TRUE)) %>% 
  st_make_valid() %>% 
  select(Input_FID,
         geometry) %>% 
  rename(TP_ID = Input_FID) %>% 
  st_transform(4326) %>% 
  filter(TP_ID != 11609)



wcRipGeom_Area <- st_transform(wcRiparianGeometries, 32613) %>% 
  mutate(riparian_area_m2 = as.numeric(st_area(.)))


# Lone Tree:
ltRiparianGeometries <- suppressMessages(st_read("LT_RIP_GEOMS.shp",quiet = TRUE)) %>%
  st_make_valid() %>% 
  select(Input_FID,
         geometry) %>% 
  rename(TP_ID = Input_FID) %>% 
  st_transform(4326)

ltRipGeom_Area <- st_transform(ltRiparianGeometries, 32613) %>% 
  mutate(riparian_area_m2 = as.numeric(st_area(.)))

# Brazil:
brzRiparianGeometries <- suppressMessages(st_read("BRZ_RIP_GEOMS.shp",quiet=T)) %>% 
  st_make_valid() %>% 
  select(Input_FID,
         geometry) %>% 
  rename(TP_ID = Input_FID) %>% 
  st_transform(4326) %>%
  filter(TP_ID!=5682)

brzRipGeom_Area <- st_transform(brzRiparianGeometries, 32613) %>% 
  mutate(riparian_area_m2 = as.numeric(st_area(.)))

# Larb:
lrbRiparianGeometries <- suppressMessages(st_read("LRB_RIP_GEOMS.shp",quiet=T)) %>% 
  st_make_valid() %>% 
  select(Input_FID,
         geometry) %>% 
  rename(TP_ID = Input_FID) %>% 
  st_transform(4326) %>% 
  filter(TP_ID != 4271)

lrbRipGeom_Area <- st_transform(lrbRiparianGeometries, 32613) %>% 
  mutate(riparian_area_m2 = as.numeric(st_area(.)))

# Lower Beaver:
lbvRiparianGeometries <- suppressMessages(st_read("LBV_RIP_GEOMS.shp",quiet=T)) %>% 
  st_make_valid() %>% 
  select(Input_FID,
         geometry) %>%
  rename(TP_ID = Input_FID) %>% 
  st_transform(4326)

lbvRipGeom_Area <- st_transform(lbvRiparianGeometries, 32613) %>% 
  mutate(riparian_area_m2 = as.numeric(st_area(.)))

# Upper Beaver:
ubvRiparianGeometries <- suppressMessages(st_read("ubv_RIP_GEOMS.shp",quiet=T)) %>% 
  st_make_valid() %>% 
  select(Input_FID,
         geometry) %>%
  rename(TP_ID = Input_FID) %>% 
  st_transform(4326)

ubvRipGeom_Area <- st_transform(ubvRiparianGeometries, 32613) %>% 
  mutate(riparian_area_m2 = as.numeric(st_area(.)))
```

```{r, echo=FALSE}

# Add Topographic Openness
# TO (positive) is the mean() of azimuth angles from each of 8 intercardinal directions
  

##########################################
##########################################


# Bring Topographic Openness into the mix:
#### TO is an approximate measure of stream channel confinement
#### TO has been computed for each riparian polygon (thiessen 10m) along Willow Ck

# WILLOW

wc_data_TO <- read.csv("wc_riparian_wTO.csv") %>% 
  distinct(TP_ID, .keep_all = TRUE)%>% 
  filter(TP_ID != 11609)

wc_data_meanTO <- wc_data_TO %>% 
  mutate(meanTO = rowMeans(select(.,     #Compute mean(TO) for each RipPoly
                                  E,     #mean() TO of all 8 intercardinal 
                                  N,     #directions
                                  NE,
                                  NW,
                                  S,
                                  SE,
                                  SW,
                                  W))) 

wc_meanTO_trim <- wc_data_meanTO %>% 
  select(TP_ID,E,N,NE,NW,S,SE,SW,W,meanTO) 

colnames(wc_meanTO_trim) <- c("TP_ID","E","N","NE","NW","S","SE","SW","W","TO")


# Add TO to RIPGEOM_AREA
wcRIP_Area_TO <- wc_meanTO_trim %>% 
  left_join(wcRipGeom_Area,
            by = "TP_ID") %>% 
  select(TP_ID,
         riparian_area_m2,
         TO)


###################################

# LONE TREE
lt_data_TO <- read.csv("lt_riparian_wTO.csv") %>% 
  distinct(TP_ID, .keep_all = TRUE)

lt_data_meanTO <- lt_data_TO %>%

                                  E,     #mean() TO of all 8 intercardinal 
                                  N,     #directions
                                  NE,
                                  NW,
                                  S,
                                  SE,
                                  SW,
                                  W))) 

lt_meanTO_trim <- lt_data_meanTO %>% 
  select(TP_ID,E,N,NE,NW,S,SE,SW,W,meanTO) 

colnames(lt_meanTO_trim) <- c("TP_ID","E","N","NE","NW","S","SE","SW","W","TO")


# Add TO to RIPGEOM_AREA

            by = "TP_ID") %>%

         TO)



###################################
```

```{r,echo=FALSE}
# Add UDA from corresponding CP dynamic occupancy grid cell:

##########################################
##########################################

# WILLOW

wc_dynOccGC_UDA <- read.csv("dynOccData_2021_oct7.csv") %>% 
  filter(Stream == "WC") %>% 
  select(unique_ID,
         catchment_km2) #Get contributing drainage area for each dynOcc grid cell

wc_DynOccGCs <- read.csv("wc_wGCID_wDamCount_2021.csv") %>% 
  select(Input_FID,
         Poly_unique_id) #Get TP_ID <--> GCID matched

colnames(wc_DynOccGCs) <- c("TP_ID",
                             "unique_ID")
                             
wcRIP_UDA_uniqueID <- wc_DynOccGCs %>% 
  left_join(wc_dynOccGC_UDA, by = "unique_ID")  # connect UDA to TP_ID

wcRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID <- wcRIP_Area_TO %>%  # add ^ data to TO df
  left_join(wcRIP_UDA_uniqueID, by = "TP_ID") %>%
  mutate(watershed = substr(unique_ID, 1, 2)) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(watershed)) 

####

# LONE TREE

lt_dynOccGC_UDA <- read.csv("dynOccData_2021_oct7.csv") %>% 
  filter(Stream == "LT") %>% 
  select(unique_ID,
         catchment_km2) #Get contributing drainage area for each dynOcc grid cell

lt_DynOccGCs <- read.csv("lt_wGCID_wDamCount_2021.csv") %>% 
  select(Input_FID,
         Poly_unique_id) %>%
  mutate(Poly_unique_id = str_replace(Poly_unique_id, "^lt", "LT"))#Get TP_ID <--> GCID matched

colnames(lt_DynOccGCs) <- c("TP_ID",
                             "unique_ID")
                             
ltRIP_UDA_uniqueID <- lt_DynOccGCs %>% 
  left_join(lt_dynOccGC_UDA, by = "unique_ID")  # connect UDA to TP_ID

ltRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID <- ltRIP_Area_TO %>%  # add ^ data to TO df
  left_join(ltRIP_UDA_uniqueID, by = "TP_ID") %>%
  mutate(watershed = substr(unique_ID, 1, 2)) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(watershed))

####

# BRAZIL

brz_dynOccGC_UDA <- read.csv("dynOccData_2021_oct7.csv") %>% 
  filter(Stream == "BRZ") %>% 
  select(unique_ID,
         catchment_km2) #Get contributing drainage area for each dynOcc grid cell

brz_DynOccGCs <- read.csv("brz_wGCID_wDamCount_2021.csv") %>% 
  select(Input_FID,
         Poly_unique_id) %>%
  mutate(Poly_unique_id = str_replace(Poly_unique_id, "^brz", "BRZ")) #Get TP_ID <--> GCID matched

colnames(brz_DynOccGCs) <- c("TP_ID",
                             "unique_ID")
                             
brzRIP_UDA_uniqueID <- brz_DynOccGCs %>% 
  left_join(brz_dynOccGC_UDA, by = "unique_ID")  # connect UDA to TP_ID

brzRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID <- brzRIP_Area_TO %>%  # add ^ data to TO df
  left_join(brzRIP_UDA_uniqueID, by = "TP_ID") %>%
  mutate(watershed = substr(unique_ID, 1, 3)) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(watershed))

####

# LARB

lrb_dynOccGC_UDA <- read.csv("dynOccData_2021_oct7.csv") %>% 
  filter(Stream == "LRB") %>% 
  select(unique_ID,
         catchment_km2) #Get contributing drainage area for each dynOcc grid cell

lrb_DynOccGCs <- read.csv("lrb_wGCID_wDamCount_2021.csv") %>% 
  select(Input_FID,
         Poly_unique_id) %>%
  mutate(Poly_unique_id = str_replace(Poly_unique_id, "^lrb", "LRB")) #Get TP_ID <--> GCID matched

colnames(lrb_DynOccGCs) <- c("TP_ID",
                             "unique_ID")
                             
lrbRIP_UDA_uniqueID <- lrb_DynOccGCs %>% 
  left_join(lrb_dynOccGC_UDA, by = "unique_ID")  # connect UDA to TP_ID

lrbRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID <- lrbRIP_Area_TO %>%  # add ^ data to TO df
  left_join(lrbRIP_UDA_uniqueID, by = "TP_ID") %>%
  mutate(watershed = substr(unique_ID, 1, 3)) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(watershed))

####

# LOWER BEAVER

lbv_dynOccGC_UDA <- read.csv("dynOccData_2021_oct7.csv") %>% 
  filter(Stream == "LBV") %>% 
  select(unique_ID,
         catchment_km2) #Get contributing drainage area for each dynOcc grid cell

lbv_DynOccGCs <- read.csv("lbv_wGCID_wDamCount_2021.csv") %>% 
  select(Input_FID,
         Poly_unique_id) %>%
  mutate(Poly_unique_id = str_replace(Poly_unique_id, "^lbv", "LBV")) #Get TP_ID <--> GCID matched

colnames(lbv_DynOccGCs) <- c("TP_ID",
                             "unique_ID")
                             
lbvRIP_UDA_uniqueID <- lbv_DynOccGCs %>% 
  left_join(lbv_dynOccGC_UDA, by = "unique_ID")  # connect UDA to TP_ID

lbvRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID <- lbvRIP_Area_TO %>%  # add ^ data to TO df

  mutate(watershed = substr(unique_ID, 1, 3)) %>%

# UPPER BEAVER

ubv_dynOccGC_UDA <- read.csv("dynOccData_2021_oct7.csv") %>% 
  filter(Stream == "UBV") %>% 
  select(unique_ID,
         catchment_km2) #Get contributing drainage area for each dynOcc grid cell

ubv_DynOccGCs <- read.csv("ubv_wGCID_wDamCount_2021.csv") %>% 
  select(Input_FID,
         Poly_unique_id) %>%
  mutate(Poly_unique_id = str_replace(Poly_unique_id, "^ubv", "UBV")) #Get TP_ID <--> GCID matched

colnames(ubv_DynOccGCs) <- c("TP_ID",
                             "unique_ID")
                             
ubvRIP_UDA_uniqueID <- ubv_DynOccGCs %>% 
  left_join(ubv_dynOccGC_UDA, by = "unique_ID")  # connect UDA to TP_ID

ubvRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID <- ubvRIP_Area_TO %>%  # add ^ data to TO df
  left_join(ubvRIP_UDA_uniqueID, by = "TP_ID") %>%
  mutate(watershed = substr(unique_ID, 1, 3)) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(watershed))

```



Visualize temporally static variables of interest:

    These are variables that a constant per riparian polygon over time. TO and riparian area come from a 1m DEM from 2019, and are considered constant for our purposes. Ditto with catchment area, though it was derived from NHDplus-HR, I believe (double check with CP).

```{r, echo=FALSE}
wc_tempStat <- wcRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID %>% 
  select(watershed,
         riparian_area_m2,
         TO,
         catchment_km2)

lt_tempStat <- ltRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID %>% 
  select(watershed,
         riparian_area_m2,
         TO,
         catchment_km2)

brz_tempStat <- brzRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID %>% 
  select(watershed,
         riparian_area_m2,
         TO,
         catchment_km2)

lrb_tempStat <- lrbRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID %>% 
  select(watershed,
         riparian_area_m2,
         TO,
         catchment_km2)

lbv_tempStat <- lbvRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID %>% 
  select(watershed,
         riparian_area_m2,
         TO,
         catchment_km2)

ubv_tempStat <- ubvRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID %>% 
  select(watershed,
         riparian_area_m2,
         TO,
         catchment_km2)

aoi_tempStat <- bind_rows(wc_tempStat,
                          lt_tempStat,
                          brz_tempStat,
                          lrb_tempStat,
                          lbv_tempStat,
                          ubv_tempStat)

ws_order <- c("WC", "LT", "BRZ", "LRB", "LBV", "UBV")

aoi_tempStat$watershed <- factor(aoi_tempStat$watershed, levels = ws_order)

```

Topographic Openness Across Study Area
----

```{r, echo=FALSE}

ggplot(aoi_tempStat, aes(x = TO)) +
  geom_density(fill = "navy",alpha = 0.5) +
  facet_wrap(~ watershed, scales = "free") +
  labs(
    title = "Per-Watershed Distribution of Topographic Openness (TO)",
    x = "TO",
    y = "Density"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14)


```

Riparian Area Across Study Area
----

```{r, echo=FALSE}

ggplot(aoi_tempStat, aes(x = riparian_area_m2)) +
  geom_density(fill = "goldenrod",alpha = 0.5) +
  facet_wrap(~ watershed, scales = "free") +
  labs(
    title = expression("Per-Watershed Distribution of Riparian Area_" (m^2)),
    x = expression("Riparian Area_" (m^2)),
    y = "Density"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14)


```

----

Contributing Drainage Area Across Study Area
----

```{r, echo=FALSE}

ggplot(aoi_tempStat, aes(x = catchment_km2)) +
  geom_density(fill = "brown",alpha = 0.5) +
  facet_wrap(~ watershed, scales = "free") +
  labs(
    title = expression("Per-Watershed Distribution of Upstream Drainage Area" (km^2)),
    x = expression("Upstream Drainage Area_" (km^2)),
    y = "Density"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45,
                                   hjust = 1)
        )

```

Get dam detections and surface water area for each riparian polygon, in each watershed, during each time period, in each year.

----

----

Dams [line 806:1811]

```{r, echo=FALSE}
damDetDat <- read.csv("site_year_detection_falsepositive_probs.csv") 

colnames(damDetDat) <- c("unique_ID",
                         "year",
                         "p_mean",
                         "f_mean")

damDetData19 <- damDetDat %>% 
  filter(year == 2019)

damDetData21 <- damDetDat %>% 
  filter(year == 2021)

damDetData23 <- damDetDat %>% 
  filter(year == 2023)

# Filter by watershed and append dam detection data to the static variables dataframe for each watershed

# WILLOW
# 2019
wc_damDetData19 <- damDetData19 %>% 
  filter(str_detect(unique_ID, "^WC_")) #get detection data for target watershed


wcRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID_detDat19 <- wcRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID %>% 
  left_join(wc_damDetData19,
            by = "unique_ID") %>% 
  filter(TP_ID != 11609) %>% 
  group_by(TP_ID) %>%
  summarise(year = first(year),
            unique_ID = first(unique_ID),
            TO = mean(TO, na.rm = TRUE),
            catchment_km2 = max(catchment_km2, na.rm = TRUE),
             # mean geomorphic / hydrologic variables
            p_mean = mean(p_mean, na.rm = TRUE),
            f_mean = mean(f_mean, na.rm = TRUE),
            
            .groups = "drop"
  ) #combine detection data with static variables df

# 2021
wc_damDetData21 <- damDetData21 %>% 
  filter(str_detect(unique_ID, "^WC_"))

wcRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID_detDat21 <- wcRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID %>% 
  left_join(wc_damDetData21,
            by = "unique_ID")%>% 
  filter(TP_ID != 11609) %>% 
  group_by(TP_ID) %>%
  summarise(year = first(year),
            unique_ID = first(unique_ID),
            TO = mean(TO, na.rm = TRUE),
            catchment_km2 = max(catchment_km2, na.rm = TRUE),
             # mean geomorphic / hydrologic variables
            p_mean = mean(p_mean, na.rm = TRUE),
            f_mean = mean(f_mean, na.rm = TRUE),
            
            .groups = "drop"
  ) #combine detection data with static variables df

            by = "unique_ID")%>%

  group_by(TP_ID) %>%

            unique_ID = first(unique_ID),
```

```{r,echo=FALSE}
#Now get dam presence data for June-Sep; 2019, 2021, and 2023 for each watershed.

######

# Dam detections by TP_ID:

# WILLOW

# 2019

wcDams19 <- read.csv("wc_GCID_DamCount_2019.csv") %>% 
  select(Input_FID,
         dam_count_all,
         dam_count_anthro,
         dam_count_confident) %>% 
  mutate(year = 2019,
         watershed = "WC") %>% 
  filter(Input_FID != 11609) %>% 
  group_by(Input_FID) %>%
  summarise(year = first(year),
            watershed = first(watershed),
            # sum dam counts
            dam_count_all  = sum(dam_count_all, na.rm = TRUE),
            dam_count_conf = sum(dam_count_confident, na.rm = TRUE),
            dam_count_anthro    = sum(dam_count_anthro, na.rm = TRUE),
            .groups = "drop"
  )

colnames(wcDams19) <- c("TP_ID",
                        "year",
                        "watershed",
                        "dam_count_beav_all",
                        "dam_count_beav_conf",
                        "dam_count_ant")

wcRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID_detDat19_dam19 <- wcRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID_detDat19 %>% 
  left_join(wcDams19, by=c("TP_ID",
                           "year"))
####

  select(Input_FID,
         dam_count_all,
         dam_count_anthro,
         dam_count_confident) %>% 
  mutate(year = 2021,
         watershed = "WC") %>% 
  filter(Input_FID != 11609) %>% 
  group_by(Input_FID) %>%
  summarise(year = first(year),
            watershed = first(watershed),
            # sum dam counts
            dam_count_all  = sum(dam_count_all, na.rm = TRUE),
            dam_count_conf = sum(dam_count_confident, na.rm = TRUE),
            dam_count_anthro    = sum(dam_count_anthro, na.rm = TRUE),

  )

```

----
----

Identify dammed and undammed sample clusters using **1-D DBSCAN** (Density Based Spatial clustering Algorithm with Noise).

    1-D DBSCAN uses TP_ID as a 1-D directional marker (following the stream flow
    line). TP_IDs are ~10-m spaced. DBSCAN uses a minCluster size of 1 dam, and
    a max distance for inclusion in a cluster of 250-m between dams.
  
    Min(ClusterSize) = 1 dammed polygon
    eps = 25
    
    
    NOTE: 
      - NOT DOING EPS[optimal] approach. Test clustering using 25 and test 
        clustering using 10; Make a call.
      - Median distance between nearest neighbors is 300-m on Willow Ck 2021. 
        Thus, less than 300m could be considered 'closer than normal'; 
        go with 250-m
      - At Eps=10 (100m search) just about every dam on WC21 is it's own cluster
        (155 dams, 126 clusters).
      
      


**Willow Creek ** 

```{r, echo=FALSE}
wc_anthroDammed <- read.csv("WC_RIP_isAnthro.csv")

colnames(wc_anthroDammed) <- c("TP_ID", "isAnthro")

wc_anthroDammed <- wc_anthroDammed %>% 
  filter(TP_ID != 11609) %>% 
  group_by(TP_ID) %>% 
  summarise(isAnthro = first(isAnthro))


# 2019
wcRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID_detDat19_dam19 <- wcRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID_detDat19_dam19 %>%
  left_join(wc_anthroDammed,
            by = "TP_ID")

# 2021
wcRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID_detDat21_dam21 <- wcRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID_detDat21_dam21 %>%
  left_join(wc_anthroDammed,
            by = "TP_ID")

# 2023
wcRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID_detDat23_dam23 <- wcRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID_detDat23_dam23 %>%
  left_join(wc_anthroDammed,
            by = "TP_ID")
```

```{r,echo=FALSE}
# Extract dammed TP_IDs as numeric vectors

# WILLOW
# 2019

wc19_damIDs_bvAll <- wcRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID_detDat19_dam19 %>% 
  filter(dam_count_beav_all >= 1) %>% 
  pull(TP_ID)

wc19_damIDs_bvConf <- wcRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID_detDat19_dam19 %>% 
  filter(dam_count_beav_conf >=1) %>% 
  pull(TP_ID)

wc19_damIDs_anthro <- wcRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID_detDat19_dam19 %>% 
  filter(dam_count_ant >=1 |
           isAnthro >=1) %>% 
  pull(TP_ID)

# 2021
wc21_damIDs_bvAll <- wcRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID_detDat21_dam21 %>% 
  filter(dam_count_beav_all >=1) %>% 
  pull(TP_ID)

wc21_damIDs_bvConf <- wcRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID_detDat21_dam21 %>% 
  filter(dam_count_beav_conf >=1) %>% 
  pull(TP_ID)

wc21_damIDs_anthro <- wcRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID_detDat21_dam21 %>% 
  filter(dam_count_ant >=1 |
           isAnthro >=1) %>% 
  pull(TP_ID)

#2023

wc23_damIDs_bvAll <- wcRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID_detDat23_dam23 %>% 
  filter(dam_count_beav_all >=1) %>% 
  pull(TP_ID)

wc23_damIDs_bvConf <- wcRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID_detDat23_dam23 %>% 
  filter(dam_count_beav_conf >=1) %>% 
  pull(TP_ID)

wc23_damIDs_anthro <- wcRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID_detDat23_dam23 %>% 
  filter(dam_count_ant >=1 |
           isAnthro >=1) %>% 
  pull(TP_ID)

```



**Implement DBSCAN:**

    Criteria:
    ---------
      - minDams per Cluster = 1
      - eps = 250-m = 25-TP_ID
      
      - 'Beaver dammed' polygons must be >= 500-m from a 'anthropogenically 
        dammed' polygon to limit the potential confounding effect on beaver v. non.
      
      
      
      
```{r,echo=FALSE}
# HELPER FUNCTION FOR TRIMMING UNDAMMED WINDOWS AFTER PAIRING
# IMPLEMENT AFTER PAIRING/THINNING; BEFORE COMBINING DAMMED AND UNDAMMED DFS

trim_undammed_window <- function(dam_start, dam_end, und_start, und_end, buffer = 25) {
  
  # Case 1: already far enough away → no trimming needed
  if (und_end < dam_start - buffer || und_start > dam_end + buffer) {
    return(c(und_start, und_end))
  }
  
  # Case 2: undammed window overlaps or is too close → trim from the end
  new_end <- min(und_end, dam_start - buffer)
  
  # Prevent inversion (ensure start <= end)
  if (new_end < und_start) {
    new_end <- und_start
  }
  
  c(und_start, new_end)
}

```
      
      
WILLOW
----


**2019**
----

```{r,echo=FALSE}

# Get only elligible beaver dams; those outside the potential impact of anthro impoundments

#Determine 500m buffers up and down from each anthro cluster; NO 'undammed' within this zone
wc19_anthro_influence_500 <- unique(unlist(
  lapply(wc19_damIDs_anthro,
         function(x) seq(x - 75, x + 50))  
))

wc19_damIDs_bvEligible <- wc19_damIDs_bvAll[!wc19_damIDs_bvAll %in% wc19_anthro_influence_500]


# 2. Convert to matrix (dbscan requires matrix input)
wc19_dam_mat <- matrix(wc19_damIDs_bvEligible, ncol = 1)

# 3. Run DBSCAN
wc19_db <- dbscan(
  wc19_dam_mat,
  eps = 25,        #Test with 25 and with 10; bidirectional
  minPts = 1       #min(cluster) = 1 dam; this ensures that isolated dams are still included
)

# 3b. Build a dataframe of dammed rows + cluster IDs
wc19_dammed_df <- wcRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID_detDat19_dam19 %>%
  filter(TP_ID %in% wc19_damIDs_bvEligible) %>%   # only eligible BV dams
  arrange(TP_ID) %>%                              # ensure same order as DBSCAN input
  mutate(clusterID_dbscan = wc19_db$cluster)


# 5. Compute # of dams per cluster
wc19_damClusterCount <- wc19_dammed_df %>%
  filter(dam_count_beav_all == 1) %>%
  count(clusterID_dbscan, name = "cluster_dam_count")

wc19_dammed_df <- wc19_dammed_df %>%
  left_join(wc19_damClusterCount %>%
              st_drop_geometry(), 
            by = "clusterID_dbscan")

# 6. Compute Stream Length per Cluster
wc_streamPerCluster <- wc19_dammed_df %>%
  filter(dam_count_beav_all == 1) %>%
  group_by(clusterID_dbscan) %>%
  summarise(cluster_start = min(TP_ID),
            cluster_end   = max(TP_ID+25),
            cluster_length_TPID = ((cluster_end - cluster_start))*10,
            .groups = "drop"
            ) %>% 
  arrange(cluster_start)  %>%        # downstream → upstream
  mutate(clusterID_seq = row_number()) # make sure that clusterID is in order from downstream to upstream


wc19_dammed_df <- wc19_dammed_df %>%
  left_join(wc_streamPerCluster %>% 
              st_drop_geometry() %>% 
              select(clusterID_dbscan, 
                     clusterID_seq,
                     cluster_start,
                     cluster_end),
            by = "clusterID_dbscan")
```

----


**VISUALIZE DAM CLUSTERS:**


Plot dam clusters for Willow Creek 2019 on a map:


```{r, echo=FALSE,  fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
# Join geometries to polygons with data
wc_dam_map_19 <- wc19_dammed_df %>% 
  st_drop_geometry() %>%      
  left_join(wcRiparianGeometries, by = "TP_ID") %>% 
  st_as_sf()

wc_points_19 <- st_centroid(wc_dam_map_19)


pal <- colorFactor(
  palette = colorRampPalette(RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(12, "Paired"))(length(unique(wc_points_19$clusterID_seq))),
  domain = wc_points_19$clusterID_seq
)

leaflet(wc_points_19) %>%
  addProviderTiles(providers$USGS.USImageryTopo) %>%
  addCircleMarkers(
    radius = 5,
    color = ~pal(clusterID_seq),
    fillOpacity = 0.9,
    stroke = FALSE,
    popup = ~paste0(
      "<b>TP_ID:</b> ", TP_ID, "<br>",
      "<b>Cluster:</b> ", clusterID_seq)
  ) %>%
  addLegend("bottomright", pal = pal, values = wc_points_19$clusterID_seq, title = "Cluster") %>%
  addScaleBar(
    position = "bottomleft",
    options = scaleBarOptions(
      maxWidth = 200,
      metric = TRUE,
      imperial = FALSE,
      updateWhenIdle = TRUE
    )
  )
```

--->

----

----

----

**DEFINE PAIRED UNDAMMED REACHES:**


    - Undammed sample reaches must be:
      - interspersed between dammed reaches
      - (>=) 250m from nearest dam window
        - ensure via 'tail' trim of undammed; post pairing
      - 'paired' with a nearby dam cluster
      - (>=) 250m from nearest undammed 
        - forced thinning post-pairing
      

      
**2019**
----

```{r,echo=FALSE}
wc19_dam_min <- min(wc19_dammed_df$TP_ID) #Find min/max dammed TP_ID to intersperse undammed among
wc19_dam_max <- max(wc19_dammed_df$TP_ID)


#Determine 250m buffers up and down from each dammed cluster; NO 'undammed' start points within this zone
wc19_dam_influence_250 <- unique(unlist(
  apply(
    wc19_dammed_df %>% 
      st_drop_geometry() %>% 
      select(cluster_start, cluster_end),
    1,
    function(row) {
      seq(row["cluster_start"] - 50,
          row["cluster_end"]   + 25)
    }
  )
))
 

#Get all available Riparian Polygons (excludes reservoir-affected)
wc19_all_tpids <- sort(unique(wcRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID_detDat19_dam19$TP_ID))  

#Ensure interspersion of undammed within dammed sites
wc19_inRange_tpids <- wc19_all_tpids[wc19_all_tpids >= wc19_dam_min & wc19_all_tpids <= wc19_dam_max]

#Get only riparian polygons that are not inside the dam or anthro influence zone (cluster+-500m for anthro; cluster+-250m for beav)
wc19_eligible_undammed_tpids <- wc19_inRange_tpids[(!wc19_inRange_tpids %in% wc19_dam_influence_250) &
                                                     (!wc19_inRange_tpids %in% wc19_anthro_influence_500)]

#Get cluster start point for each dammed cluster
wc19_dam_clusters <- wc19_dammed_df %>%
  distinct(clusterID_seq, 
           cluster_start, 
           cluster_end, 
           cluster_dam_count) %>%
  arrange(clusterID_seq)


#PROXIMITY BASED PAIRING
#Define available undammed reaches to sample
wc19_remaining_undammed <- wc19_eligible_undammed_tpids

#Define undammed reaches that have been matched with dammed clusters
wc19_assigned_matches <- integer(nrow(wc19_dam_clusters)) #get 1 undammed for each dammed

# Iterate through dammed clusters
for (i in seq_len(nrow(wc19_dam_clusters))) {
  # find cluster start
  cs <- wc19_dam_clusters$cluster_start[i]
  
  # find nearest remaining undammed site
  idx <- which.min(abs(wc19_remaining_undammed - cs))
  match <- wc19_remaining_undammed[idx]
  
  wc19_assigned_matches[i] <- match
  
  # remove it so it cannot be reused
  wc19_remaining_undammed <- wc19_remaining_undammed[-idx]
}

#Create table to visualize and gut check matches
wc19_pairings <- wc19_dam_clusters %>%
  mutate(undam_match = wc19_assigned_matches) %>%
  left_join(wc19_dammed_df %>%
              group_by(clusterID_seq) %>%
              summarise(dam_window_length_tpid = max(cluster_end) - min(cluster_start),
                        .groups = "drop"),
            by = "clusterID_seq") %>%
  mutate(undam_window_start = undam_match,
         undam_window_end   = undam_match + dam_window_length_tpid
  )

# THIN UNDAMMED WINDOWS *AFTER* WINDOW LENGTH IS KNOWN ---------------

wc19_pairings <- wc19_pairings %>% arrange(undam_window_start)

thinned <- list()
last_end <- -Inf

for (i in seq_len(nrow(wc19_pairings))) {
  start_i <- wc19_pairings$undam_window_start[i]
  end_i   <- wc19_pairings$undam_window_end[i]
  
  if (start_i >= last_end + 25) {   # enforce 250-m spacing
    thinned <- append(thinned, i)   # NOTE: ^ no diff. than 100-m on wc19
    last_end <- end_i
  }
}

wc19_pairings <- wc19_pairings[unlist(thinned), ]


# Enforce STRICT 250m buffer between dammed and undammed
wc19_pairings <- wc19_pairings %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    trimmed = list(
      trim_undammed_window(
        dam_start = cluster_start,
        dam_end   = cluster_end,
        und_start = undam_window_start,
        und_end   = undam_window_end,
        buffer    = 25   # 250 m
      )
    ),
    undam_window_start = trimmed[[1]],
    undam_window_end   = trimmed[[2]]
  ) %>%
  select(-trimmed) %>%
  ungroup()

# Now combine dammed and undammed windows into a unified table and select only those windows from the main dataframe
wc19_dammed_windows <- wc19_pairings %>%
  transmute(
    clusterID_seq,
    window_type = "dammed",
    window_start = cluster_start,
    window_end   = cluster_end,
    window_length = (window_end - window_start)*10,
    dam_intensity = cluster_dam_count
  )

wc19_undammed_windows <- wc19_pairings %>% 
  transmute(
    clusterID_seq,
    window_type = "undammed",
    window_start = undam_window_start,   # trimmed start
    window_end   = undam_window_end,     # trimmed end
    window_length = (undam_window_end - undam_window_start) * 10,
    dam_intensity = 0
  )


wc19_all_windows <- bind_rows(
  wc19_dammed_windows,
  wc19_undammed_windows
)

wc19_sampled <- wcRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID_detDat19_dam19 %>%
  cross_join(wc19_all_windows) %>%   # explicit Cartesian join
  filter(
    TP_ID >= window_start,
    TP_ID <= window_end
  )
```


**Visualize Sample Reaches for Willow Creek 2019:**

```{r, echo=FALSE,warning=FALSE,fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
# Join geometries to polygons with data
wc_samples_19 <- wc19_sampled %>% 
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  left_join(wcRiparianGeometries, by = "TP_ID") %>% 
  st_as_sf() #restore sf class for mapping

wc_SampleReaches_19 <- st_centroid(wc_samples_19)


# Color palette for clusters
cluster_palette <- colorFactor(
  palette = colorRampPalette(RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(12, "Paired"))(60),
  domain = wc_SampleReaches_19$clusterID_seq
)


leaflet(wc_SampleReaches_19) %>%
  addProviderTiles(providers$USGS.USImageryTopo) %>%

  #Undammed (black)
  addCircleMarkers(
    data = subset(wc_SampleReaches_19, window_type == "undammed"),
    radius = 6,
    fillColor = "black",
    fillOpacity = 0.9,
    color = "black",
    weight = 1,
    popup = ~paste0(
      "<b>TP_ID:</b> ", TP_ID, "<br>",
      "<b>Cluster:</b> ", clusterID_seq, "<br>",
      "<b>Type:</b> Undammed"
    )
  ) %>%

  #Dammed (colored by cluster ID)
  addCircleMarkers(
    data = subset(wc_SampleReaches_19, 
                  window_type == "dammed"),
    radius = 6,
    fillColor = ~cluster_palette(clusterID_seq),
    fillOpacity = 0.9,
    color = "black",
    weight = 1,
    popup = ~paste0(
      "<b>TP_ID:</b> ", TP_ID, "<br>",
      "<b>Cluster:</b> ", clusterID_seq, "<br>",
      "<b>Type:</b> Dammed"
    )
  ) %>%
# Legend for dammed clusters only
  addLegend(
    "bottomleft",
    pal = cluster_palette,
    values = subset(wc_SampleReaches_19, window_type == "dammed")$clusterID_seq,
    title = "Dammed Cluster ID"
  ) %>%

  addScaleBar(
    position = "bottomright",
    options = scaleBarOptions(
      maxWidth = 200,
      metric = TRUE,
      imperial = FALSE,
      updateWhenIdle = TRUE
    )
  )
```

**2021**
----

```{r,echo=FALSE}
wc21_dam_min <- min(wc21_dammed_df$TP_ID) #Find min/max dammed TP_ID to intersperse undammed among
wc21_dam_max <- max(wc21_dammed_df$TP_ID)


#Determine 250m buffers up and down from each dammed cluster; NO 'undammed' start points within this zone
wc21_dam_influence_250 <- unique(unlist(
  apply(
    wc21_dammed_df %>% 
      st_drop_geometry() %>% 
      select(cluster_start, cluster_end),
    1,
    function(row) {
      seq(row["cluster_start"] - 50,
          row["cluster_end"]   + 25)
    }
  )
))
 

#Get all available Riparian Polygons (excludes reservoir-affected)
wc21_all_tpids <- sort(unique(wcRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID_detDat21_dam21$TP_ID))  

#Ensure interspersion of undammed within dammed sites
wc21_inRange_tpids <- wc21_all_tpids[wc21_all_tpids >= wc21_dam_min & wc21_all_tpids <= wc21_dam_max]

#Get only riparian polygons that are not inside the dam or anthro influence zone (cluster+-500m, for anthro; cluster+-250m for beav)
wc21_eligible_undammed_tpids <- wc21_inRange_tpids[(!wc21_inRange_tpids %in% wc21_dam_influence_250) &
                                                     (!wc21_inRange_tpids %in% wc21_anthro_influence_500)]

#Get cluster start point for each dammed cluster
wc21_dam_clusters <- wc21_dammed_df %>%
  distinct(clusterID_seq, 
           cluster_start, 
           cluster_end, 
           cluster_dam_count) %>%
  arrange(clusterID_seq)


#PROXIMITY BASED PAIRING
#Define available undammed reaches to sample
wc21_remaining_undammed <- wc21_eligible_undammed_tpids

#Define undammed reaches that have been matched with dammed clusters
wc21_assigned_matches <- integer(nrow(wc21_dam_clusters)) #get 1 undammed for each dammed

# Iterate through dammed clusters
for (i in seq_len(nrow(wc21_dam_clusters))) {
  # find cluster start
  cs <- wc21_dam_clusters$cluster_start[i]
  
  # find nearest remaining undammed site
  idx <- which.min(abs(wc21_remaining_undammed - cs))
  match <- wc21_remaining_undammed[idx]
  
  wc21_assigned_matches[i] <- match
  
  # remove it so it cannot be reused
  wc21_remaining_undammed <- wc21_remaining_undammed[-idx]
}

#Create table to visualize and gut check matches
wc21_pairings <- wc21_dam_clusters %>%
  mutate(undam_match = wc21_assigned_matches) %>%
  left_join(wc21_dammed_df %>%
              group_by(clusterID_seq) %>%
              summarise(dam_window_length_tpid = max(cluster_end) - min(cluster_start),
                        .groups = "drop"),
            by = "clusterID_seq") %>%
  mutate(undam_window_start = undam_match,
         undam_window_end   = undam_match + dam_window_length_tpid
  )

# THIN UNDAMMED WINDOWS *AFTER* WINDOW LENGTH IS KNOWN ---------------

wc21_pairings <- wc21_pairings %>% arrange(undam_window_start)

thinned <- list()
last_end <- -Inf

for (i in seq_len(nrow(wc21_pairings))) {
  start_i <- wc21_pairings$undam_window_start[i]
  end_i   <- wc21_pairings$undam_window_end[i]
  
  if (start_i >= last_end + 25) {   # enforce 250-m spacing
    thinned <- append(thinned, i)   # NOTE: ^ no diff. than 100-m on wc21
    last_end <- end_i
  }
}

wc21_pairings <- wc21_pairings[unlist(thinned), ]


# Enforce STRICT 250m buffer between dammed and undammed
wc21_pairings <- wc21_pairings %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    trimmed = list(
      trim_undammed_window(
        dam_start = cluster_start,
        dam_end   = cluster_end,
        und_start = undam_window_start,
        und_end   = undam_window_end,
        buffer    = 25   # 250 m
      )
    ),
    undam_window_start = trimmed[[1]],
    undam_window_end   = trimmed[[2]]
  ) %>%
  select(-trimmed) %>%
  ungroup()

# Now combine dammed and undammed windows into a unified table and select only those windows from the main dataframe
wc21_dammed_windows <- wc21_pairings %>%
  transmute(
    clusterID_seq,
    window_type = "dammed",
    window_start = cluster_start,
    window_end   = cluster_end,
    window_length = (window_end - window_start)*10,
    dam_intensity = cluster_dam_count
  )

wc21_undammed_windows <- wc21_pairings %>% 
  transmute(
    clusterID_seq,
    window_type = "undammed",
    window_start = undam_window_start,   # trimmed start
    window_end   = undam_window_end,     # trimmed end
    window_length = (undam_window_end - undam_window_start) * 10,
    dam_intensity = 0
  )


wc21_all_windows <- bind_rows(
  wc21_dammed_windows,
  wc21_undammed_windows
)

wc21_sampled <- wcRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID_detDat21_dam21 %>%
  cross_join(wc21_all_windows) %>%   # explicit Cartesian join
  filter(
    TP_ID >= window_start,
    TP_ID <= window_end
  )
```

```{r,echo=FALSE}
                        .groups = "drop"),

  mutate(undam_window_start = undam_match,

# THIN UNDAMMED WINDOWS *AFTER* WINDOW LENGTH IS KNOWN ---------------

  end_i   <- wc23_pairings$undam_window_end[i]

    last_end <- end_i
  }
}

# Enforce STRICT 250m buffer between dammed and undammed

  rowwise() %>%
```

LONE TREE
----


**2019**
----

```{r,echo=FALSE}

# Get only elligible beaver dams; those outside the potential impact of anthro impoundments

#Determine 500m buffers up and down from each anthro cluster; NO 'dammed'/'undammed' within this zone
lt19_anthro_influence_500 <- unique(unlist(
  lapply(lt19_damIDs_anthro,
         function(x) seq(x - 75, x + 50))  
))

lt19_damIDs_bvEligible <- lt19_damIDs_bvAll[!lt19_damIDs_bvAll %in% lt19_anthro_influence_500]


# 2. Convert to matrix (dbscan requires matrix input)
lt19_dam_mat <- matrix(lt19_damIDs_bvEligible, ncol = 1)

# 3. Run DBSCAN
lt19_db <- dbscan(
  lt19_dam_mat,
  eps = 25,        #Test with 25 and with 10; bidirectional
  minPts = 1       #min(cluster) = 1 dam; this ensures that isolated dams are still included
)

# 3b. Build a dataframe of dammed rows + cluster IDs
lt19_dammed_df <- ltRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID_detDat19_dam19 %>%
  filter(TP_ID %in% lt19_damIDs_bvEligible) %>%   # only eligible BV dams
  arrange(TP_ID) %>%                              # ensure same order as DBSCAN input
  mutate(clusterID_dbscan = lt19_db$cluster)


# 5. Compute # of dams per cluster
lt19_damClusterCount <- lt19_dammed_df %>%
  filter(dam_count_beav_all == 1) %>%
  count(clusterID_dbscan, name = "cluster_dam_count")

lt19_dammed_df <- lt19_dammed_df %>%
  left_join(lt19_damClusterCount %>%
              st_drop_geometry(), 
            by = "clusterID_dbscan")

# 6. Compute Stream Length per Cluster
lt_streamPerCluster <- lt19_dammed_df %>%
  filter(dam_count_beav_all == 1) %>%
  group_by(clusterID_dbscan) %>%
  summarise(cluster_start = min(TP_ID),
            cluster_end   = max(TP_ID+25),
            cluster_length_TPID = ((cluster_end - cluster_start))*10,
            .groups = "drop"
            ) %>% 
  arrange(cluster_start)  %>%        # downstream → upstream
  mutate(clusterID_seq = row_number()) # make sure that clusterID is in order from downstream to upstream


lt19_dammed_df <- lt19_dammed_df %>%
  left_join(lt_streamPerCluster %>% 
              st_drop_geometry() %>% 
              select(clusterID_dbscan, 
                     clusterID_seq,
                     cluster_start,
                     cluster_end),
            by = "clusterID_dbscan")
```

----


**VISUALIZE DAM CLUSTERS:**


Plot sample regions for Willow Creek 2019 on a map:


```{r, echo=FALSE,  fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
# Join geometries to polygons with data
lt_dam_map_19 <- lt19_dammed_df %>% 
  st_drop_geometry() %>%      
  left_join(ltRiparianGeometries, by = "TP_ID") %>% 
  st_as_sf()

lt_points_19 <- st_centroid(lt_dam_map_19)


pal <- colorFactor(
  palette = colorRampPalette(RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(12, "Paired"))(length(unique(lt_points_19$clusterID_seq))),
  domain = lt_points_19$clusterID_seq
)

leaflet(lt_points_19) %>%
  addProviderTiles(providers$USGS.USImageryTopo) %>%
  addCircleMarkers(
    radius = 5,
    color = ~pal(clusterID_seq),
    fillOpacity = 0.9,
    stroke = FALSE,
    popup = ~paste0(
      "<b>TP_ID:</b> ", TP_ID, "<br>",
      "<b>Cluster:</b> ", clusterID_seq)
  ) %>%
  addLegend("bottomright", pal = pal, values = lt_points_19$clusterID_seq, title = "Cluster") %>%
  addScaleBar(
    position = "bottomleft",
    options = scaleBarOptions(
      maxWidth = 200,
      metric = TRUE,
      imperial = FALSE,
      updateWhenIdle = TRUE
    )
  )
```

**2021**
----
      
```{r,echo=FALSE}

# Get only elligible beaver dams; those outside the potential impact of anthro impoundments

#Determine 500m buffers up and down from each anthro cluster; NO 'dammed'/'undammed' within this zone
lt21_anthro_influence_500 <- unique(unlist(
  lapply(lt21_damIDs_anthro,
         function(x) seq(x - 75, x + 50))  
))

lt21_damIDs_bvEligible <- lt21_damIDs_bvAll[!lt21_damIDs_bvAll %in% lt21_anthro_influence_500]


# 2. Convert to matrix (dbscan requires matrix input)
lt21_dam_mat <- matrix(lt21_damIDs_bvEligible, ncol = 1)

# 3. Run DBSCAN
lt21_db <- dbscan(
  lt21_dam_mat,
  eps = 25,        #Test with 25 and with 10; bidirectional
  minPts = 1       #min(cluster) = 1 dam; this ensures that isolated dams are still included
)

# 3b. Build a dataframe of dammed rows + cluster IDs
lt21_dammed_df <- ltRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID_detDat21_dam21 %>%
  filter(TP_ID %in% lt21_damIDs_bvEligible) %>%   # only eligible BV dams
  arrange(TP_ID) %>%                              # ensure same order as DBSCAN input
  mutate(clusterID_dbscan = lt21_db$cluster)


# 5. Compute # of dams per cluster
lt21_damClusterCount <- lt21_dammed_df %>%
  filter(dam_count_beav_all == 1) %>%
  count(clusterID_dbscan, name = "cluster_dam_count")

lt21_dammed_df <- lt21_dammed_df %>%
  left_join(lt21_damClusterCount %>%
              st_drop_geometry(), 
            by = "clusterID_dbscan")

# 6. Compute Stream Length per Cluster
lt_streamPerCluster <- lt21_dammed_df %>%
  filter(dam_count_beav_all == 1) %>%
  group_by(clusterID_dbscan) %>%
  summarise(cluster_start = min(TP_ID),
            cluster_end   = max(TP_ID+25),
            cluster_length_TPID = ((cluster_end - cluster_start))*10,
            .groups = "drop"
            ) %>% 
  arrange(cluster_start)  %>%        # downstream → upstream
  mutate(clusterID_seq = row_number()) # make sure that clusterID is in order from downstream to upstream


lt21_dammed_df <- lt21_dammed_df %>%
  left_join(lt_streamPerCluster %>% 
              st_drop_geometry() %>% 
              select(clusterID_dbscan, 
                     clusterID_seq,
                     cluster_start,
                     cluster_end),
            by = "clusterID_dbscan")
```

----


**VISUALIZE DAM CLUSTERS:**


 Plot sample regions for Willow Creek 2021 on a map:


```{r, echo=FALSE,  fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
# Join geometries to polygons with data
lt_dam_map_21 <- lt21_dammed_df %>% 
  st_drop_geometry() %>%      
  left_join(ltRiparianGeometries, by = "TP_ID") %>% 
  st_as_sf()

lt_points_21 <- st_centroid(lt_dam_map_21)


pal <- colorFactor(
  palette = colorRampPalette(RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(12, "Paired"))(length(unique(lt_points_21$clusterID_seq))),
  domain = lt_points_21$clusterID_seq
)

leaflet(lt_points_21) %>%
  addProviderTiles(providers$USGS.USImageryTopo) %>%
  addCircleMarkers(
    radius = 5,
    color = ~pal(clusterID_seq),
    fillOpacity = 0.9,
    stroke = FALSE,
    popup = ~paste0(
      "<b>TP_ID:</b> ", TP_ID, "<br>",
      "<b>Cluster:</b> ", clusterID_seq)
  ) %>%
  addLegend("bottomright", pal = pal, values = lt_points_21$clusterID_seq, title = "Cluster") %>%
  addScaleBar(
    position = "bottomleft",
    options = scaleBarOptions(
      maxWidth = 200,
      metric = TRUE,
      imperial = FALSE,
      updateWhenIdle = TRUE
    )
  )
```


**2023**
----

```{r,echo=FALSE}

# Get only elligible beaver dams; those outside the potential impact of anthro impoundments

#Determine 500m buffers up and down from each anthro cluster; NO 'dammed'/'undammed' within this zone
lt23_anthro_influence_500 <- unique(unlist(
  lapply(lt23_damIDs_anthro,
         function(x) seq(x - 75, x + 50))  
))

lt23_damIDs_bvEligible <- lt23_damIDs_bvAll[!lt23_damIDs_bvAll %in% lt23_anthro_influence_500]


# 2. Convert to matrix (dbscan requires matrix input)
lt23_dam_mat <- matrix(lt23_damIDs_bvEligible, ncol = 1)

# 3. Run DBSCAN
lt23_db <- dbscan(
  lt23_dam_mat,
  eps = 25,        #Test with 25 and with 10; bidirectional
  minPts = 1       #min(cluster) = 1 dam; this ensures that isolated dams are still included
)

# 3b. Build a dataframe of dammed rows + cluster IDs
lt23_dammed_df <- ltRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID_detDat23_dam23 %>%
  filter(TP_ID %in% lt23_damIDs_bvEligible) %>%   # only eligible BV dams
  arrange(TP_ID) %>%                              # ensure same order as DBSCAN input
  mutate(clusterID_dbscan = lt23_db$cluster)


# 5. Compute # of dams per cluster
lt23_damClusterCount <- lt23_dammed_df %>%
  filter(dam_count_beav_all == 1) %>%
  count(clusterID_dbscan, name = "cluster_dam_count")

lt23_dammed_df <- lt23_dammed_df %>%
  left_join(lt23_damClusterCount %>%
              st_drop_geometry(), 
            by = "clusterID_dbscan")

# 6. Compute Stream Length per Cluster
lt_streamPerCluster <- lt23_dammed_df %>%
  filter(dam_count_beav_all == 1) %>%
  group_by(clusterID_dbscan) %>%
  summarise(cluster_start = min(TP_ID),
            cluster_end   = max(TP_ID+25),
            cluster_length_TPID = ((cluster_end - cluster_start))*10,
            .groups = "drop"
            ) %>% 
  arrange(cluster_start)  %>%        # downstream → upstream
  mutate(clusterID_seq = row_number()) # make sure that clusterID is in order from downstream to upstream


lt23_dammed_df <- lt23_dammed_df %>%
  left_join(lt_streamPerCluster %>% 
              st_drop_geometry() %>% 
              select(clusterID_dbscan, 
                     clusterID_seq,
                     cluster_start,
                     cluster_end),
            by = "clusterID_dbscan")
```

```{r, echo=FALSE,  fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
      metric = TRUE,
      imperial = FALSE,
      updateWhenIdle = TRUE
    )
  )
```

--->

----

----

----

**DEFINE PAIRED UNDAMMED REACHES:**


    - Undammed sample reaches must be:
      - interspersed between dammed reaches
      - (>=) 250m from nearest dam
      - 'paired' with a nearby dam cluster
      - (>=) 250m from nearest undammed (forced thinning post-pairing)
      

      
**2019**
----

```{r,echo=FALSE}
lt19_dam_min <- min(lt19_dammed_df$TP_ID) #Find min/max dammed TP_ID to intersperse undammed among
lt19_dam_max <- max(lt19_dammed_df$TP_ID)


#Determine 250m buffers up and down from each dammed cluster; NO 'undammed' start points within this zone
lt19_dam_influence_250 <- unique(unlist(
  apply(
    lt19_dammed_df %>% 
      st_drop_geometry() %>% 
      select(cluster_start, cluster_end),
    1,
    function(row) {
      seq(row["cluster_start"] - 50,
          row["cluster_end"]   + 25)
    }
  )
))
 

#Get all available Riparian Polygons (excludes reservoir-affected)
lt19_all_tpids <- sort(unique(ltRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID_detDat19_dam19$TP_ID))  

#Ensure interspersion of undammed within dammed sites
lt19_inRange_tpids <- lt19_all_tpids[lt19_all_tpids >= lt19_dam_min & lt19_all_tpids <= lt19_dam_max]

#Get only riparian polygons that are not inside the dam or anthro influence zone (cluster+-500m, for anthro; cluster+-250m for beav)
lt19_eligible_undammed_tpids <- lt19_inRange_tpids[(!lt19_inRange_tpids %in% lt19_dam_influence_250) &
                                                     (!lt19_inRange_tpids %in% lt19_anthro_influence_500)]

#Get cluster start point for each dammed cluster
lt19_dam_clusters <- lt19_dammed_df %>%
  distinct(clusterID_seq, 
           cluster_start, 
           cluster_end, 
           cluster_dam_count) %>%
  arrange(clusterID_seq)


#PROXIMITY BASED PAIRING
#Define available undammed reaches to sample
lt19_remaining_undammed <- lt19_eligible_undammed_tpids

#Define undammed reaches that have been matched with dammed clusters
lt19_assigned_matches <- integer(nrow(lt19_dam_clusters)) #get 1 undammed for each dammed

# Iterate through dammed clusters
for (i in seq_len(nrow(lt19_dam_clusters))) {
  # find cluster start
  cs <- lt19_dam_clusters$cluster_start[i]
  
  # find nearest remaining undammed site
  idx <- which.min(abs(lt19_remaining_undammed - cs))
  match <- lt19_remaining_undammed[idx]
  
  lt19_assigned_matches[i] <- match
  
  # remove it so it cannot be reused
  lt19_remaining_undammed <- lt19_remaining_undammed[-idx]
}

#Create table to visualize and gut check matches
lt19_pairings <- lt19_dam_clusters %>%
  mutate(undam_match = lt19_assigned_matches) %>%
  left_join(lt19_dammed_df %>%
              group_by(clusterID_seq) %>%
              summarise(dam_window_length_tpid = max(cluster_end) - min(cluster_start),
                        .groups = "drop"),
            by = "clusterID_seq") %>%
  mutate(undam_window_start = undam_match,
         undam_window_end   = undam_match + dam_window_length_tpid
  )

# THIN UNDAMMED WINDOWS *AFTER* WINDOW LENGTH IS KNOWN ---------------

lt19_pairings <- lt19_pairings %>% arrange(undam_window_start)

thinned <- list()
last_end <- -Inf

for (i in seq_len(nrow(lt19_pairings))) {
  start_i <- lt19_pairings$undam_window_start[i]
  end_i   <- lt19_pairings$undam_window_end[i]
  
  if (start_i >= last_end + 25) {   # enforce 250-m spacing
    thinned <- append(thinned, i)   # NOTE: ^ no diff. than 100-m on lt19
    last_end <- end_i
  }
}

lt19_pairings <- lt19_pairings[unlist(thinned), ]


# Enforce STRICT 250m buffer between dammed and undammed
lt19_pairings <- lt19_pairings %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    trimmed = list(
      trim_undammed_window(
        dam_start = cluster_start,
        dam_end   = cluster_end,
        und_start = undam_window_start,
        und_end   = undam_window_end,
        buffer    = 25   # 250 m
      )
    ),
    undam_window_start = trimmed[[1]],
    undam_window_end   = trimmed[[2]]
  ) %>%
  select(-trimmed) %>%
  ungroup()

# Now combine dammed and undammed windows into a unified table and select only those windows from the main dataframe
lt19_dammed_windows <- lt19_pairings %>%
  transmute(
    clusterID_seq,
    window_type = "dammed",
    window_start = cluster_start,
    window_end   = cluster_end,
    window_length = (window_end - window_start)*10,
    dam_intensity = cluster_dam_count
  )

lt19_undammed_windows <- lt19_pairings %>% 
  transmute(
    clusterID_seq,
    window_type = "undammed",
    window_start = undam_window_start,   # trimmed start
    window_end   = undam_window_end,     # trimmed end
    window_length = (undam_window_end - undam_window_start) * 10,
    dam_intensity = 0
  )


lt19_all_windows <- bind_rows(
  lt19_dammed_windows,
  lt19_undammed_windows
)

lt19_sampled <- ltRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID_detDat19_dam19 %>%
  cross_join(lt19_all_windows) %>%   # explicit Cartesian join
  filter(
    TP_ID >= window_start,
    TP_ID <= window_end
  )
```


**Visualize Sample Reaches for Lone Tree Creek 2019:**

```{r, echo=FALSE,warning=FALSE,fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
# Join geometries to polygons with data
lt_samples_19 <- lt19_sampled %>% 
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  left_join(ltRiparianGeometries, by = "TP_ID") %>% 
  st_as_sf() #restore sf class for mapping

lt_SampleReaches_19 <- st_centroid(lt_samples_19)


# Color palette for clusters
cluster_palette <- colorFactor(
  palette = colorRampPalette(RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(12, "Paired"))(60),
  domain = lt_SampleReaches_19$clusterID_seq
)


leaflet(lt_SampleReaches_19) %>%
  addProviderTiles(providers$USGS.USImageryTopo) %>%

  #Undammed (black)
  addCircleMarkers(
    data = subset(lt_SampleReaches_19, window_type == "undammed"),
    radius = 6,
    fillColor = "black",
    fillOpacity = 0.9,
    color = "black",
    weight = 1,
    popup = ~paste0(
      "<b>TP_ID:</b> ", TP_ID, "<br>",
      "<b>Cluster:</b> ", clusterID_seq, "<br>",
      "<b>Type:</b> Undammed"
    )
  ) %>%

  #Dammed (colored by cluster ID)
  addCircleMarkers(
    data = subset(lt_SampleReaches_19, 
                  window_type == "dammed"),
    radius = 6,
    fillColor = ~cluster_palette(clusterID_seq),
    fillOpacity = 0.9,
    color = "black",
    weight = 1,
    popup = ~paste0(
      "<b>TP_ID:</b> ", TP_ID, "<br>",
      "<b>Cluster:</b> ", clusterID_seq, "<br>",
      "<b>Type:</b> Dammed"
    )
  ) %>%
# Legend for dammed clusters only
  addLegend(
    "bottomleft",
    pal = cluster_palette,
    values = subset(lt_SampleReaches_19, window_type == "dammed")$clusterID_seq,
    title = "Dammed Cluster ID"
  ) %>%

  addScaleBar(
    position = "bottomright",
    options = scaleBarOptions(
      maxWidth = 200,
      metric = TRUE,
      imperial = FALSE,
      updateWhenIdle = TRUE
    )
  )

```

```{r,echo=FALSE}
length(lt19_pairings$clusterID_seq)
```

```{r,echo=FALSE}
lt23_pairings <- lt23_pairings[unlist(thinned), ]


# Enforce STRICT 250m buffer between dammed and undammed
lt23_pairings <- lt23_pairings %>%
  rowwise() %>%

    trimmed = list(

        dam_start = cluster_start,

  select(-trimmed) %>%
  ungroup()

# Now combine dammed and undammed windows into a unified table and select only those windows from the main dataframe
lt23_dammed_windows <- lt23_pairings %>%
  transmute(
    clusterID_seq,
    window_type = "dammed",
    window_start = cluster_start,
    window_end   = cluster_end,
    window_length = (window_end - window_start)*10,
    dam_intensity = cluster_dam_count
  )

lt23_undammed_windows <- lt23_pairings %>% 
  transmute(
    clusterID_seq,
    window_type = "undammed",
    window_start = undam_window_start,   # trimmed start
    window_end   = undam_window_end,     # trimmed end
    window_length = (undam_window_end - undam_window_start) * 10,
    dam_intensity = 0
  )


lt23_all_windows <- bind_rows(
  lt23_dammed_windows,
  lt23_undammed_windows
)

lt23_sampled <- ltRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID_detDat23_dam23 %>%
  cross_join(lt23_all_windows) %>%   # explicit Cartesian join
  filter(
    TP_ID >= window_start,
    TP_ID <= window_end
  )
```


**Visualize Sample Reaches for Lone Tree Creek 2023:**

```{r, echo=FALSE,warning=FALSE,fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
# Join geometries to polygons with data
lt_samples_23 <- lt23_sampled %>% 
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  left_join(ltRiparianGeometries, by = "TP_ID") %>% 
  st_as_sf() #restore sf class for mapping

lt_SampleReaches_23 <- st_centroid(lt_samples_23)


# Color palette for clusters
cluster_palette <- colorFactor(
  palette = colorRampPalette(RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(12, "Paired"))(60),
  domain = lt_SampleReaches_23$clusterID_seq
)


leaflet(lt_SampleReaches_23) %>%
  addProviderTiles(providers$USGS.USImageryTopo) %>%

  #Undammed (black)
  addCircleMarkers(
    data = subset(lt_SampleReaches_23, window_type == "undammed"),
    radius = 6,
    fillColor = "black",
    fillOpacity = 0.9,
    color = "black",
    weight = 1,
    popup = ~paste0(
      "<b>TP_ID:</b> ", TP_ID, "<br>",
      "<b>Cluster:</b> ", clusterID_seq, "<br>",
      "<b>Type:</b> Undammed"
    )
  ) %>%

  #Dammed (colored by cluster ID)
  addCircleMarkers(
    data = subset(lt_SampleReaches_23, 
                  window_type == "dammed"),
    radius = 6,
    fillColor = ~cluster_palette(clusterID_seq),
    fillOpacity = 0.9,
    color = "black",
    weight = 1,
    popup = ~paste0(
      "<b>TP_ID:</b> ", TP_ID, "<br>",
      "<b>Cluster:</b> ", clusterID_seq, "<br>",
      "<b>Type:</b> Dammed"
    )
  ) %>%
# Legend for dammed clusters only
  addLegend(
    "bottomleft",
    pal = cluster_palette,
    values = subset(lt_SampleReaches_23, window_type == "dammed")$clusterID_seq,
    title = "Dammed Cluster ID"
  ) %>%

  addScaleBar(
    position = "bottomright",
    options = scaleBarOptions(
      maxWidth = 200,
      metric = TRUE,
      imperial = FALSE,
      updateWhenIdle = TRUE
    )
  )
```

----

BRAZIL
----


**2019**
----

```{r,echo=FALSE}

# Get only elligible beaver dams; those outside the potential impact of anthro impoundments

#Determine 500m buffers up and down from each anthro cluster; NO 'dammed'/'undammed' within this zone
brz19_anthro_influence_500 <- unique(unlist(
  lapply(brz19_damIDs_anthro,
         function(x) seq(x - 75, x + 50))  
))

brz19_damIDs_bvEligible <- brz19_damIDs_bvAll[!brz19_damIDs_bvAll %in% brz19_anthro_influence_500]


# 2. Convert to matrix (dbscan requires matrix input)
brz19_dam_mat <- matrix(brz19_damIDs_bvEligible, ncol = 1)

# 3. Run DBSCAN
brz19_db <- dbscan(
  brz19_dam_mat,
  eps = 25,        #Test with 25 and with 10; bidirectional
  minPts = 1       #min(cluster) = 1 dam; this ensures that isolated dams are still included
)

# 3b. Build a dataframe of dammed rows + cluster IDs
brz19_dammed_df <- brzRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID_detDat19_dam19 %>%
  filter(TP_ID %in% brz19_damIDs_bvEligible) %>%   # only eligible BV dams
  arrange(TP_ID) %>%                              # ensure same order as DBSCAN input
  mutate(clusterID_dbscan = brz19_db$cluster)


# 5. Compute # of dams per cluster
brz19_damClusterCount <- brz19_dammed_df %>%
  filter(dam_count_beav_all == 1) %>%
  count(clusterID_dbscan, name = "cluster_dam_count")

brz19_dammed_df <- brz19_dammed_df %>%
  left_join(brz19_damClusterCount %>%
              st_drop_geometry(), 
            by = "clusterID_dbscan")

# 6. Compute Stream Length per Cluster
brz_streamPerCluster <- brz19_dammed_df %>%
  filter(dam_count_beav_all == 1) %>%
  group_by(clusterID_dbscan) %>%
  summarise(cluster_start = min(TP_ID),
            cluster_end   = max(TP_ID+25),
            cluster_length_TPID = ((cluster_end - cluster_start))*10,
            .groups = "drop"
            ) %>% 
  arrange(cluster_start)  %>%        # downstream → upstream
  mutate(clusterID_seq = row_number()) # make sure that clusterID is in order from downstream to upstream


brz19_dammed_df <- brz19_dammed_df %>%
  left_join(brz_streamPerCluster %>% 
              st_drop_geometry() %>% 
              select(clusterID_dbscan, 
                     clusterID_seq,
                     cluster_start,
                     cluster_end),
            by = "clusterID_dbscan")
```

```{r, echo=FALSE,  fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
  palette = colorRampPalette(RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(12, "Paired"))(length(unique(brz_points_19$clusterID_seq))),
  domain = brz_points_19$clusterID_seq
)

leaflet(brz_points_19) %>%
  addProviderTiles(providers$USGS.USImageryTopo) %>%
  addCircleMarkers(
    radius = 5,
    color = ~pal(clusterID_seq),
    fillOpacity = 0.9,
    stroke = FALSE,
    popup = ~paste0(
      "<b>TP_ID:</b> ", TP_ID, "<br>",
      "<b>Cluster:</b> ", clusterID_seq)
  ) %>%
  addLegend("bottomright", pal = pal, values = brz_points_19$clusterID_seq, title = "Cluster") %>%

    position = "bottomleft",
    options = scaleBarOptions(
      maxWidth = 200,
      metric = TRUE,
      imperial = FALSE,
      updateWhenIdle = TRUE
    )
  )
```

--->

----

----

----

**DEFINE PAIRED UNDAMMED REACHES:**


    - Undammed sample reaches must be:
      - interspersed between dammed reaches
      - (>=) 250m from nearest dam
      - 'paired' with a nearby dam cluster
      - (>=) 250m from nearest undammed (forced thinning post-pairing)
      

      
**2019**
----

```{r,echo=FALSE}
brz19_dam_min <- min(brz19_dammed_df$TP_ID) #Find min/max dammed TP_ID to intersperse undammed among
brz19_dam_max <- max(brz19_dammed_df$TP_ID)


#Determine 250m buffers up and down from each dammed cluster; NO 'undammed' start points within this zone
brz19_dam_influence_250 <- unique(unlist(
  apply(
    brz19_dammed_df %>% 
      st_drop_geometry() %>% 
      select(cluster_start, cluster_end),
    1,
    function(row) {
      seq(row["cluster_start"] - 50,
          row["cluster_end"]   + 25)
    }
  )
))
 

#Get all available Riparian Polygons (excludes reservoir-affected)
brz19_all_tpids <- sort(unique(brzRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID_detDat19_dam19$TP_ID))  

#Ensure interspersion of undammed within dammed sites
brz19_inRange_tpids <- brz19_all_tpids[brz19_all_tpids >= brz19_dam_min & brz19_all_tpids <= brz19_dam_max]

#Get only riparian polygons that are not inside the dam or anthro influence zone (cluster+-500m, for anthro; cluster+-250m for beav)
brz19_eligible_undammed_tpids <- brz19_inRange_tpids[(!brz19_inRange_tpids %in% brz19_dam_influence_250) &
                                                     (!brz19_inRange_tpids %in% brz19_anthro_influence_500)]

#Get cluster start point for each dammed cluster
brz19_dam_clusters <- brz19_dammed_df %>%
  distinct(clusterID_seq, 
           cluster_start, 
           cluster_end, 
           cluster_dam_count) %>%
  arrange(clusterID_seq)


#PROXIMITY BASED PAIRING
#Define available undammed reaches to sample
brz19_remaining_undammed <- brz19_eligible_undammed_tpids

#Define undammed reaches that have been matched with dammed clusters
brz19_assigned_matches <- integer(nrow(brz19_dam_clusters)) #get 1 undammed for each dammed

# Iterate through dammed clusters
for (i in seq_len(nrow(brz19_dam_clusters))) {
  # find cluster start
  cs <- brz19_dam_clusters$cluster_start[i]
  
  # find nearest remaining undammed site
  idx <- which.min(abs(brz19_remaining_undammed - cs))
  match <- brz19_remaining_undammed[idx]
  
  brz19_assigned_matches[i] <- match
  
  # remove it so it cannot be reused
  brz19_remaining_undammed <- brz19_remaining_undammed[-idx]
}

#Create table to visualize and gut check matches
brz19_pairings <- brz19_dam_clusters %>%
  mutate(undam_match = brz19_assigned_matches) %>%
  left_join(brz19_dammed_df %>%
              group_by(clusterID_seq) %>%
              summarise(dam_window_length_tpid = max(cluster_end) - min(cluster_start),
                        .groups = "drop"),
            by = "clusterID_seq") %>%
  mutate(undam_window_start = undam_match,
         undam_window_end   = undam_match + dam_window_length_tpid
  )

# THIN UNDAMMED WINDOWS *AFTER* WINDOW LENGTH IS KNOWN ---------------

brz19_pairings <- brz19_pairings %>% arrange(undam_window_start)

thinned <- list()
last_end <- -Inf

for (i in seq_len(nrow(brz19_pairings))) {
  start_i <- brz19_pairings$undam_window_start[i]
  end_i   <- brz19_pairings$undam_window_end[i]
  
  if (start_i >= last_end + 25) {   # enforce 250-m spacing
    thinned <- append(thinned, i)   # NOTE: ^ no diff. than 100-m on brz19
    last_end <- end_i
  }
}

brz19_pairings <- brz19_pairings[unlist(thinned), ]


# Enforce STRICT 250m buffer between dammed and undammed
brz19_pairings <- brz19_pairings %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    trimmed = list(
      trim_undammed_window(
        dam_start = cluster_start,
        dam_end   = cluster_end,
        und_start = undam_window_start,
        und_end   = undam_window_end,
        buffer    = 25   # 250 m
      )
    ),
    undam_window_start = trimmed[[1]],
    undam_window_end   = trimmed[[2]]
  ) %>%
  select(-trimmed) %>%
  ungroup()

# Now combine dammed and undammed windows into a unified table and select only those windows from the main dataframe
brz19_dammed_windows <- brz19_pairings %>%
  transmute(
    clusterID_seq,
    window_type = "dammed",
    window_start = cluster_start,
    window_end   = cluster_end,
    window_length = (window_end - window_start)*10,
    dam_intensity = cluster_dam_count
  )

brz19_undammed_windows <- brz19_pairings %>% 
  transmute(
    clusterID_seq,
    window_type = "undammed",
    window_start = undam_window_start,   # trimmed start
    window_end   = undam_window_end,     # trimmed end
    window_length = (undam_window_end - undam_window_start) * 10,
    dam_intensity = 0
  )


brz19_all_windows <- bind_rows(
  brz19_dammed_windows,
  brz19_undammed_windows
)

brz19_sampled <- brzRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID_detDat19_dam19 %>%
  cross_join(brz19_all_windows) %>%   # explicit Cartesian join
  filter(
    TP_ID >= window_start,
    TP_ID <= window_end
  )
```


**Visualize Sample Reaches for Brazil Creek 2019:**

```{r, echo=FALSE,warning=FALSE,fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
# Join geometries to polygons with data
brz_samples_19 <- brz19_sampled %>% 
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  left_join(brzRiparianGeometries, by = "TP_ID") %>% 
  st_as_sf() #restore sf class for mapping

brz_SampleReaches_19 <- st_centroid(brz_samples_19)


# Color palette for clusters
cluster_palette <- colorFactor(
  palette = colorRampPalette(RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(12, "Paired"))(90),
  domain = brz_SampleReaches_19$clusterID_seq
)


leaflet(brz_SampleReaches_19) %>%
  addProviderTiles(providers$USGS.USImageryTopo) %>%

  #Undammed (black)
  addCircleMarkers(
    data = subset(brz_SampleReaches_19, window_type == "undammed"),
    radius = 6,
    fillColor = "black",
    fillOpacity = 0.9,
    color = "black",
    weight = 1,
    popup = ~paste0(
      "<b>TP_ID:</b> ", TP_ID, "<br>",
      "<b>Cluster:</b> ", clusterID_seq, "<br>",
      "<b>Type:</b> Undammed"
    )
  ) %>%

  #Dammed (colored by cluster ID)
  addCircleMarkers(
    data = subset(brz_SampleReaches_19, 
                  window_type == "dammed"),
    radius = 6,
    fillColor = ~cluster_palette(clusterID_seq),
    fillOpacity = 0.9,
    color = "black",
    weight = 1,
    popup = ~paste0(
      "<b>TP_ID:</b> ", TP_ID, "<br>",
      "<b>Cluster:</b> ", clusterID_seq, "<br>",
      "<b>Type:</b> Dammed"
    )
  ) %>%
# Legend for dammed clusters only
  addLegend(
    "bottomleft",
    pal = cluster_palette,
    values = subset(brz_SampleReaches_19, window_type == "dammed")$clusterID_seq,
    title = "Dammed Cluster ID"
  ) %>%

  addScaleBar(
    position = "bottomright",
    options = scaleBarOptions(
      maxWidth = 200,
      metric = TRUE,
      imperial = FALSE,
      updateWhenIdle = TRUE
    )
  )
```

```{r,echo=FALSE}
  distinct(clusterID_seq, 
           cluster_start,

#PROXIMITY BASED PAIRING
#Define available undammed reaches to sample
brz21_remaining_undammed <- brz21_eligible_undammed_tpids

#Define undammed reaches that have been matched with dammed clusters
brz21_assigned_matches <- integer(nrow(brz21_dam_clusters)) #get 1 undammed for each dammed

# Iterate through dammed clusters
for (i in seq_len(nrow(brz21_dam_clusters))) {
  # find cluster start
  cs <- brz21_dam_clusters$cluster_start[i]
  
  # find nearest remaining undammed site
  idx <- which.min(abs(brz21_remaining_undammed - cs))
  match <- brz21_remaining_undammed[idx]
  
  brz21_assigned_matches[i] <- match
  
  # remove it so it cannot be reused
  brz21_remaining_undammed <- brz21_remaining_undammed[-idx]
}

#Create table to visualize and gut check matches
brz21_pairings <- brz21_dam_clusters %>%
  mutate(undam_match = brz21_assigned_matches) %>%
  left_join(brz21_dammed_df %>%
              group_by(clusterID_seq) %>%
              summarise(dam_window_length_tpid = max(cluster_end) - min(cluster_start),
                        .groups = "drop"),
            by = "clusterID_seq") %>%
  mutate(undam_window_start = undam_match,
         undam_window_end   = undam_match + dam_window_length_tpid
  )

# THIN UNDAMMED WINDOWS *AFTER* WINDOW LENGTH IS KNOWN ---------------

brz21_pairings <- brz21_pairings %>% arrange(undam_window_start)

thinned <- list()
last_end <- -Inf

for (i in seq_len(nrow(brz21_pairings))) {
  start_i <- brz21_pairings$undam_window_start[i]
  end_i   <- brz21_pairings$undam_window_end[i]
  
  if (start_i >= last_end + 25) {   # enforce 250-m spacing
    thinned <- append(thinned, i)   # NOTE: ^ no diff. than 100-m on brz21
    last_end <- end_i
  }
}

brz21_pairings <- brz21_pairings[unlist(thinned), ]


# Enforce STRICT 250m buffer between dammed and undammed
brz21_pairings <- brz21_pairings %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    trimmed = list(
      trim_undammed_window(
        dam_start = cluster_start,
        dam_end   = cluster_end,
        und_start = undam_window_start,
        und_end   = undam_window_end,
        buffer    = 25   # 250 m
      )
    ),
    undam_window_start = trimmed[[1]],
    undam_window_end   = trimmed[[2]]
  ) %>%
  select(-trimmed) %>%
  ungroup()

# Now combine dammed and undammed windows into a unified table and select only those windows from the main dataframe
brz21_dammed_windows <- brz21_pairings %>%
  transmute(
    clusterID_seq,
    window_type = "dammed",
    window_start = cluster_start,
    window_end   = cluster_end,
    window_length = (window_end - window_start)*10,
    dam_intensity = cluster_dam_count
  )

brz21_undammed_windows <- brz21_pairings %>% 
  transmute(
    clusterID_seq,
    window_type = "undammed",
    window_start = undam_window_start,   # trimmed start
    window_end   = undam_window_end,     # trimmed end
    window_length = (undam_window_end - undam_window_start) * 10,
    dam_intensity = 0
  )


brz21_all_windows <- bind_rows(
  brz21_dammed_windows,
  brz21_undammed_windows
)

brz21_sampled <- brzRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID_detDat21_dam21 %>%
  cross_join(brz21_all_windows) %>%   # explicit Cartesian join
  filter(
    TP_ID >= window_start,
    TP_ID <= window_end
  )
```


**Visualize Sample Reaches for Brazil Creek 2021:**

```{r, echo=FALSE,warning=FALSE,fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
# Join geometries to polygons with data
brz_samples_21 <- brz21_sampled %>% 
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  left_join(brzRiparianGeometries, by = "TP_ID") %>% 
  st_as_sf() #restore sf class for mapping

brz_SampleReaches_21 <- st_centroid(brz_samples_21)


# Color palette for clusters
cluster_palette <- colorFactor(
  palette = colorRampPalette(RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(12, "Paired"))(60),
  domain = brz_SampleReaches_21$clusterID_seq
)


leaflet(brz_SampleReaches_21) %>%
  addProviderTiles(providers$USGS.USImageryTopo) %>%

  #Undammed (black)
  addCircleMarkers(
    data = subset(brz_SampleReaches_21, window_type == "undammed"),
    radius = 6,
    fillColor = "black",
    fillOpacity = 0.9,
    color = "black",
    weight = 1,
    popup = ~paste0(
      "<b>TP_ID:</b> ", TP_ID, "<br>",
      "<b>Cluster:</b> ", clusterID_seq, "<br>",
      "<b>Type:</b> Undammed"
    )
  ) %>%

  #Dammed (colored by cluster ID)
  addCircleMarkers(
    data = subset(brz_SampleReaches_21, 
                  window_type == "dammed"),
    radius = 6,
    fillColor = ~cluster_palette(clusterID_seq),
    fillOpacity = 0.9,
    color = "black",
    weight = 1,
    popup = ~paste0(
      "<b>TP_ID:</b> ", TP_ID, "<br>",
      "<b>Cluster:</b> ", clusterID_seq, "<br>",
      "<b>Type:</b> Dammed"
    )
  ) %>%
# Legend for dammed clusters only
  addLegend(
    "bottomleft",
    pal = cluster_palette,
    values = subset(brz_SampleReaches_21, window_type == "dammed")$clusterID_seq,
    title = "Dammed Cluster ID"
  ) %>%

  addScaleBar(
    position = "bottomright",
    options = scaleBarOptions(
      maxWidth = 200,
      metric = TRUE,
      imperial = FALSE,
      updateWhenIdle = TRUE
    )
  )
```
