**2023**
----

```{r,echo=FALSE}
brz23_dam_min <- min(brz23_dammed_df$TP_ID) #Find min/max dammed TP_ID to intersperse undammed among
brz23_dam_max <- max(brz23_dammed_df$TP_ID)


#Determine 250m buffers up and down from each dammed cluster; NO 'undammed' start points within this zone
brz23_dam_influence_250 <- unique(unlist(
  apply(
    brz23_dammed_df %>% 
      st_drop_geometry() %>% 
      select(cluster_start, cluster_end),
    1,
    function(row) {
      seq(row["cluster_start"] - 50,
          row["cluster_end"]   + 25)
    }
  )
))
 

#Get all available Riparian Polygons (excludes reservoir-affected)
brz23_all_tpids <- sort(unique(brzRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID_detDat23_dam23$TP_ID))  

#Ensure interspersion of undammed within dammed sites
brz23_inRange_tpids <- brz23_all_tpids[brz23_all_tpids >= brz23_dam_min & brz23_all_tpids <= brz23_dam_max]

#Get only riparian polygons that are not inside the dam or anthro influence zone (cluster+-500m, for anthro; cluster+-250m for beav)
brz23_eligible_undammed_tpids <- brz23_inRange_tpids[(!brz23_inRange_tpids %in% brz23_dam_influence_250) &
                                                     (!brz23_inRange_tpids %in% brz23_anthro_influence_500)]

#Get cluster start point for each dammed cluster
brz23_dam_clusters <- brz23_dammed_df %>%
  distinct(clusterID_seq, 
           cluster_start, 
           cluster_end, 
           cluster_dam_count) %>%
  arrange(clusterID_seq)


#PROXIMITY BASED PAIRING
#Define available undammed reaches to sample
brz23_remaining_undammed <- brz23_eligible_undammed_tpids

#Define undammed reaches that have been matched with dammed clusters
brz23_assigned_matches <- integer(nrow(brz23_dam_clusters)) #get 1 undammed for each dammed

# Iterate through dammed clusters
for (i in seq_len(nrow(brz23_dam_clusters))) {
  # find cluster start
  cs <- brz23_dam_clusters$cluster_start[i]
  
  # find nearest remaining undammed site
  idx <- which.min(abs(brz23_remaining_undammed - cs))
  match <- brz23_remaining_undammed[idx]
  
  brz23_assigned_matches[i] <- match
  
  # remove it so it cannot be reused
  brz23_remaining_undammed <- brz23_remaining_undammed[-idx]
}

#Create table to visualize and gut check matches
brz23_pairings <- brz23_dam_clusters %>%
  mutate(undam_match = brz23_assigned_matches) %>%
  left_join(brz23_dammed_df %>%
              group_by(clusterID_seq) %>%
              summarise(dam_window_length_tpid = max(cluster_end) - min(cluster_start),
                        .groups = "drop"),
            by = "clusterID_seq") %>%
  mutate(undam_window_start = undam_match,
         undam_window_end   = undam_match + dam_window_length_tpid
  )

# THIN UNDAMMED WINDOWS *AFTER* WINDOW LENGTH IS KNOWN ---------------

brz23_pairings <- brz23_pairings %>% arrange(undam_window_start)

thinned <- list()
last_end <- -Inf

for (i in seq_len(nrow(brz23_pairings))) {
  start_i <- brz23_pairings$undam_window_start[i]
  end_i   <- brz23_pairings$undam_window_end[i]
  
  if (start_i >= last_end + 25) {   # enforce 250-m spacing
    thinned <- append(thinned, i)   # NOTE: ^ no diff. than 100-m on brz23
    last_end <- end_i
  }
}

brz23_pairings <- brz23_pairings[unlist(thinned), ]


# Enforce STRICT 250m buffer between dammed and undammed
brz23_pairings <- brz23_pairings %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    trimmed = list(
      trim_undammed_window(
        dam_start = cluster_start,
        dam_end   = cluster_end,
        und_start = undam_window_start,
        und_end   = undam_window_end,
        buffer    = 25   # 250 m
      )
    ),
    undam_window_start = trimmed[[1]],
    undam_window_end   = trimmed[[2]]
  ) %>%
  select(-trimmed) %>%
  ungroup()

# Now combine dammed and undammed windows into a unified table and select only those windows from the main dataframe
brz23_dammed_windows <- brz23_pairings %>%
  transmute(
    clusterID_seq,
    window_type = "dammed",
    window_start = cluster_start,
    window_end   = cluster_end,
    window_length = (window_end - window_start)*10,
    dam_intensity = cluster_dam_count
  )

brz23_undammed_windows <- brz23_pairings %>% 
  transmute(
    clusterID_seq,
    window_type = "undammed",
    window_start = undam_window_start,   # trimmed start
    window_end   = undam_window_end,     # trimmed end
    window_length = (undam_window_end - undam_window_start) * 10,
    dam_intensity = 0
  )


brz23_all_windows <- bind_rows(
  brz23_dammed_windows,
  brz23_undammed_windows
)

brz23_sampled <- brzRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID_detDat23_dam23 %>%
  cross_join(brz23_all_windows) %>%   # explicit Cartesian join
  filter(
    TP_ID >= window_start,
    TP_ID <= window_end
  )
```

LARB
----


**2019**
----

```{r,echo=FALSE}

# Get only elligible beaver dams; those outside the potential impact of anthro impoundments

#Determine 500m buffers up and down from each anthro cluster; NO 'dammed'/'undammed' within this zone
lrb19_anthro_influence_500 <- unique(unlist(
  lapply(lrb19_damIDs_anthro,
         function(x) seq(x - 75, x + 50))  
))

lrb19_damIDs_bvEligible <- lrb19_damIDs_bvAll[!lrb19_damIDs_bvAll %in% lrb19_anthro_influence_500]


# 2. Convert to matrix (dbscan requires matrix input)
lrb19_dam_mat <- matrix(lrb19_damIDs_bvEligible, ncol = 1)

# 3. Run DBSCAN
lrb19_db <- dbscan(
  lrb19_dam_mat,
  eps = 25,        #Test with 25 and with 10; bidirectional
  minPts = 1       #min(cluster) = 1 dam; this ensures that isolated dams are still included
)

# 3b. Build a dataframe of dammed rows + cluster IDs
lrb19_dammed_df <- lrbRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID_detDat19_dam19 %>%
  filter(TP_ID %in% lrb19_damIDs_bvEligible) %>%   # only eligible BV dams
  arrange(TP_ID) %>%                              # ensure same order as DBSCAN input
  mutate(clusterID_dbscan = lrb19_db$cluster)


# 5. Compute # of dams per cluster
lrb19_damClusterCount <- lrb19_dammed_df %>%
  filter(dam_count_beav_all == 1) %>%
  count(clusterID_dbscan, name = "cluster_dam_count")

lrb19_dammed_df <- lrb19_dammed_df %>%
  left_join(lrb19_damClusterCount %>%
              st_drop_geometry(), 
            by = "clusterID_dbscan")

# 6. Compute Stream Length per Cluster
lrb_streamPerCluster <- lrb19_dammed_df %>%
  filter(dam_count_beav_all == 1) %>%
  group_by(clusterID_dbscan) %>%
  summarise(cluster_start = min(TP_ID),
            cluster_end   = max(TP_ID+25),
            cluster_length_TPID = ((cluster_end - cluster_start))*10,
            .groups = "drop"
            ) %>% 
  arrange(cluster_start)  %>%        # downstream → upstream
  mutate(clusterID_seq = row_number()) # make sure that clusterID is in order from downstream to upstream


lrb19_dammed_df <- lrb19_dammed_df %>%
  left_join(lrb_streamPerCluster %>% 
              st_drop_geometry() %>% 
              select(clusterID_dbscan, 
                     clusterID_seq,
                     cluster_start,
                     cluster_end),
            by = "clusterID_dbscan")
```

----


**VISUALIZE DAM CLUSTERS:**


Plot sample regions for Willow Creek 2019 on a map:


```{r, echo=FALSE,  fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
# Join geometries to polygons with data
lrb_dam_map_19 <- lrb19_dammed_df %>% 
  st_drop_geometry() %>%      
  left_join(lrbRiparianGeometries, by = "TP_ID") %>% 
  st_as_sf()

lrb_points_19 <- st_centroid(lrb_dam_map_19)


pal <- colorFactor(
  palette = colorRampPalette(RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(12, "Paired"))(length(unique(lrb_points_19$clusterID_seq))),
  domain = lrb_points_19$clusterID_seq
)

leaflet(lrb_points_19) %>%
  addProviderTiles(providers$USGS.USImageryTopo) %>%
  addCircleMarkers(
    radius = 5,
    color = ~pal(clusterID_seq),
    fillOpacity = 0.9,
    stroke = FALSE,
    popup = ~paste0(
      "<b>TP_ID:</b> ", TP_ID, "<br>",
      "<b>Cluster:</b> ", clusterID_seq)
  ) %>%
  addLegend("bottomright", pal = pal, values = lrb_points_19$clusterID_seq, title = "Cluster") %>%
  addScaleBar(
    position = "bottomleft",
    options = scaleBarOptions(
      maxWidth = 200,
      metric = TRUE,
      imperial = FALSE,
      updateWhenIdle = TRUE
    )
  )
```

```{r,echo=FALSE}
# Get only elligible beaver dams; those outside the potential impact of anthro impoundments

#Determine 500m buffers up and down from each anthro cluster; NO 'dammed'/'undammed' within this zone
lrb21_anthro_influence_500 <- unique(unlist(
  lapply(lrb21_damIDs_anthro,
         function(x) seq(x - 75, x + 50))  
))

lrb21_damIDs_bvEligible <- lrb21_damIDs_bvAll[!lrb21_damIDs_bvAll %in% lrb21_anthro_influence_500]


# 2. Convert to matrix (dbscan requires matrix input)
lrb21_dam_mat <- matrix(lrb21_damIDs_bvEligible, ncol = 1)

# 3. Run DBSCAN
lrb21_db <- dbscan(
  lrb21_dam_mat,
  eps = 25,        #Test with 25 and with 10; bidirectional
  minPts = 1       #min(cluster) = 1 dam; this ensures that isolated dams are still included
)

# 3b. Build a dataframe of dammed rows + cluster IDs
lrb21_dammed_df <- lrbRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID_detDat21_dam21 %>%
  filter(TP_ID %in% lrb21_damIDs_bvEligible) %>%   # only eligible BV dams
  arrange(TP_ID) %>%                              # ensure same order as DBSCAN input
  mutate(clusterID_dbscan = lrb21_db$cluster)


# 5. Compute # of dams per cluster
lrb21_damClusterCount <- lrb21_dammed_df %>%
  filter(dam_count_beav_all == 1) %>%
  count(clusterID_dbscan, name = "cluster_dam_count")

lrb21_dammed_df <- lrb21_dammed_df %>%
  left_join(lrb21_damClusterCount %>%
              st_drop_geometry(), 
            by = "clusterID_dbscan")

# 6. Compute Stream Length per Cluster
lrb_streamPerCluster <- lrb21_dammed_df %>%
  filter(dam_count_beav_all == 1) %>%
  group_by(clusterID_dbscan) %>%
  summarise(cluster_start = min(TP_ID),
            cluster_end   = max(TP_ID+25),
            cluster_length_TPID = ((cluster_end - cluster_start))*10,
            .groups = "drop"
            ) %>% 
  arrange(cluster_start)  %>%        # downstream → upstream
  mutate(clusterID_seq = row_number()) # make sure that clusterID is in order from downstream to upstream


lrb21_dammed_df <- lrb21_dammed_df %>%
  left_join(lrb_streamPerCluster %>% 
              st_drop_geometry() %>% 
              select(clusterID_dbscan, 
                     clusterID_seq,
                     cluster_start,
                     cluster_end),
            by = "clusterID_dbscan")
```

```{r, echo=FALSE,  fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
      "<b>Cluster:</b> ", clusterID_seq)
  ) %>%
  addLegend("bottomright", pal = pal, values = lrb_points_23$clusterID_seq, title = "Cluster") %>%
  addScaleBar(
    position = "bottomleft",
    options = scaleBarOptions(
      maxWidth = 200,
      metric = TRUE,
      imperial = FALSE,
      updateWhenIdle = TRUE
    )
  )
```

--->

----

----

----

**DEFINE PAIRED UNDAMMED REACHES:**


    - Undammed sample reaches must be:
      - interspersed between dammed reaches
      - (>=) 250m from nearest dam
      - 'paired' with a nearby dam cluster
      - (>=) 250m from nearest undammed (forced thinning post-pairing)
      

      
**2019**
----

```{r,echo=FALSE}
lrb19_dam_min <- min(lrb19_dammed_df$TP_ID) #Find min/max dammed TP_ID to intersperse undammed among
lrb19_dam_max <- max(lrb19_dammed_df$TP_ID)


#Determine 250m buffers up and down from each dammed cluster; NO 'undammed' start points within this zone
lrb19_dam_influence_250 <- unique(unlist(
  apply(
    lrb19_dammed_df %>% 
      st_drop_geometry() %>% 
      select(cluster_start, cluster_end),
    1,
    function(row) {
      seq(row["cluster_start"] - 50,
          row["cluster_end"]   + 25)
    }
  )
))
 

#Get all available Riparian Polygons (excludes reservoir-affected)
lrb19_all_tpids <- sort(unique(lrbRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID_detDat19_dam19$TP_ID))  

#Ensure interspersion of undammed within dammed sites
lrb19_inRange_tpids <- lrb19_all_tpids[lrb19_all_tpids >= lrb19_dam_min & lrb19_all_tpids <= lrb19_dam_max]

#Get only riparian polygons that are not inside the dam or anthro influence zone (cluster+-500m, for anthro; cluster+-250m for beav)
lrb19_eligible_undammed_tpids <- lrb19_inRange_tpids[(!lrb19_inRange_tpids %in% lrb19_dam_influence_250) &
                                                     (!lrb19_inRange_tpids %in% lrb19_anthro_influence_500)]

#Get cluster start point for each dammed cluster
lrb19_dam_clusters <- lrb19_dammed_df %>%
  distinct(clusterID_seq, 
           cluster_start, 
           cluster_end, 
           cluster_dam_count) %>%
  arrange(clusterID_seq)


#PROXIMITY BASED PAIRING
#Define available undammed reaches to sample
lrb19_remaining_undammed <- lrb19_eligible_undammed_tpids

#Define undammed reaches that have been matched with dammed clusters
lrb19_assigned_matches <- integer(nrow(lrb19_dam_clusters)) #get 1 undammed for each dammed

# Iterate through dammed clusters
for (i in seq_len(nrow(lrb19_dam_clusters))) {
  # find cluster start
  cs <- lrb19_dam_clusters$cluster_start[i]
  
  # find nearest remaining undammed site
  idx <- which.min(abs(lrb19_remaining_undammed - cs))
  match <- lrb19_remaining_undammed[idx]
  
  lrb19_assigned_matches[i] <- match
  
  # remove it so it cannot be reused
  lrb19_remaining_undammed <- lrb19_remaining_undammed[-idx]
}

#Create table to visualize and gut check matches
lrb19_pairings <- lrb19_dam_clusters %>%
  mutate(undam_match = lrb19_assigned_matches) %>%
  left_join(lrb19_dammed_df %>%
              group_by(clusterID_seq) %>%
              summarise(dam_window_length_tpid = max(cluster_end) - min(cluster_start),
                        .groups = "drop"),
            by = "clusterID_seq") %>%
  mutate(undam_window_start = undam_match,
         undam_window_end   = undam_match + dam_window_length_tpid
  )

# THIN UNDAMMED WINDOWS *AFTER* WINDOW LENGTH IS KNOWN ---------------

lrb19_pairings <- lrb19_pairings %>% arrange(undam_window_start)

thinned <- list()
last_end <- -Inf

for (i in seq_len(nrow(lrb19_pairings))) {
  start_i <- lrb19_pairings$undam_window_start[i]
  end_i   <- lrb19_pairings$undam_window_end[i]
  
  if (start_i >= last_end + 25) {   # enforce 250-m spacing
    thinned <- append(thinned, i)   # NOTE: ^ no diff. than 100-m on lrb19
    last_end <- end_i
  }
}

lrb19_pairings <- lrb19_pairings[unlist(thinned), ]


# Enforce STRICT 250m buffer between dammed and undammed
lrb19_pairings <- lrb19_pairings %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    trimmed = list(
      trim_undammed_window(
        dam_start = cluster_start,
        dam_end   = cluster_end,
        und_start = undam_window_start,
        und_end   = undam_window_end,
        buffer    = 25   # 250 m
      )
    ),
    undam_window_start = trimmed[[1]],
    undam_window_end   = trimmed[[2]]
  ) %>%
  select(-trimmed) %>%
  ungroup()

# Now combine dammed and undammed windows into a unified table and select only those windows from the main dataframe
lrb19_dammed_windows <- lrb19_pairings %>%
  transmute(
    clusterID_seq,
    window_type = "dammed",
    window_start = cluster_start,
    window_end   = cluster_end,
    window_length = (window_end - window_start)*10,
    dam_intensity = cluster_dam_count
  )

lrb19_undammed_windows <- lrb19_pairings %>% 
  transmute(
    clusterID_seq,
    window_type = "undammed",
    window_start = undam_window_start,   # trimmed start
    window_end   = undam_window_end,     # trimmed end
    window_length = (undam_window_end - undam_window_start) * 10,
    dam_intensity = 0
  )


lrb19_all_windows <- bind_rows(
  lrb19_dammed_windows,
  lrb19_undammed_windows
)

lrb19_sampled <- lrbRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID_detDat19_dam19 %>%
  cross_join(lrb19_all_windows) %>%   # explicit Cartesian join
  filter(
    TP_ID >= window_start,
    TP_ID <= window_end
  )
```


**Visualize Sample Reaches for Larb Creek 2019:**

```{r, echo=FALSE,warning=FALSE,fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
# Join geometries to polygons with data
lrb_samples_19 <- lrb19_sampled %>% 
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  left_join(lrbRiparianGeometries, by = "TP_ID") %>% 
  st_as_sf() #restore sf class for mapping

lrb_SampleReaches_19 <- st_centroid(lrb_samples_19)


# Color palette for clusters
cluster_palette <- colorFactor(
  palette = colorRampPalette(RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(12, "Paired"))(60),
  domain = lrb_SampleReaches_19$clusterID_seq
)


leaflet(lrb_SampleReaches_19) %>%
  addProviderTiles(providers$USGS.USImageryTopo) %>%

  #Undammed (black)
  addCircleMarkers(
    data = subset(lrb_SampleReaches_19, window_type == "undammed"),
    radius = 6,
    fillColor = "black",
    fillOpacity = 0.9,
    color = "black",
    weight = 1,
    popup = ~paste0(
      "<b>TP_ID:</b> ", TP_ID, "<br>",
      "<b>Cluster:</b> ", clusterID_seq, "<br>",
      "<b>Type:</b> Undammed"
    )
  ) %>%

  #Dammed (colored by cluster ID)
  addCircleMarkers(
    data = subset(lrb_SampleReaches_19, 
                  window_type == "dammed"),
    radius = 6,
    fillColor = ~cluster_palette(clusterID_seq),
    fillOpacity = 0.9,
    color = "black",
    weight = 1,
    popup = ~paste0(
      "<b>TP_ID:</b> ", TP_ID, "<br>",
      "<b>Cluster:</b> ", clusterID_seq, "<br>",
      "<b>Type:</b> Dammed"
    )
  ) %>%
# Legend for dammed clusters only
  addLegend(
    "bottomleft",
    pal = cluster_palette,
    values = subset(lrb_SampleReaches_19, window_type == "dammed")$clusterID_seq,
    title = "Dammed Cluster ID"
  ) %>%

  addScaleBar(
    position = "bottomright",
    options = scaleBarOptions(
      maxWidth = 200,
      metric = TRUE,
      imperial = FALSE,
      updateWhenIdle = TRUE
    )
  )
```

```{r,echo=FALSE}
  mutate(undam_window_start = undam_match,

# THIN UNDAMMED WINDOWS *AFTER* WINDOW LENGTH IS KNOWN ---------------
```

```{r,echo=FALSE}
  end_i   <- lrb23_pairings$undam_window_end[i]
  
  if (start_i >= last_end + 25) {   # enforce 250-m spacing

    trimmed = list(
```

----

----

----

LOW BEAV
----


**2019**
----

```{r,echo=FALSE}

# Get only elligible beaver dams; those outside the potential impact of anthro impoundments

#Determine 500m buffers up and down from each anthro cluster; NO 'dammed'/'undammed' within this zone
lbv19_anthro_influence_500 <- unique(unlist(
  lapply(lbv19_damIDs_anthro,
         function(x) seq(x - 75, x + 50))  
))

lbv19_damIDs_bvEligible <- lbv19_damIDs_bvAll[!lbv19_damIDs_bvAll %in% lbv19_anthro_influence_500]


# 2. Convert to matrix (dbscan requires matrix input)
lbv19_dam_mat <- matrix(lbv19_damIDs_bvEligible, ncol = 1)

# 3. Run DBSCAN
lbv19_db <- dbscan(
  lbv19_dam_mat,
  eps = 25,        #Test with 25 and with 10; bidirectional
  minPts = 1       #min(cluster) = 1 dam; this ensures that isolated dams are still included
)

# 3b. Build a dataframe of dammed rows + cluster IDs
lbv19_dammed_df <- lbvRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID_detDat19_dam19 %>%
  filter(TP_ID %in% lbv19_damIDs_bvEligible) %>%   # only eligible BV dams
  arrange(TP_ID) %>%                              # ensure same order as DBSCAN input
  mutate(clusterID_dbscan = lbv19_db$cluster)


# 5. Compute # of dams per cluster
lbv19_damClusterCount <- lbv19_dammed_df %>%
  filter(dam_count_beav_all == 1) %>%
  count(clusterID_dbscan, name = "cluster_dam_count")

lbv19_dammed_df <- lbv19_dammed_df %>%
  left_join(lbv19_damClusterCount %>%
              st_drop_geometry(), 
            by = "clusterID_dbscan")

# 6. Compute Stream Length per Cluster
lbv_streamPerCluster <- lbv19_dammed_df %>%
  filter(dam_count_beav_all == 1) %>%
  group_by(clusterID_dbscan) %>%
  summarise(cluster_start = min(TP_ID),
            cluster_end   = max(TP_ID+25),
            cluster_length_TPID = ((cluster_end - cluster_start))*10,
            .groups = "drop"
            ) %>% 
  arrange(cluster_start)  %>%        # downstream → upstream
  mutate(clusterID_seq = row_number()) # make sure that clusterID is in order from downstream to upstream


lbv19_dammed_df <- lbv19_dammed_df %>%
  left_join(lbv_streamPerCluster %>% 
              st_drop_geometry() %>% 
              select(clusterID_dbscan, 
                     clusterID_seq,
                     cluster_start,
                     cluster_end),
            by = "clusterID_dbscan")
```

**VISUALIZE DAM CLUSTERS:**


Plot sample regions for Willow Creek 2019 on a map:


```{r, echo=FALSE,  fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
# Join geometries to polygons with data
lbv_dam_map_19 <- lbv19_dammed_df %>% 
  st_drop_geometry() %>%      
  left_join(lbvRiparianGeometries, by = "TP_ID") %>% 
  st_as_sf()

lbv_points_19 <- st_centroid(lbv_dam_map_19)


pal <- colorFactor(
  palette = colorRampPalette(RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(12, "Paired"))(length(unique(lbv_points_19$clusterID_seq))),
  domain = lbv_points_19$clusterID_seq
)

leaflet(lbv_points_19) %>%
  addProviderTiles(providers$USGS.USImageryTopo) %>%
  addCircleMarkers(
    radius = 5,
    color = ~pal(clusterID_seq),
    fillOpacity = 0.9,
    stroke = FALSE,
    popup = ~paste0(
      "<b>TP_ID:</b> ", TP_ID, "<br>",
      "<b>Cluster:</b> ", clusterID_seq)
  ) %>%
  addLegend("bottomright", pal = pal, values = lbv_points_19$clusterID_seq, title = "Cluster") %>%
  addScaleBar(
    position = "bottomleft",
    options = scaleBarOptions(
      maxWidth = 200,
      metric = TRUE,
      imperial = FALSE,
      updateWhenIdle = TRUE
    )
  )
```

**2021**
----
      
```{r,echo=FALSE}

# Get only elligible beaver dams; those outside the potential impact of anthro impoundments

#Determine 500m buffers up and down from each anthro cluster; NO 'dammed'/'undammed' within this zone
lbv21_anthro_influence_500 <- unique(unlist(
  lapply(lbv21_damIDs_anthro,
         function(x) seq(x - 75, x + 50))  
))

lbv21_damIDs_bvEligible <- lbv21_damIDs_bvAll[!lbv21_damIDs_bvAll %in% lbv21_anthro_influence_500]


# 2. Convert to matrix (dbscan requires matrix input)
lbv21_dam_mat <- matrix(lbv21_damIDs_bvEligible, ncol = 1)

# 3. Run DBSCAN
lbv21_db <- dbscan(
  lbv21_dam_mat,
  eps = 25,        #Test with 25 and with 10; bidirectional
  minPts = 1       #min(cluster) = 1 dam; this ensures that isolated dams are still included
)

# 3b. Build a dataframe of dammed rows + cluster IDs
lbv21_dammed_df <- lbvRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID_detDat21_dam21 %>%
  filter(TP_ID %in% lbv21_damIDs_bvEligible) %>%   # only eligible BV dams
  arrange(TP_ID) %>%                              # ensure same order as DBSCAN input
  mutate(clusterID_dbscan = lbv21_db$cluster)


# 5. Compute # of dams per cluster
lbv21_damClusterCount <- lbv21_dammed_df %>%
  filter(dam_count_beav_all == 1) %>%
  count(clusterID_dbscan, name = "cluster_dam_count")

lbv21_dammed_df <- lbv21_dammed_df %>%
  left_join(lbv21_damClusterCount %>%
              st_drop_geometry(), 
            by = "clusterID_dbscan")

# 6. Compute Stream Length per Cluster
lbv_streamPerCluster <- lbv21_dammed_df %>%
  filter(dam_count_beav_all == 1) %>%
  group_by(clusterID_dbscan) %>%
  summarise(cluster_start = min(TP_ID),
            cluster_end   = max(TP_ID+25),
            cluster_length_TPID = ((cluster_end - cluster_start))*10,
            .groups = "drop"
            ) %>% 
  arrange(cluster_start)  %>%        # downstream → upstream
  mutate(clusterID_seq = row_number()) # make sure that clusterID is in order from downstream to upstream


lbv21_dammed_df <- lbv21_dammed_df %>%
  left_join(lbv_streamPerCluster %>% 
              st_drop_geometry() %>% 
              select(clusterID_dbscan, 
                     clusterID_seq,
                     cluster_start,
                     cluster_end),
            by = "clusterID_dbscan")
```

```{r,echo=FALSE}
# 3b. Build a dataframe of dammed rows + cluster IDs

  mutate(clusterID_dbscan = lbv23_db$cluster)

  filter(dam_count_beav_all == 1) %>%

# 6. Compute Stream Length per Cluster

            .groups = "drop"
            ) %>%

  mutate(clusterID_seq = row_number()) # make sure that clusterID is in order from downstream to upstream

  left_join(lbv_streamPerCluster %>% 
              st_drop_geometry() %>% 
              select(clusterID_dbscan, 
                     clusterID_seq,
                     cluster_start,
```

--->

----

----

----

**DEFINE PAIRED UNDAMMED REACHES:**


    - Undammed sample reaches must be:
      - interspersed between dammed reaches
      - (>=) 250m from nearest dam
      - 'paired' with a nearby dam cluster
      - (>=) 250m from nearest undammed (forced thinning post-pairing)
      

      
**2019**
----

```{r,echo=FALSE}
lbv19_dam_min <- min(lbv19_dammed_df$TP_ID) #Find min/max dammed TP_ID to intersperse undammed among
lbv19_dam_max <- max(lbv19_dammed_df$TP_ID)


#Determine 250m buffers up and down from each dammed cluster; NO 'undammed' start points within this zone
lbv19_dam_influence_250 <- unique(unlist(
  apply(
    lbv19_dammed_df %>% 
      st_drop_geometry() %>% 
      select(cluster_start, cluster_end),
    1,
    function(row) {
      seq(row["cluster_start"] - 50,
          row["cluster_end"]   + 25)
    }
  )
))
 

#Get all available Riparian Polygons (excludes reservoir-affected)
lbv19_all_tpids <- sort(unique(lbvRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID_detDat19_dam19$TP_ID))  

#Ensure interspersion of undammed within dammed sites
lbv19_inRange_tpids <- lbv19_all_tpids[lbv19_all_tpids >= lbv19_dam_min & lbv19_all_tpids <= lbv19_dam_max]

#Get only riparian polygons that are not inside the dam or anthro influence zone (cluster+-500m, for anthro; cluster+-250m for beav)
lbv19_eligible_undammed_tpids <- lbv19_inRange_tpids[(!lbv19_inRange_tpids %in% lbv19_dam_influence_250) &
                                                     (!lbv19_inRange_tpids %in% lbv19_anthro_influence_500)]

#Get cluster start point for each dammed cluster
lbv19_dam_clusters <- lbv19_dammed_df %>%
  distinct(clusterID_seq, 
           cluster_start, 
           cluster_end, 
           cluster_dam_count) %>%
  arrange(clusterID_seq)


#PROXIMITY BASED PAIRING
#Define available undammed reaches to sample
lbv19_remaining_undammed <- lbv19_eligible_undammed_tpids

#Define undammed reaches that have been matched with dammed clusters
lbv19_assigned_matches <- integer(nrow(lbv19_dam_clusters)) #get 1 undammed for each dammed

# Iterate through dammed clusters
for (i in seq_len(nrow(lbv19_dam_clusters))) {
  # find cluster start
  cs <- lbv19_dam_clusters$cluster_start[i]
  
  # find nearest remaining undammed site
  idx <- which.min(abs(lbv19_remaining_undammed - cs))
  match <- lbv19_remaining_undammed[idx]
  
  lbv19_assigned_matches[i] <- match
  
  # remove it so it cannot be reused
  lbv19_remaining_undammed <- lbv19_remaining_undammed[-idx]
}

#Create table to visualize and gut check matches
lbv19_pairings <- lbv19_dam_clusters %>%
  mutate(undam_match = lbv19_assigned_matches) %>%
  left_join(lbv19_dammed_df %>%
              group_by(clusterID_seq) %>%
              summarise(dam_window_length_tpid = max(cluster_end) - min(cluster_start),
                        .groups = "drop"),
            by = "clusterID_seq") %>%
  mutate(undam_window_start = undam_match,
         undam_window_end   = undam_match + dam_window_length_tpid
  )

# THIN UNDAMMED WINDOWS *AFTER* WINDOW LENGTH IS KNOWN ---------------

lbv19_pairings <- lbv19_pairings %>% arrange(undam_window_start)

thinned <- list()
last_end <- -Inf

for (i in seq_len(nrow(lbv19_pairings))) {
  start_i <- lbv19_pairings$undam_window_start[i]
  end_i   <- lbv19_pairings$undam_window_end[i]
  
  if (start_i >= last_end + 25) {   # enforce 250-m spacing
    thinned <- append(thinned, i)   # NOTE: ^ no diff. than 100-m on lbv19
    last_end <- end_i
  }
}

lbv19_pairings <- lbv19_pairings[unlist(thinned), ]


# Enforce STRICT 250m buffer between dammed and undammed
lbv19_pairings <- lbv19_pairings %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    trimmed = list(
      trim_undammed_window(
        dam_start = cluster_start,
        dam_end   = cluster_end,
        und_start = undam_window_start,
        und_end   = undam_window_end,
        buffer    = 25   # 250 m
      )
    ),
    undam_window_start = trimmed[[1]],
    undam_window_end   = trimmed[[2]]
  ) %>%
  select(-trimmed) %>%
  ungroup()

# Now combine dammed and undammed windows into a unified table and select only those windows from the main dataframe
lbv19_dammed_windows <- lbv19_pairings %>%
  transmute(
    clusterID_seq,
    window_type = "dammed",
    window_start = cluster_start,
    window_end   = cluster_end,
    window_length = (window_end - window_start)*10,
    dam_intensity = cluster_dam_count
  )

lbv19_undammed_windows <- lbv19_pairings %>% 
  transmute(
    clusterID_seq,
    window_type = "undammed",
    window_start = undam_window_start,   # trimmed start
    window_end   = undam_window_end,     # trimmed end
    window_length = (undam_window_end - undam_window_start) * 10,
    dam_intensity = 0
  )


lbv19_all_windows <- bind_rows(
  lbv19_dammed_windows,
  lbv19_undammed_windows
)

lbv19_sampled <- lbvRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID_detDat19_dam19 %>%
  cross_join(lbv19_all_windows) %>%   # explicit Cartesian join
  filter(
    TP_ID >= window_start,
    TP_ID <= window_end
  )
```


**Visualize Sample Reaches for Lower Beaver Creek 2019:**

```{r, echo=FALSE,warning=FALSE,fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
# Join geometries to polygons with data
lbv_samples_19 <- lbv19_sampled %>% 
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  left_join(lbvRiparianGeometries, by = "TP_ID") %>% 
  st_as_sf() #restore sf class for mapping

lbv_SampleReaches_19 <- st_centroid(lbv_samples_19)


# Color palette for clusters
cluster_palette <- colorFactor(
  palette = colorRampPalette(RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(12, "Paired"))(60),
  domain = lbv_SampleReaches_19$clusterID_seq
)


leaflet(lbv_SampleReaches_19) %>%
  addProviderTiles(providers$USGS.USImageryTopo) %>%

  #Undammed (black)
  addCircleMarkers(
    data = subset(lbv_SampleReaches_19, window_type == "undammed"),
    radius = 6,
    fillColor = "black",
    fillOpacity = 0.9,
    color = "black",
    weight = 1,
    popup = ~paste0(
      "<b>TP_ID:</b> ", TP_ID, "<br>",
      "<b>Cluster:</b> ", clusterID_seq, "<br>",
      "<b>Type:</b> Undammed"
    )
  ) %>%

  #Dammed (colored by cluster ID)
  addCircleMarkers(
    data = subset(lbv_SampleReaches_19, 
                  window_type == "dammed"),
    radius = 6,
    fillColor = ~cluster_palette(clusterID_seq),
    fillOpacity = 0.9,
    color = "black",
    weight = 1,
    popup = ~paste0(
      "<b>TP_ID:</b> ", TP_ID, "<br>",
      "<b>Cluster:</b> ", clusterID_seq, "<br>",
      "<b>Type:</b> Dammed"
    )
  ) %>%
# Legend for dammed clusters only
  addLegend(
    "bottomleft",
    pal = cluster_palette,
    values = subset(lbv_SampleReaches_19, window_type == "dammed")$clusterID_seq,
    title = "Dammed Cluster ID"
  ) %>%

  addScaleBar(
    position = "bottomright",
    options = scaleBarOptions(
      maxWidth = 200,
      metric = TRUE,
      imperial = FALSE,
      updateWhenIdle = TRUE
    )
  )

```

```{r,echo=FALSE}
length(lbv19_pairings$clusterID_seq)
```

```{r,echo=FALSE}
                        .groups = "drop"),

# THIN UNDAMMED WINDOWS *AFTER* WINDOW LENGTH IS KNOWN ---------------

last_end <- -Inf

for (i in seq_len(nrow(lbv21_pairings))) {

  end_i   <- lbv21_pairings$undam_window_end[i]

    last_end <- end_i

lbv21_pairings <- lbv21_pairings[unlist(thinned), ]


# Enforce STRICT 250m buffer between dammed and undammed

  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    trimmed = list(

        dam_start = cluster_start,
```

```{r, echo=FALSE,warning=FALSE,fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
# Join geometries to polygons with data

  left_join(lbvRiparianGeometries, by = "TP_ID") %>% 
  st_as_sf() #restore sf class for mapping

    fillColor = "black",
    fillOpacity = 0.9,
    color = "black",
    weight = 1,
    popup = ~paste0(
      "<b>TP_ID:</b> ", TP_ID, "<br>",
      "<b>Cluster:</b> ", clusterID_seq, "<br>",
      "<b>Type:</b> Undammed"
    )
  ) %>%

  #Dammed (colored by cluster ID)
  addCircleMarkers(
    data = subset(lbv_SampleReaches_21, 
                  window_type == "dammed"),
    radius = 6,
    fillColor = ~cluster_palette(clusterID_seq),
    fillOpacity = 0.9,
    color = "black",
    weight = 1,
    popup = ~paste0(
      "<b>TP_ID:</b> ", TP_ID, "<br>",
      "<b>Cluster:</b> ", clusterID_seq, "<br>",
      "<b>Type:</b> Dammed"
    )
  ) %>%
# Legend for dammed clusters only
  addLegend(
    "bottomleft",
    pal = cluster_palette,
    values = subset(lbv_SampleReaches_21, window_type == "dammed")$clusterID_seq,
    title = "Dammed Cluster ID"
  ) %>%

  addScaleBar(
    position = "bottomright",
    options = scaleBarOptions(
      maxWidth = 200,
      metric = TRUE,
      imperial = FALSE,
      updateWhenIdle = TRUE
    )
  )

```

```{r,echo=FALSE}
length(lbv21_pairings$clusterID_seq)
```

**2023**
----

```{r,echo=FALSE}
lbv23_dam_min <- min(lbv23_dammed_df$TP_ID) #Find min/max dammed TP_ID to intersperse undammed among
lbv23_dam_max <- max(lbv23_dammed_df$TP_ID)


#Determine 250m buffers up and down from each dammed cluster; NO 'undammed' start points within this zone
lbv23_dam_influence_250 <- unique(unlist(
  apply(
    lbv23_dammed_df %>% 
      st_drop_geometry() %>% 
      select(cluster_start, cluster_end),
    1,
    function(row) {
      seq(row["cluster_start"] - 50,
          row["cluster_end"]   + 25)
    }
  )
))
 

#Get all available Riparian Polygons (excludes reservoir-affected)
lbv23_all_tpids <- sort(unique(lbvRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID_detDat23_dam23$TP_ID))  

#Ensure interspersion of undammed within dammed sites
lbv23_inRange_tpids <- lbv23_all_tpids[lbv23_all_tpids >= lbv23_dam_min & lbv23_all_tpids <= lbv23_dam_max]

#Get only riparian polygons that are not inside the dam or anthro influence zone (cluster+-500m, for anthro; cluster+-250m for beav)
lbv23_eligible_undammed_tpids <- lbv23_inRange_tpids[(!lbv23_inRange_tpids %in% lbv23_dam_influence_250) &
                                                     (!lbv23_inRange_tpids %in% lbv23_anthro_influence_500)]

#Get cluster start point for each dammed cluster
lbv23_dam_clusters <- lbv23_dammed_df %>%
  distinct(clusterID_seq, 
           cluster_start, 
           cluster_end, 
           cluster_dam_count) %>%
  arrange(clusterID_seq)


#PROXIMITY BASED PAIRING
#Define available undammed reaches to sample
lbv23_remaining_undammed <- lbv23_eligible_undammed_tpids

#Define undammed reaches that have been matched with dammed clusters
lbv23_assigned_matches <- integer(nrow(lbv23_dam_clusters)) #get 1 undammed for each dammed

# Iterate through dammed clusters
for (i in seq_len(nrow(lbv23_dam_clusters))) {
  # find cluster start
  cs <- lbv23_dam_clusters$cluster_start[i]
  
  # find nearest remaining undammed site
  idx <- which.min(abs(lbv23_remaining_undammed - cs))
  match <- lbv23_remaining_undammed[idx]
  
  lbv23_assigned_matches[i] <- match
  
  # remove it so it cannot be reused
  lbv23_remaining_undammed <- lbv23_remaining_undammed[-idx]
}

#Create table to visualize and gut check matches
lbv23_pairings <- lbv23_dam_clusters %>%
  mutate(undam_match = lbv23_assigned_matches) %>%
  left_join(lbv23_dammed_df %>%
              group_by(clusterID_seq) %>%
              summarise(dam_window_length_tpid = max(cluster_end) - min(cluster_start),
                        .groups = "drop"),
            by = "clusterID_seq") %>%
  mutate(undam_window_start = undam_match,
         undam_window_end   = undam_match + dam_window_length_tpid
  )

# THIN UNDAMMED WINDOWS *AFTER* WINDOW LENGTH IS KNOWN ---------------

lbv23_pairings <- lbv23_pairings %>% arrange(undam_window_start)

thinned <- list()
last_end <- -Inf

for (i in seq_len(nrow(lbv23_pairings))) {
  start_i <- lbv23_pairings$undam_window_start[i]
  end_i   <- lbv23_pairings$undam_window_end[i]
  
  if (start_i >= last_end + 25) {   # enforce 250-m spacing
    thinned <- append(thinned, i)   # NOTE: ^ no diff. than 100-m on lbv23
    last_end <- end_i
  }
}

lbv23_pairings <- lbv23_pairings[unlist(thinned), ]


# Enforce STRICT 250m buffer between dammed and undammed
lbv23_pairings <- lbv23_pairings %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    trimmed = list(
      trim_undammed_window(
        dam_start = cluster_start,
        dam_end   = cluster_end,
        und_start = undam_window_start,
        und_end   = undam_window_end,
        buffer    = 25   # 250 m
      )
    ),
    undam_window_start = trimmed[[1]],
    undam_window_end   = trimmed[[2]]
  ) %>%
  select(-trimmed) %>%
  ungroup()

# Now combine dammed and undammed windows into a unified table and select only those windows from the main dataframe
lbv23_dammed_windows <- lbv23_pairings %>%
  transmute(
    clusterID_seq,
    window_type = "dammed",
    window_start = cluster_start,
    window_end   = cluster_end,
    window_length = (window_end - window_start)*10,
    dam_intensity = cluster_dam_count
  )

lbv23_undammed_windows <- lbv23_pairings %>% 
  transmute(
    clusterID_seq,
    window_type = "undammed",
    window_start = undam_window_start,   # trimmed start
    window_end   = undam_window_end,     # trimmed end
    window_length = (undam_window_end - undam_window_start) * 10,
    dam_intensity = 0
  )


lbv23_all_windows <- bind_rows(
  lbv23_dammed_windows,
  lbv23_undammed_windows
)

lbv23_sampled <- lbvRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID_detDat23_dam23 %>%
  cross_join(lbv23_all_windows) %>%   # explicit Cartesian join
  filter(
    TP_ID >= window_start,
    TP_ID <= window_end
  )
```


**Visualize Sample Reaches for Lower Beaver Creek 2023:**

```{r, echo=FALSE,warning=FALSE,fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
# Join geometries to polygons with data
lbv_samples_23 <- lbv23_sampled %>% 
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  left_join(lbvRiparianGeometries, by = "TP_ID") %>% 
  st_as_sf() #restore sf class for mapping

lbv_SampleReaches_23 <- st_centroid(lbv_samples_23)


# Color palette for clusters
cluster_palette <- colorFactor(
  palette = colorRampPalette(RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(12, "Paired"))(60),
  domain = lbv_SampleReaches_23$clusterID_seq
)


leaflet(lbv_SampleReaches_23) %>%

  addCircleMarkers(

    color = "black",
    weight = 1,
    popup = ~paste0(
      "<b>TP_ID:</b> ", TP_ID, "<br>",
      "<b>Cluster:</b> ", clusterID_seq, "<br>",
      "<b>Type:</b> Undammed"
    )
  ) %>%

  #Dammed (colored by cluster ID)
  addCircleMarkers(
    data = subset(lbv_SampleReaches_23, 
                  window_type == "dammed"),
    radius = 6,
    fillColor = ~cluster_palette(clusterID_seq),
    fillOpacity = 0.9,
    color = "black",
    weight = 1,
    popup = ~paste0(
      "<b>TP_ID:</b> ", TP_ID, "<br>",
      "<b>Cluster:</b> ", clusterID_seq, "<br>",
      "<b>Type:</b> Dammed"
    )
  ) %>%
# Legend for dammed clusters only
  addLegend(
    "bottomleft",
    pal = cluster_palette,
    values = subset(lbv_SampleReaches_23, window_type == "dammed")$clusterID_seq,
    title = "Dammed Cluster ID"
  ) %>%

  addScaleBar(
    position = "bottomright",
    options = scaleBarOptions(
      maxWidth = 200,
      metric = TRUE,
      imperial = FALSE,
      updateWhenIdle = TRUE
    )
  )
```

----

----

UPPER BEAVER
----


**2019**
----

```{r,echo=FALSE}

# Get only elligible beaver dams; those outside the potential impact of anthro impoundments

#Determine 500m buffers up and down from each anthro cluster; NO 'dammed'/'undammed' within this zone
ubv19_anthro_influence_500 <- unique(unlist(
  lapply(ubv19_damIDs_anthro,
         function(x) seq(x - 75, x + 50))  
))

ubv19_damIDs_bvEligible <- ubv19_damIDs_bvAll[!ubv19_damIDs_bvAll %in% ubv19_anthro_influence_500]


# 2. Convert to matrix (dbscan requires matrix input)
ubv19_dam_mat <- matrix(ubv19_damIDs_bvEligible, ncol = 1)

# 3. Run DBSCAN
ubv19_db <- dbscan(
  ubv19_dam_mat,
  eps = 25,        #Test with 25 and with 10; bidirectional
  minPts = 1       #min(cluster) = 1 dam; this ensures that isolated dams are still included
)

# 3b. Build a dataframe of dammed rows + cluster IDs
ubv19_dammed_df <- ubvRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID_detDat19_dam19 %>%
  filter(TP_ID %in% ubv19_damIDs_bvEligible) %>%   # only eligible BV dams
  arrange(TP_ID) %>%                              # ensure same order as DBSCAN input
  mutate(clusterID_dbscan = ubv19_db$cluster)


# 5. Compute # of dams per cluster
ubv19_damClusterCount <- ubv19_dammed_df %>%
  filter(dam_count_beav_all >= 1) %>%
  count(clusterID_dbscan, name = "cluster_dam_count")

ubv19_dammed_df <- ubv19_dammed_df %>%
  left_join(ubv19_damClusterCount %>%
              st_drop_geometry(), 
            by = "clusterID_dbscan")

# 6. Compute Stream Length per Cluster
ubv_streamPerCluster <- ubv19_dammed_df %>%
  filter(dam_count_beav_all >= 1) %>%
  group_by(clusterID_dbscan) %>%
  summarise(cluster_start = min(TP_ID),
            cluster_end   = max(TP_ID+25),
            cluster_length_TPID = ((cluster_end - cluster_start))*10,
            .groups = "drop"
            ) %>% 
  arrange(cluster_start)  %>%        # downstream → upstream
  mutate(clusterID_seq = row_number()) # make sure that clusterID is in order from downstream to upstream


ubv19_dammed_df <- ubv19_dammed_df %>%
  left_join(ubv_streamPerCluster %>% 
              st_drop_geometry() %>% 
              select(clusterID_dbscan, 
                     clusterID_seq,
                     cluster_start,
                     cluster_end),
            by = "clusterID_dbscan")
```

```{r, echo=FALSE,  fig.width=10, fig.height=10}

pal <- colorFactor(
  palette = colorRampPalette(RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(12, "Paired"))(length(unique(ubv_points_19$clusterID_seq))),
  domain = ubv_points_19$clusterID_seq
)

leaflet(ubv_points_19) %>%
  addProviderTiles(providers$USGS.USImageryTopo) %>%
  addCircleMarkers(
    radius = 5,
    color = ~pal(clusterID_seq),
    fillOpacity = 0.9,
    stroke = FALSE,
    popup = ~paste0(
      "<b>TP_ID:</b> ", TP_ID, "<br>",
      "<b>Cluster:</b> ", clusterID_seq)
  ) %>%
  addLegend("bottomright", pal = pal, values = ubv_points_19$clusterID_seq, title = "Cluster") %>%
  addScaleBar(
    position = "bottomleft",
    options = scaleBarOptions(
      maxWidth = 200,
      metric = TRUE,
      imperial = FALSE,
      updateWhenIdle = TRUE
    )
  )
```

--->

----

----

----

**DEFINE PAIRED UNDAMMED REACHES:**


    - Undammed sample reaches must be:
      - interspersed between dammed reaches
      - (>=) 250m from nearest dam
      - 'paired' with a nearby dam cluster
      - (>=) 250m from nearest undammed (forced thinning post-pairing)
      

      
**2019**
----

```{r,echo=FALSE}
ubv19_dam_min <- min(ubv19_dammed_df$TP_ID) #Find min/max dammed TP_ID to intersperse undammed among
ubv19_dam_max <- max(ubv19_dammed_df$TP_ID)


#Determine 250m buffers up and down from each dammed cluster; NO 'undammed' start points within this zone
ubv19_dam_influence_250 <- unique(unlist(
  apply(
    ubv19_dammed_df %>% 
      st_drop_geometry() %>% 
      select(cluster_start, cluster_end),
    1,
    function(row) {
      seq(row["cluster_start"] - 50,
          row["cluster_end"]   + 25)
    }
  )
))
 

#Get all available Riparian Polygons (excludes reservoir-affected)
ubv19_all_tpids <- sort(unique(ubvRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID_detDat19_dam19$TP_ID))  

#Ensure interspersion of undammed within dammed sites
ubv19_inRange_tpids <- ubv19_all_tpids[ubv19_all_tpids >= ubv19_dam_min & ubv19_all_tpids <= ubv19_dam_max]

#Get only riparian polygons that are not inside the dam or anthro influence zone (cluster+-500m, for anthro; cluster+-250m for beav)
ubv19_eligible_undammed_tpids <- ubv19_inRange_tpids[(!ubv19_inRange_tpids %in% ubv19_dam_influence_250) &
                                                     (!ubv19_inRange_tpids %in% ubv19_anthro_influence_500)]

#Get cluster start point for each dammed cluster
ubv19_dam_clusters <- ubv19_dammed_df %>%
  distinct(clusterID_seq, 
           cluster_start, 
           cluster_end, 
           cluster_dam_count) %>%
  arrange(clusterID_seq)


#PROXIMITY BASED PAIRING
#Define available undammed reaches to sample
ubv19_remaining_undammed <- ubv19_eligible_undammed_tpids

#Define undammed reaches that have been matched with dammed clusters
ubv19_assigned_matches <- integer(nrow(ubv19_dam_clusters)) #get 1 undammed for each dammed

# Iterate through dammed clusters
for (i in seq_len(nrow(ubv19_dam_clusters))) {
  # find cluster start
  cs <- ubv19_dam_clusters$cluster_start[i]
  
  # find nearest remaining undammed site
  idx <- which.min(abs(ubv19_remaining_undammed - cs))
  match <- ubv19_remaining_undammed[idx]
  
  ubv19_assigned_matches[i] <- match
  
  # remove it so it cannot be reused
  ubv19_remaining_undammed <- ubv19_remaining_undammed[-idx]
}

#Create table to visualize and gut check matches
ubv19_pairings <- ubv19_dam_clusters %>%
  mutate(undam_match = ubv19_assigned_matches) %>%
  left_join(ubv19_dammed_df %>%
              group_by(clusterID_seq) %>%
              summarise(dam_window_length_tpid = max(cluster_end) - min(cluster_start),
                        .groups = "drop"),
            by = "clusterID_seq") %>%
  mutate(undam_window_start = undam_match,
         undam_window_end   = undam_match + dam_window_length_tpid
  )

# THIN UNDAMMED WINDOWS *AFTER* WINDOW LENGTH IS KNOWN ---------------

ubv19_pairings <- ubv19_pairings %>% arrange(undam_window_start)

thinned <- list()
last_end <- -Inf

for (i in seq_len(nrow(ubv19_pairings))) {
  start_i <- ubv19_pairings$undam_window_start[i]
  end_i   <- ubv19_pairings$undam_window_end[i]
  
  if (start_i >= last_end + 25) {   # enforce 250-m spacing
    thinned <- append(thinned, i)   # NOTE: ^ no diff. than 100-m on ubv19
    last_end <- end_i
  }
}

ubv19_pairings <- ubv19_pairings[unlist(thinned), ]


# Enforce STRICT 250m buffer between dammed and undammed
ubv19_pairings <- ubv19_pairings %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    trimmed = list(
      trim_undammed_window(
        dam_start = cluster_start,
        dam_end   = cluster_end,
        und_start = undam_window_start,
        und_end   = undam_window_end,
        buffer    = 25   # 250 m
      )
    ),
    undam_window_start = trimmed[[1]],
    undam_window_end   = trimmed[[2]]
  ) %>%
  select(-trimmed) %>%
  ungroup()

# Now combine dammed and undammed windows into a unified table and select only those windows from the main dataframe
ubv19_dammed_windows <- ubv19_pairings %>%
  transmute(
    clusterID_seq,
    window_type = "dammed",
    window_start = cluster_start,
    window_end   = cluster_end,
    window_length = (window_end - window_start)*10,
    dam_intensity = cluster_dam_count
  )

ubv19_undammed_windows <- ubv19_pairings %>% 
  transmute(
    clusterID_seq,
    window_type = "undammed",
    window_start = undam_window_start,   # trimmed start
    window_end   = undam_window_end,     # trimmed end
    window_length = (undam_window_end - undam_window_start) * 10,
    dam_intensity = 0
  )


ubv19_all_windows <- bind_rows(
  ubv19_dammed_windows,
  ubv19_undammed_windows
)

ubv19_sampled <- ubvRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID_detDat19_dam19 %>%
  cross_join(ubv19_all_windows) %>%   # explicit Cartesian join
  filter(
    TP_ID >= window_start,
    TP_ID <= window_end
  )
```


**Visualize Sample Reaches for Upper Beaver Creek 2019:**

```{r, echo=FALSE,warning=FALSE,fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
# Join geometries to polygons with data
ubv_samples_19 <- ubv19_sampled %>% 
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  left_join(ubvRiparianGeometries, by = "TP_ID") %>% 
  st_as_sf() #restore sf class for mapping

ubv_SampleReaches_19 <- st_centroid(ubv_samples_19)


# Color palette for clusters
cluster_palette <- colorFactor(
  palette = colorRampPalette(RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(12, "Paired"))(60),
  domain = ubv_SampleReaches_19$clusterID_seq
)


leaflet(ubv_SampleReaches_19) %>%
  addProviderTiles(providers$USGS.USImageryTopo) %>%

  #Undammed (black)
  addCircleMarkers(
    data = subset(ubv_SampleReaches_19, window_type == "undammed"),
    radius = 6,
    fillColor = "black",
    fillOpacity = 0.9,
    color = "black",
    weight = 1,
    popup = ~paste0(
      "<b>TP_ID:</b> ", TP_ID, "<br>",
      "<b>Cluster:</b> ", clusterID_seq, "<br>",
      "<b>Type:</b> Undammed"
    )
  ) %>%

  #Dammed (colored by cluster ID)
  addCircleMarkers(
    data = subset(ubv_SampleReaches_19, 
                  window_type == "dammed"),
    radius = 6,
    fillColor = ~cluster_palette(clusterID_seq),
    fillOpacity = 0.9,
    color = "black",
    weight = 1,
    popup = ~paste0(
      "<b>TP_ID:</b> ", TP_ID, "<br>",
      "<b>Cluster:</b> ", clusterID_seq, "<br>",
      "<b>Type:</b> Dammed"
    )
  ) %>%
# Legend for dammed clusters only
  addLegend(
    "bottomleft",
    pal = cluster_palette,
    values = subset(ubv_SampleReaches_19, window_type == "dammed")$clusterID_seq,
    title = "Dammed Cluster ID"
  ) %>%

  addScaleBar(
    position = "bottomright",
    options = scaleBarOptions(
      maxWidth = 200,
      metric = TRUE,
      imperial = FALSE,
      updateWhenIdle = TRUE
    )
  )

```

```{r,echo=FALSE}
length(ubv19_pairings$clusterID_seq)
```

**2021**
----

```{r,echo=FALSE}
ubv21_dam_min <- min(ubv21_dammed_df$TP_ID) #Find min/max dammed TP_ID to intersperse undammed among
ubv21_dam_max <- max(ubv21_dammed_df$TP_ID)


#Determine 250m buffers up and down from each dammed cluster; NO 'undammed' start points within this zone
ubv21_dam_influence_250 <- unique(unlist(
  apply(
    ubv21_dammed_df %>% 
      st_drop_geometry() %>%
      select(cluster_start, cluster_end),
    1,
    function(row) {
      seq(row["cluster_start"] - 50,
          row["cluster_end"]   + 25)
    }
  )
))
 

#Get all available Riparian Polygons (excludes reservoir-affected)
ubv21_all_tpids <- sort(unique(ubvRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID_detDat21_dam21$TP_ID))  

#Ensure interspersion of undammed within dammed sites
ubv21_inRange_tpids <- ubv21_all_tpids[ubv21_all_tpids >= ubv21_dam_min & ubv21_all_tpids <= ubv21_dam_max]

#Get only riparian polygons that are not inside the dam or anthro influence zone (cluster+-500m, for anthro; cluster+-250m for beav)
ubv21_eligible_undammed_tpids <- ubv21_inRange_tpids[(!ubv21_inRange_tpids %in% ubv21_dam_influence_250) &
                                                     (!ubv21_inRange_tpids %in% ubv21_anthro_influence_500)]

#Get cluster start point for each dammed cluster
ubv21_dam_clusters <- ubv21_dammed_df %>%
  distinct(clusterID_seq, 
           cluster_start, 
           cluster_end, 
           cluster_dam_count) %>%
  arrange(clusterID_seq)


#PROXIMITY BASED PAIRING
#Define available undammed reaches to sample
ubv21_remaining_undammed <- ubv21_eligible_undammed_tpids

#Define undammed reaches that have been matched with dammed clusters
ubv21_assigned_matches <- integer(nrow(ubv21_dam_clusters)) #get 1 undammed for each dammed

# Iterate through dammed clusters
for (i in seq_len(nrow(ubv21_dam_clusters))) {
  # find cluster start
  cs <- ubv21_dam_clusters$cluster_start[i]
  
  # find nearest remaining undammed site
  idx <- which.min(abs(ubv21_remaining_undammed - cs))
  match <- ubv21_remaining_undammed[idx]
  
  ubv21_assigned_matches[i] <- match
  
  # remove it so it cannot be reused
  ubv21_remaining_undammed <- ubv21_remaining_undammed[-idx]
}

#Create table to visualize and gut check matches
ubv21_pairings <- ubv21_dam_clusters %>%
  mutate(undam_match = ubv21_assigned_matches) %>%
  left_join(ubv21_dammed_df %>%
              group_by(clusterID_seq) %>%
              summarise(dam_window_length_tpid = max(cluster_end) - min(cluster_start),
                        .groups = "drop"),
            by = "clusterID_seq") %>%
  mutate(undam_window_start = undam_match,
         undam_window_end   = undam_match + dam_window_length_tpid
  )

# THIN UNDAMMED WINDOWS *AFTER* WINDOW LENGTH IS KNOWN ---------------

ubv21_pairings <- ubv21_pairings %>% arrange(undam_window_start)

thinned <- list()
last_end <- -Inf

for (i in seq_len(nrow(ubv21_pairings))) {
  start_i <- ubv21_pairings$undam_window_start[i]
  end_i   <- ubv21_pairings$undam_window_end[i]
  
  if (start_i >= last_end + 25) {   # enforce 250-m spacing
    thinned <- append(thinned, i)   # NOTE: ^ no diff. than 100-m on ubv21
    last_end <- end_i
  }
}

ubv21_pairings <- ubv21_pairings[unlist(thinned), ]


# Enforce STRICT 250m buffer between dammed and undammed
ubv21_pairings <- ubv21_pairings %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    trimmed = list(
      trim_undammed_window(
        dam_start = cluster_start,
        dam_end   = cluster_end,
        und_start = undam_window_start,
        und_end   = undam_window_end,
        buffer    = 25   # 250 m
      )
    ),
    undam_window_start = trimmed[[1]],
    undam_window_end   = trimmed[[2]]
  ) %>%
  select(-trimmed) %>%
  ungroup()

# Now combine dammed and undammed windows into a unified table and select only those windows from the main dataframe
ubv21_dammed_windows <- ubv21_pairings %>%
  transmute(
    clusterID_seq,
    window_type = "dammed",
    window_start = cluster_start,
    window_end   = cluster_end,
    window_length = (window_end - window_start)*10,
    dam_intensity = cluster_dam_count
  )

ubv21_undammed_windows <- ubv21_pairings %>% 
  transmute(
    clusterID_seq,
    window_type = "undammed",
    window_start = undam_window_start,   # trimmed start
    window_end   = undam_window_end,     # trimmed end
    window_length = (undam_window_end - undam_window_start) * 10,
    dam_intensity = 0
  )


ubv21_all_windows <- bind_rows(
  ubv21_dammed_windows,
  ubv21_undammed_windows
)

ubv21_sampled <- ubvRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID_detDat21_dam21 %>%
  cross_join(ubv21_all_windows) %>%   # explicit Cartesian join
  filter(
    TP_ID >= window_start,
    TP_ID <= window_end
  )
```

```{r,echo=FALSE}
#Define undammed reaches that have been matched with dammed clusters
ubv23_assigned_matches <- integer(nrow(ubv23_dam_clusters)) #get 1 undammed for each dammed

# Iterate through dammed clusters

  match <- ubv23_remaining_undammed[idx]

}

#Create table to visualize and gut check matches
ubv23_pairings <- ubv23_dam_clusters %>%
  mutate(undam_match = ubv23_assigned_matches) %>%
  left_join(ubv23_dammed_df %>%
              group_by(clusterID_seq) %>%
              summarise(dam_window_length_tpid = max(cluster_end) - min(cluster_start),
                        .groups = "drop"),
            by = "clusterID_seq") %>%
  mutate(undam_window_start = undam_match,
         undam_window_end   = undam_match + dam_window_length_tpid
  )

# THIN UNDAMMED WINDOWS *AFTER* WINDOW LENGTH IS KNOWN ---------------

thinned <- list()
last_end <- -Inf

for (i in seq_len(nrow(ubv23_pairings))) {
  start_i <- ubv23_pairings$undam_window_start[i]
  end_i   <- ubv23_pairings$undam_window_end[i]

    last_end <- end_i
  }
}

ubv23_pairings <- ubv23_pairings[unlist(thinned), ]


# Enforce STRICT 250m buffer between dammed and undammed

  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    trimmed = list(
      trim_undammed_window(
        dam_start = cluster_start,
        dam_end   = cluster_end,
        und_start = undam_window_start,
        und_end   = undam_window_end,

      )

    undam_window_end   = trimmed[[2]]
  ) %>%
  select(-trimmed) %>%
  ungroup()

# Now combine dammed and undammed windows into a unified table and select only those windows from the main dataframe

  transmute(
    clusterID_seq,
```

----

Surface Water Area

**Willow Creek**


```{r,echo=FALSE}
# Get SWA for all relevant polygons for each year/watershed combo:

# WILLOW
# 2019
wc_swData19 <- read.csv("wc_SW_19_041026.csv")

wc_SW_19 <- wc_swData19 %>% 
  select(Input_FID,
         SWA_t1,
         SWA_t2,
         SWA_t3,
         SWA_t4,
         SWA_t5,
         SWA_t6,
         SWA_t7,
         SWA_t8,
         containsNull_t1,
         containsNull_t2,
         containsNull_t3,
         containsNull_t4,
         containsNull_t5,
         containsNull_t6,
         containsNull_t7,
         containsNull_t8,
         riparian_area_m2)
colnames(wc_SW_19)[1] <- "TP_ID"

# Collapse duplicate rows caused by TP overlap:
wc_SW_19_collapsed <- wc_SW_19 %>%
  group_by(TP_ID) %>%
  summarise(
    # sum all SWA_t columns
    across(starts_with("SWA_t"), ~ sum(.x, na.rm = TRUE)),
    
    # sum all containsNull_t columns
    across(starts_with("containsNull_t"), ~ sum(.x, na.rm = TRUE)),
    
    # sum riparian area
    riparian_area_m2 = sum(riparian_area_m2, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
####
# 2021
wc_swData21 <- read.csv("wc_SW_21_031626.csv")

wc_SW_21 <- wc_swData21 %>% 
  select(Input_FID,
         SWA_t1,
         SWA_t2,
         SWA_t3,
         SWA_t4,
         SWA_t5,
         SWA_t6,
         SWA_t7,
         SWA_t8,
         containsNull_t1,
         containsNull_t2,
         containsNull_t3,
         containsNull_t4,
         containsNull_t5,
         containsNull_t6,
         containsNull_t7,
         containsNull_t8,
         riparian_area_m2)
colnames(wc_SW_21)[1] <- "TP_ID"

# Collapse duplicate rows caused by TP overlap:
wc_SW_21_collapsed <- wc_SW_21 %>%
  group_by(TP_ID) %>%
  summarise(
    # sum all SWA_t columns
    across(starts_with("SWA_t"), ~ sum(.x, na.rm = TRUE)),
    
    # sum all containsNull_t columns
    across(starts_with("containsNull_t"), ~ sum(.x, na.rm = TRUE)),
    
    # sum riparian area
    riparian_area_m2 = sum(riparian_area_m2, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

####

# 2023
wc_swData23 <- read.csv("wc_SW_23_041026.csv")

wc_SW_23 <- wc_swData23 %>% 
  select(Input_FID,
         SWA_t1,
         SWA_t2,
         SWA_t3,
         SWA_t4,
         SWA_t5,
         SWA_t6,
         SWA_t7,
         SWA_t8,
         containsNull_t1,
         containsNull_t2,
         containsNull_t3,
         containsNull_t4,
         containsNull_t5,
         containsNull_t6,
         containsNull_t7,
         containsNull_t8,
         riparian_area_m2)
colnames(wc_SW_23)[1] <- "TP_ID"

# Collapse duplicate rows caused by TP overlap:
wc_SW_23_collapsed <- wc_SW_23 %>%
  group_by(TP_ID) %>%
  summarise(
    # sum all SWA_t columns
    across(starts_with("SWA_t"), ~ sum(.x, na.rm = TRUE)),
    
    # sum all containsNull_t columns
    across(starts_with("containsNull_t"), ~ sum(.x, na.rm = TRUE)),
    
    # sum riparian area
    riparian_area_m2 = sum(riparian_area_m2, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

```

```{r,echo=FALSE}
################################################################################
# Visualize spread of SWA across riparian polygons
# Set up a 1x3 panel layout
par(mfrow = c(1, 3))

# Define 8 colors for the 8 time periods
cols <- c("yellow2","gold2","peru","tan4","brown4",
          "lightblue4","blue4","purple4")

# 2019
wcsw19 <- wc_SW_19_collapsed[,2:9]
colnames(wcsw19) <- c("t1","t2","t3","t4","t5","t6","t7","t8")

boxplot(wcsw19, col = cols,
        xlab = "Time Period (t)",
        ylab = "Surface Water Area (m^2)",
        main = "2019",
        cex.axis = 0.8)

# 2021
wcsw21 <- wc_SW_21_collapsed[,2:9]
colnames(wcsw21) <- c("t1","t2","t3","t4","t5","t6","t7","t8")

boxplot(wcsw21, col = cols,
        xlab = "Time Period (t)",
        ylab = "",
        main = "2021",
        cex.axis = 0.8)

# 2023
wcsw23 <- wc_SW_23_collapsed[,2:9]
colnames(wcsw23) <- c("t1","t2","t3","t4","t5","t6","t7","t8")

boxplot(wcsw23, col = cols,
        xlab = "Time Period (t)",
        ylab = "",
        main = "2023",
        cex.axis = 0.8)

# Reset layout
par(mfrow = c(1,1))

```

**Lone Tree Creek**

```{r,echo=FALSE}
# Get SWA for all relevant polygons for each year/watershed combo:

# LONE TREE
# 2019
lt_swData19 <- read.csv("lt_SW_19_041026.csv")

lt_SW_19 <- lt_swData19 %>% 
  select(Input_FID,
         SWA_t1,
         SWA_t2,
         SWA_t3,
         SWA_t4,
         SWA_t5,
         SWA_t6,
         SWA_t7,
         SWA_t8,
         containsNull_t1,
         containsNull_t2,
         containsNull_t3,
         containsNull_t4,
         containsNull_t5,
         containsNull_t6,
         containsNull_t7,
         containsNull_t8,
         riparian_area_m2)
colnames(lt_SW_19)[1] <- "TP_ID"

# Collapse duplicate rows caused by TP overlap:
lt_SW_19_collapsed <- lt_SW_19 %>%
  group_by(TP_ID) %>%
  summarise(
    # sum all SWA_t columns
    across(starts_with("SWA_t"), ~ sum(.x, na.rm = TRUE)),
    
    # sum all containsNull_t columns
    across(starts_with("containsNull_t"), ~ sum(.x, na.rm = TRUE)),
    
    # sum riparian area
    riparian_area_m2 = sum(riparian_area_m2, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
####
```

```{r,echo=FALSE}
################################################################################
# Visualize spread of SWA across riparian polygons
# Set up a 1x3 panel layout
par(mfrow = c(1, 3))

# Define 8 colors for the 8 time periods
cols <- c("yellow2","gold2","peru","tan4","brown4",
          "lightblue4","blue4","purple4")

# 2019
ltsw19 <- lt_SW_19_collapsed[,2:9]
colnames(ltsw19) <- c("t1","t2","t3","t4","t5","t6","t7","t8")

boxplot(ltsw19, col = cols,
        xlab = "Time Period (t)",
        ylab = "Surface Water Area (m^2)",
        main = "2019",
        cex.axis = 0.8)

# 2021
ltsw21 <- lt_SW_21_collapsed[,2:9]
colnames(ltsw21) <- c("t1","t2","t3","t4","t5","t6","t7","t8")

boxplot(ltsw21, col = cols,
        xlab = "Time Period (t)",
        ylab = "",
        main = "2021",
        cex.axis = 0.8)

# 2023
ltsw23 <- lt_SW_23_collapsed[,2:9]
colnames(ltsw23) <- c("t1","t2","t3","t4","t5","t6","t7","t8")

boxplot(ltsw23, col = cols,
        xlab = "Time Period (t)",
        ylab = "",
        main = "2023",
        cex.axis = 0.8)

# Reset layout
par(mfrow = c(1,1))

```

```{r,echo=FALSE}
colnames(ubv_SW_23)[1] <- "TP_ID"

# Collapse duplicate rows caused by TP overlap:
ubv_SW_23_collapsed <- ubv_SW_23 %>%
  group_by(TP_ID) %>%
  summarise(
    # sum all SWA_t columns
    across(starts_with("SWA_t"), ~ sum(.x, na.rm = TRUE)),
    
    # sum all containsNull_t columns
    across(starts_with("containsNull_t"), ~ sum(.x, na.rm = TRUE)),
    
    # sum riparian area
    riparian_area_m2 = sum(riparian_area_m2, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

```

```{r,include=FALSE}
################################################################################
# Visualize spread of SWA across riparian polygons
# Set up a 1x3 panel layout
par(mfrow = c(1, 3))

# Define 8 colors for the 8 time periods
cols <- c("yellow2","gold2","peru","tan4","brown4",
          "lightblue4","blue4","purple4")

# 2019
ubvsw19 <- ubv_SW_19_collapsed[,2:9]
colnames(ubvsw19) <- c("t1","t2","t3","t4","t5","t6","t7","t8")

boxplot(ubvsw19, col = cols,
        xlab = "Time Period (t)",
        ylab = "Surface Water Area (m^2)",
        main = "2019",
        cex.axis = 0.8)

# 2021
ubvsw21 <- ubv_SW_21_collapsed[,2:9]
colnames(ubvsw21) <- c("t1","t2","t3","t4","t5","t6","t7","t8")

boxplot(ubvsw21, col = cols,
        xlab = "Time Period (t)",
        ylab = "",
        main = "2021",
        cex.axis = 0.8)

# 2023
ubvsw23 <- ubv_SW_23_collapsed[,2:9]
colnames(ubvsw23) <- c("t1","t2","t3","t4","t5","t6","t7","t8")

boxplot(ubvsw23, col = cols,
        xlab = "Time Period (t)",
        ylab = "",
        main = "2023",
        cex.axis = 0.8)

# Reset layout
par(mfrow = c(1,1))
```

----
----

Now sample SWA for dammed and undammed clusters, and finalize data frames for summary and analysis:

    The goal is to end up with a dataframe in long format where columns =
    
      - ClusterID_seq: (1:n)
      - Window_type: 'dammed' v 'undammed'
      - sum_c: summed dam count for window
      - mean_p: avg det prob for window
      - mean_f: avg fp prob for window
      - Nhat: est. dam count, considering mean(p,fp)
      - TO_mean: mean TO for window
      - RIP_Area_m2: total riparian area in (m^2)
      - UDA: contributing catchment area in (km^2)
      - containsNull: Impacted by satellite obfuscation
      - timePeriod: sample period 1:8; 2wk subdivisions of (June 01 - Sept 30).
      - SWA: summed surface water area of window
      
      
**WILLOW**
----

**2019**
----

```{r,echo=FALSE}
# left_join() the SW data to the "..._sampled" data frame for each watershed-year combo

# WILLOW

# 2019
wc19_sampledSW_Veg <- wc19_sampled %>% 
  left_join(wc_SW_19_collapsed,
            by = "TP_ID") %>% 
  left_join(wc19_veg,
            by = "TP_ID") |> 
  select(watershed,
         year,
         clusterID_seq,
         TP_ID,
         window_type,
         catchment_km2,
         riparian_area_m2,
         TO,
         p_mean,
         f_mean,
         dam_count_beav_all,
         dam_count_beav_conf,
         dam_count_ant,
         isAnthro,
         dam_intensity,
         SWA_t1,
         SWA_t2,
         SWA_t3,
         SWA_t4,
         SWA_t5,
         SWA_t6,
         SWA_t7,
         SWA_t8,
         vegArea_t5,
         vegArea_t6,
         vegArea_t7,
         vegArea_t8,
         mNDVI_t5,
         mNDVI_t6,
         mNDVI_t7,
         mNDVI_t8,
         containsNull_t1,
         containsNull_t2,
         containsNull_t3,
         containsNull_t4,
         containsNull_t5,
         containsNull_t6,
         containsNull_t7,
         containsNull_t8,
         window_start,
         window_end,
         window_length
         ) |> 
  group_by(clusterID_seq,
           window_type) %>%
  summarise(watershed = first(watershed),
            year = first(year),
            window_length = first(window_length),
            
            # catchment_km2 at downstream terminus of sample window
            catchment_km2 = max(catchment_km2, na.rm = T),
            
            # total riparian area (m^2) in window
            riparian_area_m2 = sum(riparian_area_m2, na.rm = T),
            
            # avg TO of window
            TO = mean(TO, na.rm = T),
            
            # avg detection and fals pos. prob. for window
            p_window = mean(p_mean, na.rm = T),
            f_window = mean(f_mean, na.rm = T),
            
            # sum dam counts
            beav_count_all  = sum(dam_count_beav_all, na.rm = TRUE),
            beav_count_conf = sum(dam_count_beav_conf, na.rm = TRUE),
            anthro_count    = sum(dam_count_ant, na.rm = TRUE),
            isAnthro = first(isAnthro),
            
            # compute Nhat:
            Nhat = beav_count_all / (p_window * (1 - f_window)),
  
            # sum total surface water area for window
            SWA_t1 = sum(SWA_t1, na.rm = T),
            SWA_t2 = sum(SWA_t2, na.rm = T),
            SWA_t3 = sum(SWA_t3, na.rm = T),
            SWA_t4 = sum(SWA_t4, na.rm = T),
            SWA_t5 = sum(SWA_t5, na.rm = T),
            SWA_t6 = sum(SWA_t6, na.rm = T),
            SWA_t7 = sum(SWA_t7, na.rm = T),
            SWA_t8 = sum(SWA_t8, na.rm = T),
            
            # sum total veg area for window
            VA_t5 = sum(vegArea_t5, na.rm = T),
            VA_t6 = sum(vegArea_t6, na.rm = T),
            VA_t7 = sum(vegArea_t7, na.rm = T),
            VA_t8 = sum(vegArea_t8, na.rm = T),
            
            # mean & sd NDVI for window
            NDVI_t5 = mean(mNDVI_t5,na.rm=T),
            NDVI_t6 = mean(mNDVI_t6,na.rm=T),
            NDVI_t7 = mean(mNDVI_t7,na.rm=T),
            NDVI_t8 = mean(mNDVI_t8,na.rm=T),
            NDVI_sd_t5 = sd(mNDVI_t5,na.rm=T),
            NDVI_sd_t6 = sd(mNDVI_t6,na.rm=T),
            NDVI_sd_t7 = sd(mNDVI_t7,na.rm=T),
            NDVI_sd_t8 = sd(mNDVI_t8,na.rm=T),

            # take max isNull. if 1, then SWA should = NA due to satellite obfuscation;
            containsNull_t1 = max(containsNull_t1),
            containsNull_t2 = max(containsNull_t2),
            containsNull_t3 = max(containsNull_t3),
            containsNull_t4 = max(containsNull_t4),
            containsNull_t5 = max(containsNull_t5),
            containsNull_t6 = max(containsNull_t6),
            containsNull_t7 = max(containsNull_t7),
            containsNull_t8 = max(containsNull_t8),
            
            .groups = "drop"
  )

wc19_sampledSW_wNull <- wc19_sampledSW_Veg %>% 
  mutate(across(
    .cols = starts_with("SWA_t"),
    .fns  = ~ ifelse(
      wc19_sampledSW_Veg[[str_replace(cur_column(), "SWA", "containsNull")]] >= 1,
      NA,
      .
    )
  ))

wc19_sampledSW_Long <- wc19_sampledSW_wNull %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(starts_with("SWA_t"), 
             starts_with("NDVI_t"), 
             starts_with("VA_t"),
             starts_with("NDVI_sd_t"),
             starts_with("containsNull_t")),
    names_to = c(".value", "t"),
    names_pattern = "(.*)_t(\\d+)"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    t = as.factor(t)
  )

wc19_lateSummer_Sample_Long <- wc19_sampledSW_Long |> 
  filter(t %in% c(5,6,7,8))

###################################
####################################
######################################



#PLOTS!
#Compare dam counts per sample window
wc19_damcounts <- wc19_lateSummer_Sample_Long %>%
  filter(window_type == "dammed") %>%
  select(clusterID_seq, beav_count_all)

wc19_damcounts <- wc19_damcounts %>%
  mutate(beav_count_all = beav_count_all,
         clusterID_seq = factor(clusterID_seq)) |> 
  group_by(clusterID_seq) |> 
  summarise(beav_count_all = max(beav_count_all))

ggplot(wc19_damcounts,
       aes(x = beav_count_all,
           fill = factor(clusterID_seq))) +
  geom_bar(color = "black", width = 0.8) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = colorRampPalette(RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(12, "Paired"))(60),
    name = "Cluster ID"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Dam Count per Cluster Window",
    y = "Number of Dammed Clusters",
    title = "Distribution of Dam Counts Across Sampled Dammed Clusters",
    subtitle = "WC19"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )


# Compare SWA across time periods for undammed,  and dammed windows:
#Plot boxplot:

ggplot(wc19_lateSummer_Sample_Long,
       aes(x = t,
           y = SWA,
           fill = window_type)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.4, alpha = 0.8) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("undammed" = "steelblue",
                               "dammed"   = "brown")) +
  labs(
    x = "Time period (t)",
    y = "Surface Water Area (SWA) (m^2)",
    fill = "Sample Window Type",
    title = "Surface Water Area by Dam Status",
    subtitle = "Willow Creek 2019"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14)


# Ensure that samples span relatively similar riparian area and TO
# RiparianArea_m2
ggplot(wc19_lateSummer_Sample_Long,
       aes(x = window_type,
           y = riparian_area_m2,
           fill = window_type)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.4, alpha = 0.8) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("undammed" = "steelblue",
                               "dammed"   = "brown")) +
  labs(
    x = "Time period (t)",
    y = "Riparian Area (m^2)",
    fill = "Sample Window Type",
    title = "Riparian Area by Dam Status",
    subtitle = "Willow Creek 2019"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14)


#####
# TO

       aes(x = window_type,
           y = TO,
           fill = window_type)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.4, alpha = 0.8) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("undammed" = "steelblue",
                               "dammed"   = "brown")) +
  labs(

           y = NDVI,
```

**2021**
----

```{r,echo=FALSE}
# left_join() the SW data to the "..._sampled" data frame for each watershed-year combo

# WILLOW

# 2021
wc21_sampledSW <- wc21_sampled %>% 
  left_join(wc_SW_21_collapsed,
            by = "TP_ID") %>% 
  select(watershed,
         year,
         clusterID_seq,
         TP_ID,
         window_type,
         catchment_km2,
         riparian_area_m2,
         TO,
         p_mean,
         f_mean,
         dam_count_beav_all,
         dam_count_beav_conf,
         dam_count_ant,
         isAnthro,
         dam_intensity,
         SWA_t1,
         SWA_t2,
         SWA_t3,
         SWA_t4,
         SWA_t5,
         SWA_t6,
         SWA_t7,
         SWA_t8,
         containsNull_t1,
         containsNull_t2,
         containsNull_t3,
         containsNull_t4,
         containsNull_t5,
         containsNull_t6,
         containsNull_t7,
         containsNull_t8,
         window_start,
         window_end,
         window_length
         ) %>% 
  group_by(clusterID_seq,
           window_type) %>%
  summarise(watershed = first(watershed),
            year = first(year),
            window_length = first(window_length),
            
            # catchment_km2 at downstream terminus of sample window
            catchment_km2 = max(catchment_km2, na.rm = T),
            
            # total riparian area (m^2) in window
            riparian_area_m2 = sum(riparian_area_m2, na.rm = T),
            
            # avg TO of window
            TO = mean(TO, na.rm = T),
            
            # avg detection and fals pos. prob. for window
            p_window = mean(p_mean, na.rm = T),
            f_window = mean(f_mean, na.rm = T),
            
            # sum dam counts
            beav_count_all  = sum(dam_count_beav_all, na.rm = TRUE),
            beav_count_conf = sum(dam_count_beav_conf, na.rm = TRUE),
            anthro_count    = sum(dam_count_ant, na.rm = TRUE),
            isAnthro = first(isAnthro),
            
            # compute Nhat:
            Nhat = beav_count_all / (p_window * (1 - f_window)),
  
            
            # sum total surface water area for window
            SWA_t1 = sum(SWA_t1),
            SWA_t2 = sum(SWA_t2),
            SWA_t3 = sum(SWA_t3),
            SWA_t4 = sum(SWA_t4),
            SWA_t5 = sum(SWA_t5),
            SWA_t6 = sum(SWA_t6),
            SWA_t7 = sum(SWA_t7),
            SWA_t8 = sum(SWA_t8),
            
            # take max isNull. if 1, then SWA should = NA due to satellite obfuscation;
            containsNull_t1 = max(containsNull_t1),
            containsNull_t2 = max(containsNull_t2),
            containsNull_t3 = max(containsNull_t3),
            containsNull_t4 = max(containsNull_t4),
            containsNull_t5 = max(containsNull_t5),
            containsNull_t6 = max(containsNull_t6),
            containsNull_t7 = max(containsNull_t7),
            containsNull_t8 = max(containsNull_t8),
            
            .groups = "drop"
  )

wc21_sampledSW_wNull <- wc21_sampledSW %>% 
  mutate(across(
    .cols = starts_with("SWA_t"),
    .fns  = ~ ifelse(
      wc21_sampledSW[[str_replace(cur_column(), "SWA", "containsNull")]] >= 1,
      NA,
      .
    )
  ))

wc21_sampledSW_Long <- wc21_sampledSW_wNull %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("SWA_t"),
    names_to = "time_period",
    values_to = "SWA"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    t = as.factor(gsub("SWA_t", "", time_period))
  )
###################################
####################################
######################################



#PLOTS!
#Compare dam counts per sample window
wc21_damcounts <- wc21_sampledSW_wNull %>%
  filter(window_type == "dammed") %>%
  select(clusterID_seq, beav_count_all)

wc21_damcounts <- wc21_damcounts %>%
  mutate(beav_count_all = factor(beav_count_all),
         clusterID_seq = factor(clusterID_seq))

ggplot(wc21_damcounts,
       aes(x = beav_count_all,
           fill = factor(clusterID_seq))) +
  geom_bar(color = "black", width = 0.8) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = colorRampPalette(RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(12, "Paired"))(60),
    name = "Cluster ID"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Dam Count per Cluster Window",
    y = "Number of Dammed Clusters",
    title = "Distribution of Dam Counts Across Sampled Dammed Clusters",
    subtitle = "WC21"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )



# Compare SWA across time periods for undammed,  and dammed windows:

                               "dammed"   = "brown")) +
  labs(
    x = "Time period (t)",
    y = "Surface Water Area (SWA) (m^2)",
    fill = "Sample Window Type",
    title = "Surface Water Area by Dam Status",
    subtitle = "Willow Creek 2021"
  ) +

# Ensure that samples span relatively similar riparian area and TO
```

```{r,echo=FALSE}
    )
  ))

lt19_sampledSW_Long <- lt19_sampledSW_wNull %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("SWA_t"),
    names_to = "time_period",
    values_to = "SWA"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    t = as.factor(gsub("SWA_t", "", time_period))
  )
###################################
####################################
######################################



#PLOTS!
#Compare dam counts per sample window
lt19_damcounts <- lt19_sampledSW_wNull %>%
  filter(window_type == "dammed") %>%
  select(clusterID_seq, beav_count_all)

lt19_damcounts <- lt19_damcounts %>%
  mutate(beav_count_all = factor(beav_count_all),
         clusterID_seq = factor(clusterID_seq))

ggplot(lt19_damcounts,
       aes(x = beav_count_all,
           fill = factor(clusterID_seq))) +
  geom_bar(color = "black", width = 0.8) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = colorRampPalette(RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(12, "Paired"))(60),
    name = "Cluster ID"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Dam Count per Cluster Window",
    y = "Number of Dammed Clusters",
    title = "Distribution of Dam Counts Across Sampled Dammed Clusters",
    subtitle = "LT19"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )



# Compare SWA across time periods for undammed,  and dammed windows:
#Plot boxplot:

ggplot(lt19_sampledSW_Long,
       aes(x = t,
           y = SWA,
           fill = window_type)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.4, alpha = 0.8) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("undammed" = "steelblue",
                               "dammed"   = "brown")) +
  labs(
    x = "Time period (t)",
    y = "Surface Water Area (SWA) (m^2)",
    fill = "Sample Window Type",
    title = "Surface Water Area by Dam Status",
    subtitle = "Lone Tree Creek 2019"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14)


# Ensure that samples span relatively similar riparian area and TO
# RiparianArea_m2
ggplot(lt19_sampledSW_Long,
       aes(x = window_type,
           y = riparian_area_m2,
           fill = window_type)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.4, alpha = 0.8) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("undammed" = "steelblue",
                               "dammed"   = "brown")) +
  labs(
    x = "Sample Window Type",
    y = "Riparian Area (m^2)",
    fill = "Sample Window Type",
    title = "Riparian Area by Sample Window Type",
    subtitle = "Lone Tree Creek 2019"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14)


#####
# TO

ggplot(lt19_sampledSW_Long,
       aes(x = window_type,
           y = TO,
           fill = window_type)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.4, alpha = 0.8) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("undammed" = "steelblue",
                               "dammed"   = "brown")) +
  labs(
    x = "Sample Window Type",
    y = "Topographic Openness",
    fill = "Sample Window Type",
    title = "TO by Sample Window Type",
    subtitle = "Lone Tree Creek 2019"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14)
```

```{r,include=FALSE}
lt19_sampledSW_Long_Export <- lt19_sampledSW_Long %>% 
  st_drop_geometry() %>% 
  select(clusterID_seq,
         window_type,
         watershed,
         year,
         window_length,
         catchment_km2,
         riparian_area_m2,
         TO,
         p_window,
         f_window,
         beav_count_all,
         beav_count_conf,
         anthro_count,
         isAnthro,
         Nhat,
         time_period,
         SWA,
         t)
```
