**2021**
----

```{r,echo=FALSE}
# left_join() the SW data to the "..._sampled" data frame for each watershed-year combo

# LONE TREE

# 2021
lt21_sampledSW <- lt21_sampled %>% 
  left_join(lt_SW_21_collapsed,
            by = "TP_ID") %>% 
  select(watershed,
         year,
         clusterID_seq,
         TP_ID,
         window_type,
         catchment_km2,
         riparian_area_m2,
         TO,
         p_mean,
         f_mean,
         dam_count_beav_all,
         dam_count_beav_conf,
         dam_count_ant,
         isAnthro,
         dam_intensity,
         SWA_t1,
         SWA_t2,
         SWA_t3,
         SWA_t4,
         SWA_t5,
         SWA_t6,
         SWA_t7,
         SWA_t8,
         containsNull_t1,
         containsNull_t2,
         containsNull_t3,
         containsNull_t4,
         containsNull_t5,
         containsNull_t6,
         containsNull_t7,
         containsNull_t8,
         window_start,
         window_end,
         window_length
         ) %>% 
  group_by(clusterID_seq,
           window_type) %>%
  summarise(watershed = first(watershed),
            year = first(year),
            window_length = first(window_length),
            
            # catchment_km2 at downstream terminus of sample window
            catchment_km2 = max(catchment_km2, na.rm = T),
            
            # total riparian area (m^2) in window
            riparian_area_m2 = sum(riparian_area_m2, na.rm = T),
            
            # avg TO of window
            TO = mean(TO, na.rm = T),
            
            # avg detection and fals pos. prob. for window
            p_window = mean(p_mean, na.rm = T),
            f_window = mean(f_mean, na.rm = T),
            
            # sum dam counts
            beav_count_all  = sum(dam_count_beav_all, na.rm = TRUE),
            beav_count_conf = sum(dam_count_beav_conf, na.rm = TRUE),
            anthro_count    = sum(dam_count_ant, na.rm = TRUE),
            isAnthro = first(isAnthro),
            
            # compute Nhat:
            Nhat = beav_count_all / (p_window * (1 - f_window)),
  
            
            # sum total surface water area for window
            SWA_t1 = sum(SWA_t1),
            SWA_t2 = sum(SWA_t2),
            SWA_t3 = sum(SWA_t3),
            SWA_t4 = sum(SWA_t4),
            SWA_t5 = sum(SWA_t5),
            SWA_t6 = sum(SWA_t6),
            SWA_t7 = sum(SWA_t7),
            SWA_t8 = sum(SWA_t8),
            
            # take max isNull. if 1, then SWA should = NA due to satellite obfuscation;
            containsNull_t1 = max(containsNull_t1),
            containsNull_t2 = max(containsNull_t2),
            containsNull_t3 = max(containsNull_t3),
            containsNull_t4 = max(containsNull_t4),
            containsNull_t5 = max(containsNull_t5),
            containsNull_t6 = max(containsNull_t6),
            containsNull_t7 = max(containsNull_t7),
            containsNull_t8 = max(containsNull_t8),
            
            .groups = "drop"
  )

lt21_sampledSW_wNull <- lt21_sampledSW %>% 
  mutate(across(
    .cols = starts_with("SWA_t"),
    .fns  = ~ ifelse(
      lt21_sampledSW[[str_replace(cur_column(), "SWA", "containsNull")]] >= 1,
      NA,
      .
    )
  ))

lt21_sampledSW_Long <- lt21_sampledSW_wNull %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("SWA_t"),
    names_to = "time_period",
    values_to = "SWA"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    t = as.factor(gsub("SWA_t", "", time_period))
  )
###################################
####################################
######################################



#PLOTS!
#Compare dam counts per sample window
lt21_damcounts <- lt21_sampledSW_wNull %>%
  filter(window_type == "dammed") %>%
  select(clusterID_seq, beav_count_all)

lt21_damcounts <- lt21_damcounts %>%
  mutate(beav_count_all = factor(beav_count_all),
         clusterID_seq = factor(clusterID_seq))

ggplot(lt21_damcounts,
       aes(x = beav_count_all,
           fill = factor(clusterID_seq))) +
  geom_bar(color = "black", width = 0.8) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = colorRampPalette(RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(12, "Paired"))(60),
    name = "Cluster ID"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Dam Count per Cluster Window",
    y = "Number of Dammed Clusters",
    title = "Distribution of Dam Counts Across Sampled Dammed Clusters",
    subtitle = "LT21"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )



# Compare SWA across time periods for undammed,  and dammed windows:
#Plot boxplot:

ggplot(lt21_sampledSW_Long,
       aes(x = t,
           y = SWA,
           fill = window_type)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.4, alpha = 0.8) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("undammed" = "steelblue",
                               "dammed"   = "brown")) +
  labs(
    x = "Time period (t)",
    y = "Surface Water Area (SWA) (m^2)",
    fill = "Sample Window Type",
    title = "Surface Water Area by Dam Status",
    subtitle = "Lone Tree Creek 2021"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14)


# Ensure that samples span relatively similar riparian area and TO
# RiparianArea_m2
ggplot(lt21_sampledSW_Long,
       aes(x = window_type,
           y = riparian_area_m2,
           fill = window_type)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.4, alpha = 0.8) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("undammed" = "steelblue",
                               "dammed"   = "brown")) +
  labs(
    x = "Time period (t)",
    y = "Riparian Area (m^2)",
    fill = "Sample Window Type",
    title = "Riparian Area by Dam Status",
    subtitle = "Lone Tree Creek 2021"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14)


#####
# TO

ggplot(lt21_sampledSW_Long,
       aes(x = window_type,
           y = TO,
           fill = window_type)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.4, alpha = 0.8) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("undammed" = "steelblue",
                               "dammed"   = "brown")) +
  labs(
    x = "Time period (t)",
    y = "Topographic Openness",
    fill = "Sample Window Type",
    title = "TO by Dam Status",
    subtitle = "Lone Tree Creek 2021"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14)
```

```{r,echo=FALSE}
brz19_sampledSW <- brz19_sampled %>%

           y = SWA,
           fill = window_type)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.4, alpha = 0.8) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("undammed" = "steelblue",
                               "dammed"   = "brown")) +
  labs(
    x = "Time period (t)",
    y = "Surface Water Area (SWA) (m^2)",
    fill = "Sample Window Type",
    title = "Surface Water Area by Dam Status",
    subtitle = "Brazil Creek 2019"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14)


# Ensure that samples span relatively similar riparian area and TO
# RiparianArea_m2
ggplot(brz19_sampledSW_Long,
       aes(x = window_type,
           y = riparian_area_m2,
           fill = window_type)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.4, alpha = 0.8) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("undammed" = "steelblue",
                               "dammed"   = "brown")) +
  labs(
    x = "Time period (t)",
    y = "Riparian Area (m^2)",
    fill = "Sample Window Type",
    title = "Riparian Area by Dam Status",
    subtitle = "Brazil Creek 2019"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14)


#####
# TO

ggplot(brz19_sampledSW_Long,
       aes(x = window_type,
           y = TO,
           fill = window_type)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.4, alpha = 0.8) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("undammed" = "steelblue",
                               "dammed"   = "brown")) +
  labs(
    x = "Time period (t)",
    y = "Topographic Openness",
    fill = "Sample Window Type",
    title = "TO by Dam Status",
    subtitle = "Brazil Creek 2019"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14)
```

**2021**
----

```{r,echo=FALSE}
# left_join() the SW data to the "..._sampled" data frame for each watershed-year combo

# BRAZIL

# 2021
brz21_sampledSW <- brz21_sampled %>% 
  left_join(brz_SW_21_collapsed,
            by = "TP_ID") %>% 
  select(watershed,
         year,
         clusterID_seq,
         TP_ID,
         window_type,
         catchment_km2,
         riparian_area_m2,
         TO,
         p_mean,
         f_mean,
         dam_count_beav_all,
         dam_count_beav_conf,
         dam_count_ant,
         isAnthro,
         dam_intensity,
         SWA_t1,
         SWA_t2,
         SWA_t3,
         SWA_t4,
         SWA_t5,
         SWA_t6,
         SWA_t7,
         SWA_t8,
         containsNull_t1,
         containsNull_t2,
         containsNull_t3,
         containsNull_t4,
         containsNull_t5,
         containsNull_t6,
         containsNull_t7,
         containsNull_t8,
         window_start,
         window_end,
         window_length
         ) %>% 
  group_by(clusterID_seq,
           window_type) %>%
  summarise(watershed = first(watershed),
            year = first(year),
            window_length = first(window_length),
            
            # catchment_km2 at downstream terminus of sample window
            catchment_km2 = max(catchment_km2, na.rm = T),
            
            # total riparian area (m^2) in window
            riparian_area_m2 = sum(riparian_area_m2, na.rm = T),
            
            # avg TO of window
            TO = mean(TO, na.rm = T),
            
            # avg detection and fals pos. prob. for window
            p_window = mean(p_mean, na.rm = T),
            f_window = mean(f_mean, na.rm = T),
            
            # sum dam counts
            beav_count_all  = sum(dam_count_beav_all, na.rm = TRUE),
            beav_count_conf = sum(dam_count_beav_conf, na.rm = TRUE),
            anthro_count    = sum(dam_count_ant, na.rm = TRUE),
            isAnthro = first(isAnthro),
            
            # compute Nhat:
            Nhat = beav_count_all / (p_window * (1 - f_window)),
  
            
            # sum total surface water area for window
            SWA_t1 = sum(SWA_t1),
            SWA_t2 = sum(SWA_t2),
            SWA_t3 = sum(SWA_t3),
            SWA_t4 = sum(SWA_t4),
            SWA_t5 = sum(SWA_t5),
            SWA_t6 = sum(SWA_t6),
            SWA_t7 = sum(SWA_t7),
            SWA_t8 = sum(SWA_t8),
            
            # take max isNull. if 1, then SWA should = NA due to satellite obfuscation;
            containsNull_t1 = max(containsNull_t1),
            containsNull_t2 = max(containsNull_t2),
            containsNull_t3 = max(containsNull_t3),
            containsNull_t4 = max(containsNull_t4),
            containsNull_t5 = max(containsNull_t5),
            containsNull_t6 = max(containsNull_t6),
            containsNull_t7 = max(containsNull_t7),
            containsNull_t8 = max(containsNull_t8),
            
            .groups = "drop"
  )

brz21_sampledSW_wNull <- brz21_sampledSW %>% 
  mutate(across(
    .cols = starts_with("SWA_t"),
    .fns  = ~ ifelse(
      brz21_sampledSW[[str_replace(cur_column(), "SWA", "containsNull")]] >= 1,
      NA,
      .
    )
  ))

brz21_sampledSW_Long <- brz21_sampledSW_wNull %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("SWA_t"),
    names_to = "time_period",
    values_to = "SWA"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    t = as.factor(gsub("SWA_t", "", time_period))
  )
###################################
####################################
######################################



#PLOTS!
#Compare dam counts per sample window
brz21_damcounts <- brz21_sampledSW_wNull %>%
  filter(window_type == "dammed") %>%
  select(clusterID_seq, beav_count_all)

brz21_damcounts <- brz21_damcounts %>%
  mutate(beav_count_all = factor(beav_count_all),
         clusterID_seq = factor(clusterID_seq))

ggplot(brz21_damcounts,
       aes(x = beav_count_all,
           fill = factor(clusterID_seq))) +
  geom_bar(color = "black", width = 0.8) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = colorRampPalette(RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(12, "Paired"))(60),
    name = "Cluster ID"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Dam Count per Cluster Window",
    y = "Number of Dammed Clusters",
    title = "Distribution of Dam Counts Across Sampled Dammed Clusters",
    subtitle = "BRZ21"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )



# Compare SWA across time periods for undammed,  and dammed windows:
#Plot boxplot:

ggplot(brz21_sampledSW_Long,
       aes(x = t,
           y = SWA,
           fill = window_type)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.4, alpha = 0.8) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("undammed" = "steelblue",
                               "dammed"   = "brown")) +
  labs(
    x = "Time period (t)",
    y = "Surface Water Area (SWA) (m^2)",
    fill = "Sample Window Type",
    title = "Surface Water Area by Dam Status",
    subtitle = "Brazil Creek 2021"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14)


# Ensure that samples span relatively similar riparian area and TO
# RiparianArea_m2
ggplot(brz21_sampledSW_Long,
       aes(x = window_type,
           y = riparian_area_m2,
           fill = window_type)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.4, alpha = 0.8) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("undammed" = "steelblue",
                               "dammed"   = "brown")) +
  labs(
    x = "Time period (t)",
    y = "Riparian Area (m^2)",
    fill = "Sample Window Type",
    title = "Riparian Area by Dam Status",
    subtitle = "Brazil Creek 2021"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14)


#####
# TO

ggplot(brz21_sampledSW_Long,
       aes(x = window_type,
           y = TO,
           fill = window_type)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.4, alpha = 0.8) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("undammed" = "steelblue",
                               "dammed"   = "brown")) +
  labs(
    x = "Time period (t)",
    y = "Topographic Openness",
    fill = "Sample Window Type",
    title = "TO by Dam Status",
    subtitle = "Brazil Creek 2021"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14)
```

```{r,echo=FALSE}
  labs(
    x = "Time period (t)",
    y = "Topographic Openness",
    fill = "Sample Window Type",
    title = "TO by Dam Status",
    subtitle = "Larb Creek 2019"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14)
```

```{r,include=FALSE}
  st_drop_geometry() %>% 
  select(clusterID_seq,
         window_type,

         catchment_km2,
         riparian_area_m2,

```

**2021**
----

```{r,echo=FALSE}
# left_join() the SW data to the "..._sampled" data frame for each watershed-year combo

# BRAZIL

# 2021
lrb21_sampledSW <- lrb21_sampled %>% 
  left_join(lrb_SW_21_collapsed,
            by = "TP_ID") %>% 
  select(watershed,
         year,
         clusterID_seq,
         TP_ID,
         window_type,
         catchment_km2,
         riparian_area_m2,
         TO,
         p_mean,
         f_mean,
         dam_count_beav_all,
         dam_count_beav_conf,
         dam_count_ant,
         isAnthro,
         dam_intensity,
         SWA_t1,
         SWA_t2,
         SWA_t3,
         SWA_t4,
         SWA_t5,
         SWA_t6,
         SWA_t7,
         SWA_t8,
         containsNull_t1,
         containsNull_t2,
         containsNull_t3,
         containsNull_t4,
         containsNull_t5,
         containsNull_t6,
         containsNull_t7,
         containsNull_t8,
         window_start,
         window_end,
         window_length
         ) %>% 
  group_by(clusterID_seq,
           window_type) %>%
  summarise(watershed = first(watershed),
            year = first(year),
            window_length = first(window_length),
            
            # catchment_km2 at downstream terminus of sample window
            catchment_km2 = max(catchment_km2, na.rm = T),
            
            # total riparian area (m^2) in window
            riparian_area_m2 = sum(riparian_area_m2, na.rm = T),
            
            # avg TO of window
            TO = mean(TO, na.rm = T),
            
            # avg detection and fals pos. prob. for window
            p_window = mean(p_mean, na.rm = T),
            f_window = mean(f_mean, na.rm = T),
            
            # sum dam counts
            beav_count_all  = sum(dam_count_beav_all, na.rm = TRUE),
            beav_count_conf = sum(dam_count_beav_conf, na.rm = TRUE),
            anthro_count    = sum(dam_count_ant, na.rm = TRUE),
            isAnthro = first(isAnthro),
            
            # compute Nhat:
            Nhat = beav_count_all / (p_window * (1 - f_window)),
  
            
            # sum total surface water area for window
            SWA_t1 = sum(SWA_t1),
            SWA_t2 = sum(SWA_t2),
            SWA_t3 = sum(SWA_t3),
            SWA_t4 = sum(SWA_t4),
            SWA_t5 = sum(SWA_t5),
            SWA_t6 = sum(SWA_t6),
            SWA_t7 = sum(SWA_t7),
            SWA_t8 = sum(SWA_t8),
            
            # take max isNull. if 1, then SWA should = NA due to satellite obfuscation;
            containsNull_t1 = max(containsNull_t1),
            containsNull_t2 = max(containsNull_t2),
            containsNull_t3 = max(containsNull_t3),
            containsNull_t4 = max(containsNull_t4),
            containsNull_t5 = max(containsNull_t5),
            containsNull_t6 = max(containsNull_t6),
            containsNull_t7 = max(containsNull_t7),
            containsNull_t8 = max(containsNull_t8),
            
            .groups = "drop"
  )

lrb21_sampledSW_wNull <- lrb21_sampledSW %>% 
  mutate(across(
    .cols = starts_with("SWA_t"),
    .fns  = ~ ifelse(
      lrb21_sampledSW[[str_replace(cur_column(), "SWA", "containsNull")]] >= 1,
      NA,
      .
    )
  ))

lrb21_sampledSW_Long <- lrb21_sampledSW_wNull %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("SWA_t"),
    names_to = "time_period",
    values_to = "SWA"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    t = as.factor(gsub("SWA_t", "", time_period))
  )
###################################
####################################
######################################



#PLOTS!
#Compare dam counts per sample window
lrb21_damcounts <- lrb21_sampledSW_wNull %>%
  filter(window_type == "dammed") %>%
  select(clusterID_seq, beav_count_all)

lrb21_damcounts <- lrb21_damcounts %>%
  mutate(beav_count_all = factor(beav_count_all),
         clusterID_seq = factor(clusterID_seq))

ggplot(lrb21_damcounts,
       aes(x = beav_count_all,
           fill = factor(clusterID_seq))) +
  geom_bar(color = "black", width = 0.8) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = colorRampPalette(RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(12, "Paired"))(60),
    name = "Cluster ID"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Dam Count per Cluster Window",
    y = "Number of Dammed Clusters",
    title = "Distribution of Dam Counts Across Sampled Dammed Clusters",
    subtitle = "LRB21"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )



# Compare SWA across time periods for undammed,  and dammed windows:
#Plot boxplot:

ggplot(lrb21_sampledSW_Long,
       aes(x = t,
           y = SWA,
           fill = window_type)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.4, alpha = 0.8) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("undammed" = "steelblue",
                               "dammed"   = "brown")) +
  labs(
    x = "Time period (t)",
    y = "Surface Water Area (SWA) (m^2)",
    fill = "Sample Window Type",
    title = "Surface Water Area by Dam Status",
    subtitle = "Larb Creek 2021"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14)


# Ensure that samples span relatively similar riparian area and TO
# RiparianArea_m2
ggplot(lrb21_sampledSW_Long,
       aes(x = window_type,
           y = riparian_area_m2,
           fill = window_type)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.4, alpha = 0.8) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("undammed" = "steelblue",
                               "dammed"   = "brown")) +
  labs(
    x = "Time period (t)",
    y = "Riparian Area (m^2)",
    fill = "Sample Window Type",
    title = "Riparian Area by Dam Status",
    subtitle = "Larb Creek 2021"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14)


#####
# TO

ggplot(lrb21_sampledSW_Long,
       aes(x = window_type,
           y = TO,
           fill = window_type)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.4, alpha = 0.8) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("undammed" = "steelblue",
                               "dammed"   = "brown")) +
  labs(
    x = "Time period (t)",
    y = "Topographic Openness",
    fill = "Sample Window Type",
    title = "TO by Dam Status",
    subtitle = "Larb Creek 2021"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14)
```

```{r,echo=FALSE}
# left_join() the SW data to the "..._sampled" data frame for each watershed-year combo

# BRAZIL

# 2021
lbv21_sampledSW <- lbv21_sampled %>% 
  left_join(lbv_SW_21_collapsed,
            by = "TP_ID") %>% 
  select(watershed,
         year,
         clusterID_seq,
         TP_ID,
         window_type,
         catchment_km2,
         riparian_area_m2,
         TO,
         p_mean,
         f_mean,
         dam_count_beav_all,
         dam_count_beav_conf,
         dam_count_ant,
         isAnthro,
         dam_intensity,
         SWA_t1,
         SWA_t2,
         SWA_t3,
         SWA_t4,
         SWA_t5,
         SWA_t6,
         SWA_t7,
         SWA_t8,
         containsNull_t1,
         containsNull_t2,
         containsNull_t3,
         containsNull_t4,
         containsNull_t5,
         containsNull_t6,
         containsNull_t7,
         containsNull_t8,
         window_start,
         window_end,
         window_length
         ) %>% 
  group_by(clusterID_seq,
           window_type) %>%
  summarise(watershed = first(watershed),
            year = first(year),
            window_length = first(window_length),
            
            # catchment_km2 at downstream terminus of sample window
            catchment_km2 = max(catchment_km2, na.rm = T),
            
            # total riparian area (m^2) in window
            riparian_area_m2 = sum(riparian_area_m2, na.rm = T),
            
            # avg TO of window
            TO = mean(TO, na.rm = T),
            
            # avg detection and fals pos. prob. for window
            p_window = mean(p_mean, na.rm = T),
            f_window = mean(f_mean, na.rm = T),
            
            # sum dam counts
            beav_count_all  = sum(dam_count_beav_all, na.rm = TRUE),
            beav_count_conf = sum(dam_count_beav_conf, na.rm = TRUE),
            anthro_count    = sum(dam_count_ant, na.rm = TRUE),
            isAnthro = first(isAnthro),
            
            # compute Nhat:
            Nhat = beav_count_all / (p_window * (1 - f_window)),
  
            
            # sum total surface water area for window
            SWA_t1 = sum(SWA_t1),
            SWA_t2 = sum(SWA_t2),
            SWA_t3 = sum(SWA_t3),
            SWA_t4 = sum(SWA_t4),
            SWA_t5 = sum(SWA_t5),
            SWA_t6 = sum(SWA_t6),
            SWA_t7 = sum(SWA_t7),
            SWA_t8 = sum(SWA_t8),
            
            # take max isNull. if 1, then SWA should = NA due to satellite obfuscation;
            containsNull_t1 = max(containsNull_t1),
            containsNull_t2 = max(containsNull_t2),
            containsNull_t3 = max(containsNull_t3),
            containsNull_t4 = max(containsNull_t4),
            containsNull_t5 = max(containsNull_t5),
            containsNull_t6 = max(containsNull_t6),
            containsNull_t7 = max(containsNull_t7),
            containsNull_t8 = max(containsNull_t8),
            
            .groups = "drop"
  )

lbv21_sampledSW_wNull <- lbv21_sampledSW %>% 
  mutate(across(
    .cols = starts_with("SWA_t"),
    .fns  = ~ ifelse(
      lbv21_sampledSW[[str_replace(cur_column(), "SWA", "containsNull")]] >= 1,
      NA,
      .
    )
  ))

lbv21_sampledSW_Long <- lbv21_sampledSW_wNull %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("SWA_t"),
    names_to = "time_period",
    values_to = "SWA"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    t = as.factor(gsub("SWA_t", "", time_period))
  )
###################################
####################################
######################################



#PLOTS!
#Compare dam counts per sample window
lbv21_damcounts <- lbv21_sampledSW_wNull %>%
  filter(window_type == "dammed") %>%
  select(clusterID_seq, beav_count_all)

lbv21_damcounts <- lbv21_damcounts %>%
  mutate(beav_count_all = factor(beav_count_all),
         clusterID_seq = factor(clusterID_seq))

ggplot(lbv21_damcounts,
       aes(x = beav_count_all,
           fill = factor(clusterID_seq))) +
  geom_bar(color = "black", width = 0.8) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = colorRampPalette(RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(12, "Paired"))(60),
    name = "Cluster ID"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Dam Count per Cluster Window",
    y = "Number of Dammed Clusters",
    title = "Distribution of Dam Counts Across Sampled Dammed Clusters",
    subtitle = "LBV21"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )



# Compare SWA across time periods for undammed,  and dammed windows:
#Plot boxplot:

ggplot(lbv21_sampledSW_Long,
       aes(x = t,
           y = SWA,
           fill = window_type)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.4, alpha = 0.8) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("undammed" = "steelblue",
                               "dammed"   = "brown")) +
  labs(
    x = "Time period (t)",
    y = "Surface Water Area (SWA) (m^2)",
    fill = "Sample Window Type",
    title = "Surface Water Area by Dam Status",
    subtitle = "Lower Beaver Creek 2021"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14)


# Ensure that samples span relatively similar riparian area and TO
# RiparianArea_m2
ggplot(lbv21_sampledSW_Long,
       aes(x = window_type,
           y = riparian_area_m2,
           fill = window_type)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.4, alpha = 0.8) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("undammed" = "steelblue",
                               "dammed"   = "brown")) +
  labs(
    x = "Time period (t)",
    y = "Riparian Area (m^2)",
    fill = "Sample Window Type",
    title = "Riparian Area by Dam Status",
    subtitle = "Lower Beaver Creek 2021"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14)


#####
# TO

ggplot(lbv21_sampledSW_Long,
       aes(x = window_type,
           y = TO,
           fill = window_type)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.4, alpha = 0.8) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("undammed" = "steelblue",
                               "dammed"   = "brown")) +
  labs(
    x = "Time period (t)",
    y = "Topographic Openness",
    fill = "Sample Window Type",
    title = "TO by Dam Status",
    subtitle = "Lower Beaver Creek 2021"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14)
```


```{r,include=FALSE}

lbv21_sampledSW_Long_Export <- lbv21_sampledSW_Long %>% 
  st_drop_geometry() %>% 
  select(clusterID_seq,
         window_type,
         watershed,
         year,
         window_length,
         catchment_km2,
         riparian_area_m2,
         TO,
         p_window,
         f_window,
         beav_count_all,
         beav_count_conf,
         anthro_count,
         isAnthro,
         Nhat,
         time_period,
         SWA,
         t)
```

```{r,echo=FALSE}
# 2019
ubv19_sampledSW <- ubv19_sampled %>% 
  left_join(ubv_SW_19_collapsed,
            by = "TP_ID") %>% 
  select(watershed,
         year,
         clusterID_seq,

         SWA_t2,
         SWA_t3,
         SWA_t4,
         SWA_t5,
         SWA_t6,
         SWA_t7,
         SWA_t8,
         containsNull_t1,
         containsNull_t2,
         containsNull_t3,
         containsNull_t4,
         containsNull_t5,
         containsNull_t6,
         containsNull_t7,
         containsNull_t8,
         window_start,

         window_length

            anthro_count    = sum(dam_count_ant, na.rm = TRUE),
```

```{r,echo=FALSE}
            f_window = mean(f_mean, na.rm = T),
            
            # sum dam counts
            beav_count_all  = sum(dam_count_beav_all, na.rm = TRUE),
            beav_count_conf = sum(dam_count_beav_conf, na.rm = TRUE),
            anthro_count    = sum(dam_count_ant, na.rm = TRUE),
            isAnthro = first(isAnthro),
            
            # compute Nhat:
            Nhat = beav_count_all / (p_window * (1 - f_window)),
  
            
            # sum total surface water area for window
            SWA_t1 = sum(SWA_t1),
            SWA_t2 = sum(SWA_t2),
            SWA_t3 = sum(SWA_t3),
            SWA_t4 = sum(SWA_t4),
            SWA_t5 = sum(SWA_t5),
            SWA_t6 = sum(SWA_t6),
            SWA_t7 = sum(SWA_t7),
            SWA_t8 = sum(SWA_t8),
            
            # take max isNull. if 1, then SWA should = NA due to satellite obfuscation;
            containsNull_t1 = max(containsNull_t1),
            containsNull_t2 = max(containsNull_t2),
            containsNull_t3 = max(containsNull_t3),
            containsNull_t4 = max(containsNull_t4),
            containsNull_t5 = max(containsNull_t5),
            containsNull_t6 = max(containsNull_t6),
            containsNull_t7 = max(containsNull_t7),
            containsNull_t8 = max(containsNull_t8),
            
            .groups = "drop"
  )

ubv21_sampledSW_wNull <- ubv21_sampledSW %>% 
  mutate(across(
    .cols = starts_with("SWA_t"),
    .fns  = ~ ifelse(
      ubv21_sampledSW[[str_replace(cur_column(), "SWA", "containsNull")]] >= 1,
      NA,
      .
    )
  ))

ubv21_sampledSW_Long <- ubv21_sampledSW_wNull %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("SWA_t"),
    names_to = "time_period",
    values_to = "SWA"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    t = as.factor(gsub("SWA_t", "", time_period))
  )
###################################
####################################
######################################



#PLOTS!
#Compare dam counts per sample window
ubv21_damcounts <- ubv21_sampledSW_wNull %>%
  filter(window_type == "dammed") %>%
  select(clusterID_seq, beav_count_all)

ubv21_damcounts <- ubv21_damcounts %>%
  mutate(beav_count_all = factor(beav_count_all),
         clusterID_seq = factor(clusterID_seq))

ggplot(ubv21_damcounts,
       aes(x = beav_count_all,
           fill = factor(clusterID_seq))) +
  geom_bar(color = "black", width = 0.8) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = colorRampPalette(RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(12, "Paired"))(60),
    name = "Cluster ID"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Dam Count per Cluster Window",
    y = "Number of Dammed Clusters",
    title = "Distribution of Dam Counts Across Sampled Dammed Clusters",
    subtitle = "UBV21"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )



# Compare SWA across time periods for undammed,  and dammed windows:
#Plot boxplot:

ggplot(ubv21_sampledSW_Long,
       aes(x = t,
           y = SWA,
           fill = window_type)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.4, alpha = 0.8) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("undammed" = "steelblue",
                               "dammed"   = "brown")) +
  labs(
    x = "Time period (t)",
    y = "Surface Water Area (SWA) (m^2)",
    fill = "Sample Window Type",
    title = "Surface Water Area by Dam Status",
    subtitle = "Upper Beaver Creek 2021"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14)


# Ensure that samples span relatively similar riparian area and TO
# RiparianArea_m2
ggplot(ubv21_sampledSW_Long,
       aes(x = window_type,
           y = riparian_area_m2,
           fill = window_type)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.4, alpha = 0.8) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("undammed" = "steelblue",
                               "dammed"   = "brown")) +
  labs(
    x = "Time period (t)",
    y = "Riparian Area (m^2)",
    fill = "Sample Window Type",
    title = "Riparian Area by Dam Status",
    subtitle = "Upper Beaver Creek 2021"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14)


#####
# TO

ggplot(ubv21_sampledSW_Long,
       aes(x = window_type,
           y = TO,
           fill = window_type)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.4, alpha = 0.8) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("undammed" = "steelblue",
                               "dammed"   = "brown")) +
  labs(
    x = "Time period (t)",
    y = "Topographic Openness",
    fill = "Sample Window Type",
    title = "TO by Dam Status",
    subtitle = "Upper Beaver Creek 2021"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14)
```

```{r,include=FALSE}
  select(clusterID_seq,
         window_type,
         watershed,
         year,
         window_length,
         catchment_km2,
         riparian_area_m2,
         TO,
         p_window,
         f_window,
         beav_count_all,
         beav_count_conf,

         isAnthro,
```

```{r,echo=FALSE}
# left_join() the SW data to the "..._sampled" data frame for each watershed-year combo

# BRAZIL

# 2023
ubv23_sampledSW <- ubv23_sampled %>% 
  left_join(ubv_SW_23_collapsed,
            by = "TP_ID") %>% 
  select(watershed,
         year,
         clusterID_seq,
         TP_ID,
         window_type,
         catchment_km2,
         riparian_area_m2,
         TO,
         p_mean,
         f_mean,
         dam_count_beav_all,
         dam_count_beav_conf,
         dam_count_ant,
         isAnthro,
         dam_intensity,
         SWA_t1,
         SWA_t2,
         SWA_t3,
         SWA_t4,
         SWA_t5,
         SWA_t6,
         SWA_t7,
         SWA_t8,
         containsNull_t1,
         containsNull_t2,
         containsNull_t3,
         containsNull_t4,
         containsNull_t5,
         containsNull_t6,
         containsNull_t7,
         containsNull_t8,
         window_start,
         window_end,
         window_length
         ) %>% 
  group_by(clusterID_seq,
           window_type) %>%
  summarise(watershed = first(watershed),
            year = first(year),
            window_length = first(window_length),
            
            # catchment_km2 at downstream terminus of sample window
            catchment_km2 = max(catchment_km2, na.rm = T),
            
            # total riparian area (m^2) in window
            riparian_area_m2 = sum(riparian_area_m2, na.rm = T),
            
            # avg TO of window
            TO = mean(TO, na.rm = T),
            
            # avg detection and fals pos. prob. for window
            p_window = mean(p_mean, na.rm = T),
            f_window = mean(f_mean, na.rm = T),
            
            # sum dam counts
            beav_count_all  = sum(dam_count_beav_all, na.rm = TRUE),
            beav_count_conf = sum(dam_count_beav_conf, na.rm = TRUE),
            anthro_count    = sum(dam_count_ant, na.rm = TRUE),
            isAnthro = first(isAnthro),
            
            # compute Nhat:
            Nhat = beav_count_all / (p_window * (1 - f_window)),
  
            
            # sum total surface water area for window
            SWA_t1 = sum(SWA_t1),
            SWA_t2 = sum(SWA_t2),
            SWA_t3 = sum(SWA_t3),
            SWA_t4 = sum(SWA_t4),
            SWA_t5 = sum(SWA_t5),
            SWA_t6 = sum(SWA_t6),
            SWA_t7 = sum(SWA_t7),
            SWA_t8 = sum(SWA_t8),
            
            # take max isNull. if 1, then SWA should = NA due to satellite obfuscation;
            containsNull_t1 = max(containsNull_t1),
            containsNull_t2 = max(containsNull_t2),
            containsNull_t3 = max(containsNull_t3),
            containsNull_t4 = max(containsNull_t4),
            containsNull_t5 = max(containsNull_t5),
            containsNull_t6 = max(containsNull_t6),
            containsNull_t7 = max(containsNull_t7),
            containsNull_t8 = max(containsNull_t8),
            
            .groups = "drop"
  )

ubv23_sampledSW_wNull <- ubv23_sampledSW %>% 
  mutate(across(
    .cols = starts_with("SWA_t"),
    .fns  = ~ ifelse(
```

----

----

----

----

----

----

----

EXPLORE POTENTIAL WATERSHED LEVEL EFFECTS:

DOES DAM_DENSITY[watershed] influence RI[watershed]?

ONLY COMPARE t5:t8; t1:t4 for 2023 saw MASSIVE flooding that certainly wiped out dams; for comparability's sake, remove t1:t4 from consideration

Compare watersheds across time:

    6 watersheds
    
    3 years
    
    4 time periods (t5:t8)
      - August & September
      


For each watershed/year combo, condense the "..._SW_..._collapsed" data frame to a single, summed row, with columns: watershed; SWAt1:SWAt8; riparian_area_m -- where SWA for each time period, and riparian_area_m2 are each summed across the entire watershed.

Then, bind_rows, to join each watershed/year together into a single data frame & compute RI for each.



```{r,echo=FALSE}
#Bring in watershed level dam density based on counts/km from CP analysis

cp_watershed_damDensity <- read.csv("ObservedDamDensity_dams_per_km_byStream_byYear.csv") %>%
  mutate(zDamDensity = scale(dams_per_km))

cp_watershed_damDensity <- cp_watershed_damDensity %>% 
  rename(watershed = Stream) %>% 
  select(watershed,
         Year,
         dams_per_km) %>% 
  group_by(watershed,
           Year)

```


```{r,echo=FALSE}
#Bring in UDA for each ws/year from above

# WILLOW
wc_UDA <- wcRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID_detDat19_dam19 %>% 
  filter(if_all(everything(), ~ .x != -Inf)) %>% 
  select(catchment_km2) %>%  
  mutate(watershed = "WC") %>% 
  group_by(watershed) %>% 
  summarise(catchment_km2 = max(catchment_km2))

# LONE TREE
lt_UDA <- ltRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID_detDat19_dam19 %>% 
  filter(if_all(everything(), ~ .x != -Inf)) %>% 
  select(catchment_km2) %>% 
  mutate(watershed = "LT") %>% 
  group_by(watershed) %>% 
  summarise(catchment_km2 = max(catchment_km2))

# BRAZIL
brz_UDA <- brzRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID_detDat19_dam19 %>% 
  filter(if_all(everything(), ~ .x != -Inf)) %>% 
  select(catchment_km2) %>% 
  mutate(watershed = "BRZ") %>% 
  group_by(watershed) %>% 
  summarise(catchment_km2 = max(catchment_km2))

# LARB
lrb_UDA <- lrbRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID_detDat19_dam19 %>% 
  filter(if_all(everything(), ~ .x != -Inf)) %>% 
  select(catchment_km2) %>%
  mutate(watershed = "LRB") %>% 
  group_by(watershed) %>% 
  summarise(catchment_km2 = max(catchment_km2))

# LOW BEAV
lbv_UDA <- lbvRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID_detDat19_dam19 %>% 
  filter(if_all(everything(), ~ .x != -Inf)) %>% 
  select(catchment_km2) %>%
  mutate(watershed = "LBV") %>% 
  group_by(watershed) %>% 
  summarise(catchment_km2 = max(catchment_km2))

# UP BEAV
ubv_UDA <- ubvRIP_Area_TO_UDA_uniqueID_detDat19_dam19 %>% 
  filter(if_all(everything(), ~ .x != -Inf)) %>% 
  select(catchment_km2) %>% 
  mutate(watershed = "UBV") %>% 
  group_by(watershed) %>% 
  summarise(catchment_km2 = max(catchment_km2))


aoi_UDA <- bind_rows(wc_UDA,
                     lt_UDA,
                     brz_UDA,
                     lrb_UDA,
                     lbv_UDA,
                     ubv_UDA)

```



```{r,echo=FALSE}

# WILLOW 

# 2019
wc_19_ws_swa <- wc_SW_19_collapsed %>% 
  mutate(watershed = "WC",
         Year = 2019) %>% 
  select(watershed,
         Year,
         riparian_area_m2,
         SWA_t1,
         SWA_t2,
         SWA_t3,
         SWA_t4,
         SWA_t5,
         SWA_t6,
         SWA_t7,
         SWA_t8) %>% 
  group_by(watershed,
           Year) %>% 
  summarise(SWA_t1 = sum(SWA_t1, na.rm = T),
            SWA_t2 = sum(SWA_t2, na.rm = T),
            SWA_t3 = sum(SWA_t3, na.rm = T),
            SWA_t4 = sum(SWA_t4, na.rm = T),
            SWA_t5 = sum(SWA_t5, na.rm = T),
            SWA_t6 = sum(SWA_t6, na.rm = T),
            SWA_t7 = sum(SWA_t7, na.rm = T),
            SWA_t8 = sum(SWA_t8, na.rm = T),
            riparian_area_m2 = sum(riparian_area_m2, na.rm = T))%>% 
  mutate(RI_t1 = SWA_t1/riparian_area_m2,
         RI_t2 = SWA_t2/riparian_area_m2,
         RI_t3 = SWA_t3/riparian_area_m2,
         RI_t4 = SWA_t4/riparian_area_m2,
         RI_t5 = SWA_t5/riparian_area_m2,
         RI_t6 = SWA_t6/riparian_area_m2,
         RI_t7 = SWA_t7/riparian_area_m2,
         RI_t8 = SWA_t8/riparian_area_m2,
         ) %>% 
  left_join(cp_watershed_damDensity,
            by = c("watershed",
                   "Year"))

# 2021
wc_21_ws_swa <- wc_SW_21_collapsed %>% 
  mutate(watershed = "WC",
         Year = 2021) %>% 
  select(watershed,
         Year,
         riparian_area_m2,
         SWA_t1,
         SWA_t2,
         SWA_t3,
         SWA_t4,
         SWA_t5,
         SWA_t6,
         SWA_t7,
         SWA_t8) %>% 
  group_by(watershed,
           Year) %>% 
  summarise(SWA_t1 = sum(SWA_t1, na.rm = T),
            SWA_t2 = sum(SWA_t2, na.rm = T),
            SWA_t3 = sum(SWA_t3, na.rm = T),
            SWA_t4 = sum(SWA_t4, na.rm = T),
            SWA_t5 = sum(SWA_t5, na.rm = T),
            SWA_t6 = sum(SWA_t6, na.rm = T),
            SWA_t7 = sum(SWA_t7, na.rm = T),
            SWA_t8 = sum(SWA_t8, na.rm = T),
            riparian_area_m2 = sum(riparian_area_m2, na.rm = T))%>% 
  mutate(RI_t1 = SWA_t1/riparian_area_m2,
         RI_t2 = SWA_t2/riparian_area_m2,
         RI_t3 = SWA_t3/riparian_area_m2,
         RI_t4 = SWA_t4/riparian_area_m2,
         RI_t5 = SWA_t5/riparian_area_m2,
         RI_t6 = SWA_t6/riparian_area_m2,
         RI_t7 = SWA_t7/riparian_area_m2,
         RI_t8 = SWA_t8/riparian_area_m2,
         ) %>% 
  left_join(cp_watershed_damDensity,
            by = c("watershed",
                   "Year"))

# 2023
wc_23_ws_swa <- wc_SW_23_collapsed %>% 
  mutate(watershed = "WC",
         Year = 2023) %>% 
  select(watershed,
         Year,
         riparian_area_m2,
         SWA_t1,

         SWA_t5,

  group_by(watershed,

  summarise(SWA_t1 = sum(SWA_t1, na.rm = T),
            SWA_t2 = sum(SWA_t2, na.rm = T),
            SWA_t3 = sum(SWA_t3, na.rm = T),
            SWA_t4 = sum(SWA_t4, na.rm = T),
            SWA_t5 = sum(SWA_t5, na.rm = T),
            SWA_t6 = sum(SWA_t6, na.rm = T),
            SWA_t7 = sum(SWA_t7, na.rm = T),
            SWA_t8 = sum(SWA_t8, na.rm = T),
            riparian_area_m2 = sum(riparian_area_m2, na.rm = T))%>% 
  mutate(RI_t1 = SWA_t1/riparian_area_m2,
         RI_t2 = SWA_t2/riparian_area_m2,
         RI_t3 = SWA_t3/riparian_area_m2,
         RI_t4 = SWA_t4/riparian_area_m2,
         RI_t5 = SWA_t5/riparian_area_m2,

         RI_t7 = SWA_t7/riparian_area_m2,
         RI_t8 = SWA_t8/riparian_area_m2,
         ) %>%

            by = c("watershed",

# 2021
lt_21_ws_swa <- lt_SW_21_collapsed %>% 
  mutate(watershed = "LT",
         Year = 2021) %>% 
  select(watershed,
         Year,
         riparian_area_m2,
         SWA_t1,
         SWA_t2,
         SWA_t3,
         SWA_t4,
         SWA_t5,
         SWA_t6,
         SWA_t7,
         SWA_t8) %>% 
  group_by(watershed,
           Year) %>% 
  summarise(SWA_t1 = sum(SWA_t1, na.rm = T),
            SWA_t2 = sum(SWA_t2, na.rm = T),
            SWA_t3 = sum(SWA_t3, na.rm = T),
            SWA_t4 = sum(SWA_t4, na.rm = T),
            SWA_t5 = sum(SWA_t5, na.rm = T),
            SWA_t6 = sum(SWA_t6, na.rm = T),
            SWA_t7 = sum(SWA_t7, na.rm = T),
            SWA_t8 = sum(SWA_t8, na.rm = T),
            riparian_area_m2 = sum(riparian_area_m2, na.rm = T))%>% 
  mutate(RI_t1 = SWA_t1/riparian_area_m2,
         RI_t2 = SWA_t2/riparian_area_m2,
         RI_t3 = SWA_t3/riparian_area_m2,
         RI_t4 = SWA_t4/riparian_area_m2,
         RI_t5 = SWA_t5/riparian_area_m2,
         RI_t6 = SWA_t6/riparian_area_m2,
         RI_t7 = SWA_t7/riparian_area_m2,
         RI_t8 = SWA_t8/riparian_area_m2,
         ) %>% 
  left_join(cp_watershed_damDensity,
            by = c("watershed",
                   "Year"))

            SWA_t3 = sum(SWA_t3, na.rm = T),
            SWA_t4 = sum(SWA_t4, na.rm = T),
            SWA_t5 = sum(SWA_t5, na.rm = T),
            SWA_t6 = sum(SWA_t6, na.rm = T),
            SWA_t7 = sum(SWA_t7, na.rm = T),
            SWA_t8 = sum(SWA_t8, na.rm = T),
            riparian_area_m2 = sum(riparian_area_m2, na.rm = T))%>% 
  mutate(RI_t1 = SWA_t1/riparian_area_m2,
         RI_t2 = SWA_t2/riparian_area_m2,
         RI_t3 = SWA_t3/riparian_area_m2,
         RI_t4 = SWA_t4/riparian_area_m2,
         RI_t5 = SWA_t5/riparian_area_m2,
         RI_t6 = SWA_t6/riparian_area_m2,
         RI_t7 = SWA_t7/riparian_area_m2,
         RI_t8 = SWA_t8/riparian_area_m2,
         ) %>% 
  left_join(cp_watershed_damDensity,
            by = c("watershed",
                   "Year"))


########################################


aoi_allYears_ws_RI <- bind_rows(wc_19_ws_swa,
                                wc_21_ws_swa,
                                wc_23_ws_swa,
                                lt_19_ws_swa,
                                lt_21_ws_swa,
                                lt_23_ws_swa,
                                brz_19_ws_swa,
                                brz_21_ws_swa,
                                brz_23_ws_swa,
                                lrb_19_ws_swa,
                                lrb_21_ws_swa,
                                lrb_23_ws_swa,
                                lbv_19_ws_swa,
                                lbv_21_ws_swa,
                                lbv_23_ws_swa,
                                ubv_19_ws_swa,
                                ubv_21_ws_swa,
                                ubv_23_ws_swa)
```


```{r,echo=F}
# pivot the dataframe you just created into long format for comparison plotting:

aoi_allYears_ws_RI_long <- aoi_allYears_ws_RI %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("SWA_t"),
    names_to = "t",
    values_to = "SWA"
  ) %>%
  mutate(t = readr::parse_number(t)) %>%
  left_join(
    aoi_allYears_ws_RI %>%
      pivot_longer(
        cols = starts_with("RI_t"),
        names_to = "t_RI",
        values_to = "RI"
      ) %>%
      mutate(t = readr::parse_number(t_RI)) %>%
      select(watershed, Year, t, RI),
    by = c("watershed", "Year", "t")
  ) %>%
  select(watershed, Year, t, SWA, RI, riparian_area_m2, dams_per_km) %>% 
  mutate(surveyPeriod = as.factor(case_when(Year == 2019 & t == 1 ~ 191,
                                  Year == 2019 & t == 2 ~ 192,
                                  Year == 2019 & t == 3 ~ 193,
                                  Year == 2019 & t == 4 ~ 194,
                                  Year == 2019 & t == 5 ~ 195,
                                  Year == 2019 & t == 6 ~ 196,
                                  Year == 2019 & t == 7 ~ 197,
                                  Year == 2019 & t == 8 ~ 198,
                                  Year == 2021 & t == 1 ~ 211,
                                  Year == 2021 & t == 2 ~ 212,
                                  Year == 2021 & t == 3 ~ 213,
                                  Year == 2021 & t == 4 ~ 214,
                                  Year == 2021 & t == 5 ~ 215,
                                  Year == 2021 & t == 6 ~ 216,
                                  Year == 2021 & t == 7 ~ 217,
                                  Year == 2021 & t == 8 ~ 218,
                                  Year == 2023 & t == 1 ~ 231,
                                  Year == 2023 & t == 2 ~ 232,
                                  Year == 2023 & t == 3 ~ 233,
                                  Year == 2023 & t == 4 ~ 234,
                                  Year == 2023 & t == 5 ~ 235,
                                  Year == 2023 & t == 6 ~ 236,
                                  Year == 2023 & t == 7 ~ 237,
                                  Year == 2023 & t == 8 ~ 238))) %>% 
  left_join(mean_flow_per_survey_period,
            by = "surveyPeriod") %>% 
  left_join(aoi_UDA,
            by = "watershed") %>% 
  filter(t >= 5)


```


```{r,echo=FALSE}

ggplot(aoi_allYears_ws_RI_long,
       aes(x = dams_per_km,
           y = RI,
           color = zFlow_mean,
           shape = factor(Year))) +
  geom_point(size = 5, alpha = 0.75)  +
  labs(
    x = "Watershed Dam Density (dams/km)",
    y = "Watershed Riparian Inundation (SWA/RIPA)",
    color = "z-Std Relative Flow",
    shape = "Year",
    title = expression( RI[watershed] * "~" * DamDensity[watershed] ),
    subtitle = "All Watersheds, All Years"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14)






plot_ly(
  aoi_allYears_ws_RI_long,
  x = ~dams_per_km,
  y = ~as.numeric(scale(catchment_km2)),
  z = ~RI,
  color = ~watershed,
  type = "scatter3d",
  mode = "markers"
) %>%
  layout(
    scene = list(
      xaxis = list(title = "Dam Density (dams/stream km)"),
      yaxis = list(title = "Upstream Drainage Area (km^2)"),
      zaxis = list(title = "RI"),
      camera = list(
        eye = list(x = -1.5, y = -1.5, z = -1.5)
      )
    )
  )


plot_ly(
  aoi_allYears_ws_RI_long,
  x = ~dams_per_km,
  y = ~as.numeric(scale(riparian_area_m2)),
  z = ~as.numeric(scale(SWA)),
  color = ~watershed,
  type = "scatter3d",
  mode = "markers"
) %>%
  layout(
    scene = list(
      xaxis = list(title = "Dam Density (dams/stream km)"),
      yaxis = list(title = "Riparian Area (m^2)"),
      zaxis = list(title = "SWA"),
      camera = list(
        eye = list(x = -1.5, y = -1.5, z = -1.5)
      )
    )
  )


```
